review_text: This product is truly an amazing moisturizer! I use this at night and in the morning under my makeup! Its so hydrating but also lightweight so it looks amazing under makeup. I have integrated this into my skin care routine and I have definitely seen a difference in the appearance of my skin and the texture!
I was a little skeptical using an oil for moisturizer but this stuff works on everything! Smooths out skin, hair and nails. A little goes a long way!!

Ive used this for a week or so and already my skin looks and feels significantly younger. I was afraid to use it on my t-zone because I break out on my chin especially, but after reading the other reviews I decided to take a chance. I had even been using an acne product on my chin and nose but now I just use this amazing oil. Take a chance - its so worth it and this bottle will last a really long time.

This wonderfully amazing product has turned my dry, winter skin completely around. My skin was taking a toll from the extreme cold weather and I was feeling a little hopeless. After only a couple uses, I could see and feel a significant difference. My skin is smooth, hydrated, luminous and my pores even appear smaller. It does not leave my face feeling oily. I use it after I wash my face at night and apply a small amount just before my foundation. Miracle in a bottle!

I usually have normal to oily skin but I had nasty recurring dry spots. It was a tough winter on my skin so I was finding that overall my face was getting dry. Never happened before but it must be a combo of aging and hormones (had my second child in September). I tried a bunch of things like coconut oil, overnight moisturizers, switching up my moisturizers, etc. and then a friend recommended this oil. While I was waiting in line one day I saw the combo pack (cleansing oil and argan oil) and thought why not. The oils were small so I thought the sizes were perfect to just to try out. The argan oil was life changing. My dry spots have not come back at all. My face was not dry at all. My face never got oily and overall it just looked better. Like I said - AMAZING. My only regret is that I didnt discover it sooner.Ive seen the bad reviews and its such a shame. Some products just dont work the same for everyone. I will say that the oil is a bit pricey and Ive also seen a few reviewers comment on buying any brand of argan oil and it does the same. Trying to be smart and frugal, I made the mistake of purchasing the PFC (?) brand at winners about three weeks ago when I ran out of the Josie Maran oil. It was $8.00 CAN I believe. I thought to myself Eits 100% argan oil so whats the difference?E I completely regret that purchase. Theee weeks in I feel like it hasnt done anything for me. My skin started being weird and Im not sure if it was allergies, an allergy to food (I dont have any that Im aware of), or my normal skin being itself, but the dryness has come back and like I said this PFC brand is doing NOTHING for me.I am going back to sephora and spending that extra cash because I know that Josie Marans argan oil makes a difference for my skin. I dont know if I would be open to trying another brand again BUT I will stick with this for a while. What makes me curious is that if theyre both 100% argan oil whats the difference in ingredients? The smells were different and the consistency of the PFC was a little thicker. The PFC brand, when applied, feels and looks greasy for a while whereas the Josie Maran brand doesnt make me feel greasy.Anyway!!!!! Bottom like is that this stuff is WONDERFUL. Its a must have for me. I dont think I will ever, from this point on, be living without this stuff.

literally obsessed. my skin has been so dry lately with my acne medicine and i bought this and i will never stop. my skin feels so hydrated and bright in the morning, i totally recommend this product to anyone who has dry skin.
product_name: 100% Organic Cold-Pressed Rose Hip Seed Oil

review_text: Love using it a bedtime. Really locks in my moisturizer and gives me a nice glow.
product_name: 100% Organic Cold-Pressed Rose Hip Seed Oil

review_text: Feels great on skin when applying. Its not super greasy looking when first applied like other facial oils. Skin looks glowing in the morning when I wake up. Really enjoying this oil.
product_name: 100% Organic Cold-Pressed Rose Hip Seed Oil

review_text: All I can say is that this product has been nothing but amazing. I have received so many compliments about my skin after using this. I have oily skin, but despite that I do not feel like my skin is overly saturated. The smell might seem unpleasant at first but you definitely get used to it after a while. A little goes a long way, so it will definitely last.
product_name: 100% Organic Cold-Pressed Rose Hip Seed Oil

review_text: I wanted to try the whole face oils hype but was scared to use heavy ones that would add to my already acne prone face (hormonal acne). This one was affordable so I tried it and found it is light enough for me. I wear it each night just a few drops cover my whole face and neck area. I wear it after my gel based night moisturizer and my skin has never looked better. I get a lovely glow every morning without breaking out. Highly recommend. And can we add that the price is just AMAZING?
product_name: 100% Organic Cold-Pressed Rose Hip Seed Oil

review_text: Just as its name, I give Sunday Rileys eye serum E5 starsE. Ive heard wonders about retinol and niamicide as part of the night routine but I was not able to find the right product Id dare to try and Im glad I chose well! I love clean and conscious products. I really loved how easy it is to apply with its applicator tip, and how quick it absorbs. Ive been using for a week and I definitely feel the difference vs other eye serums Ive tried.

I love this eye cream. It does not irritate my under eyes at all and it has great ingredients. It pairs really well with my prescription retinol from the dermatologist. I will definitely continue to use it.

I received this product from Sunday Riley. The texture is creamy, smooth, and more like an eye cream than eye serum to me. I have oily skin but have fine lines under my eyes. It hydrates my fine lines and doesnt irritate my skin at all. I may apply another eye cream over it in the winter, but you actually dont need another layer in Summer/Fall.

Loving this eye cream! Im already a huge fan of Sunday A+ High-Dose Retinol Serum and have gone through 4 bottles so was excited to see them come out with a retinol eye cream. Aging and crepey eyelids and crows feet are a big concern for me because Im seeing thats where my mom and grandmother have aged the most on their face, so I take eye cream very seriously. This product is a bit tacky and thicker in texture compared to their A+ Retinol Serum. It does not sweat into your eyes at all which is something that a lot of eye creams do and it burns but no issue with this one! Its a bit strong, so I think will be good to use every other night.

The eye cream is thick when you put it on, but it isnt sticky or tacky. i Havent been using it very long, but my dark circles seem a little lighter and slightly less puffy. its hard to tell its effect on wrinkles, because my other eye cream already takes care of them and thats why i love it haha!
Love this so far. Mix with b hydra or marula. Love the whole DE line!

I wanted to be able to use this, I have tried retinol products in the past and have found them too irritating. I used this one a week, mixed with the same amount of the hydrating serum provided, for 3 weeks and I just cannot get past the irritation and redness, my face hurts. I will be returning. It obviously works for some based on the reviews, just not for me.

Some of the ingredients in this product will not work effectively because they are canceling each other out. If you want retinol to work its magic, you cannot have any AHAs mixed in with it, as this changes the PH of these two ingredients.

Does it work? Yes. Is it really strong? Heck yes. I am used to retinols, so I figure I could ignore the use instructions and just go to town. Nope, not at all! My entire face peeled and got super dry and extremely sensitive to anything but cold water. So follow the instructions and start using it once a week and build from that. Lather yourself on good sunscreen - that you should be using already. I got this bad reactions from using it every other day and two days in a row. After 4 days on just babying my skin, its all good. Youll see results with a few uses, dont get too excited and use two days in a row like I did. Patience goes a long way. Make sure to use a good rich moisturizer that suits your skin type.

I really wanted to like this, but it broke me out like crazy after two uses. After the first use I thought it was great, but after the second it was clear that it was wreaking havoc. All over my face now I have Erash likeE white heads. I mixed this with Protini and made sure to use a very small amount, but my skin just did not like it. Not for everyone. I would suggest patch testing it on an area of your face for a few uses to be safe.
This product is amazing. It did not cure my acne at all... but it is great for exfoliating and unclogging your pores from dead skin cells!!!

This stuff is amazing and such a great price and value! Makes my skin glowy and soft and burns off all the dead skin cells lol. I use this twice a week and cannot imagine living without it! Im not crazy about the smell but its not terrible. The red color helps me see where its been applied so thats nice!
Having received regular Glycolic chem peels from a spa, I found this product to work just as well at a fraction of the price.
review_title: Just as good as a professional chem peel

review_text: Wow. I have good skin, generally, but its been dry and a little lackluster. I thought Id mix it up and loved the reviews. Well -- I opted for 8 minutes having been warned that its strong. It left my skin a little dry but nothing crazy. Over the next day or two, though, my cheeks ERUPTED into the worst acne Ive ever had in my life. Like others have said here, its not normal acne and nothing like Ive ever experienced before. This is the only new thing Ive tried. Im uploading two photos, one of the day of the breakout and one two days after when I managed to get it under control. Im terrified of this stuff now. Haha!I would not normally classify my skin as EsensitiveE at all so I did find this surprising.If this happens to anyone else: Take two Benadryl and slather hydrocortisone cream on the affected area after cleaning it with something very, very gentle. Drink lots of water, get lots of sleep for a day or two.

Used this for the first time last night. My skin has never felt this smooth. Im now obsessed with The Ordinary!! I would recommend it to everyone. I have more of a sensitive complexion and was a little worried I would have irritation after using this peel. It didnt cause any irritation and left my skin feeling wonderful.

Great product! First of all the packaging itself is very luxurious. It has a great smell that to some people could be overpowering but it does not linger. It leaves your skin feeling super hydrated and works well at night or under makeup. I have sensitive skin and this product has not broken me out. I am loving the results from using. I was sent this product for testing purposes.
product_name: Abeille Royale Advanced Youth Watery Oil
chemicals: Carbon black (airborne, unbound particles of respirable size)

review_text: I absolutely love this item! I got this as a sample from Influenster to try and for me, it works wonders. My skin is super dry and this product helps hydrate my skin as well as make my skin look illuminating. I highly recommend
product_name: Abeille Royale Advanced Youth Watery Oil
chemicals: Carbon black (airborne, unbound particles of respirable size)

review_text: The water like texture of this oil is something I can really get behind. It didnt make me feel greasy when I put it own, but it left my skin feeling hydrated all day. In the course of a week or 2 I started noticing my face had a nice plump glow to it. This is the kind of luxury product that is really nice to have in the winter time when Im more dry.
product_name: Abeille Royale Advanced Youth Watery Oil
chemicals: Carbon black (airborne, unbound particles of respirable size)

review_text: This is by far one of the best, if not the best, serum Ive used. I have very dry skin and Ive learned that I need to use both water-based products and oil to make my skin happy. This serum is the perfect combo of both. Its also silicone-free which is a nice bonus. It leaves my skin very soft, hydrated, and overall healthy looking. I use it after a toner and before a moisturizer. I am prone to very stubborn clogged pores on my nose and chin and while this doesnt clear my pores, it doesnt make them worse either. The texture is very light and thin. It has little floating balls within it that breaks apart easily in your hands. Im not sure what ingredients are in them but it does work better when I make sure to include a few. I do find I have to shake up the serum so the balls are evenly distributed before I use the dropper. Now for the downside, this has a very strong perfume-like scent. I debated taking off a star for the fragrance but honestly this serum is so great I didnt. I have very sensitive skin and the fragrance hasnt caused irritation, it just smells strong. Its rare to find an expensive skincare product thats worth the money but Im on my third (maybe fourth?) bottle of this stuff and will continue to buy it. While expensive, one bottle lasts a few months and I use it twice a day, so it lasts awhile. If you have dry or dehydrated skin, I would definitely try this!
product_name: Abeille Royale Advanced Youth Watery Oil
chemicals: Carbon black (airborne, unbound particles of respirable size)

review_text: I received this product via vox box, it is amazing on the skin. Makes the skin glow and feels amazing. I have been using it for 2 weeks and its helped improve my skin.
product_name: Abeille Royale Advanced Youth Watery Oil
chemicals: Carbon black (airborne, unbound particles of respirable size)

review_text: The only neg thing I have to say is that if your looking for something that gets real sudsy, this is probably not for you. I
This is the only face wash that I will use. Everyone that tries it loves it. It cleans your skin without being too harsh. It makes my skin soft and smooth after each wash.

I have used Murad since I began using Accutane for my horrible acne. I no longer have to take the Accutane, thank God, since Im 37, but I will never give up my Murad. If you have oily skin, you need Murad, period.

I have a case of mild cystic acne caused by hormones. This cleanser has definitely made a difference in the size and frequency of break outs. It is a drying product that leaves a slight tingling feeling. I had to use a thicker moisturizer to combat dryer skin (if you use a lighter moisturizer your skin will create more oil to compensate hence more chances of break outs!). I will 100% be repurchasing it when its done but a little goes a very long way. Huge bottle and you only need a small pea size amount to get a good foam going.
LOVE how much it cleared my skin but i hated how difficult it was to spread on my skin, and that it is non foaming
Love this moisturizer!! Leaves my skin feeling very refreshed and not oily at all!! And also such a plus that this product is so eco friendly!!
product_name: Adaptogen Deep Moisturizing Cream with Ashwagandha + Reishi

review_text: This stuff feels like a nice, light moisturizer and I like the consistency and herbal scent. It might work well for someone with pretty healthy, normal skin. For my dry skin, it did absolutely nothing. I think its a bit of a joke to market this as a heavier moisturizer, it is simply not. I would also advise to be wary of the ingredients for those with sensitive skin, many can be irritants for some people - just patch test!
product_name: Adaptogen Deep Moisturizing Cream with Ashwagandha + Reishi

review_text: This stuff is no joke, and I cannot wait to use it during the winter months. Its a heavier and slightly thicker cream compared to YTTPs Kale and Spinach Moisture Cream. There isnt much of a scent, and the texture is super smooth. I feel it on my skin after using it, but it doesnt feel heavy or greasy. It makes my skin feel nourished and I couldnt stop patting my face at first LOL For summer, I think I prefer the Kale
product_name: Adaptogen Deep Moisturizing Cream with Ashwagandha + Reishi

review_text: I have that type of skin where the top layers are dry and theres a ton of oil underneath the surface. this product does a great job of moisturizing my skin without making me break out or feel greasy
product_name: Adaptogen Deep Moisturizing Cream with Ashwagandha + Reishi

review_text: I love this product. Lightweight, yet moisturizing.
product_name: Adaptogen Deep Moisturizing Cream with Ashwagandha + Reishi

review_text: While I dont have serious aging concerns at the moment (Im 25) I do like taking preventative care of my skin as well as tackling any issues like dullness and white heads/bumps. Ive been using this product for over s month and have found that using this serum makes my skin look brighter and more even textured. The product itself smells great and has a nice texture. I received this product for free for testing purposes.
review_title: If youre looking for a serum, try this one.
product_name: Advanced GAnifique Radiance Boosting Face Serum

review_text: I received this product to test from Influenster. It is a really light serum and I can see that in the morning my skin feels brighter and smoother.Ill keep using it to see if the change in the skin texture improves for real.
product_name: Advanced GAnifique Radiance Boosting Face Serum

review_text: Ive tried a ton, I mean a ton of products from different brands that promise the same results. LancA me is a very lightweight serum and its the first product I apply after washing and toning my skin. I always start with the lightest skincare product to the heaviest. Since using LancA me I have noticed that the appearance of my pores are smaller, if you can see them at all. My skin has evened out and looks healthy. A little goes a long way. I use the LancA me GAnifique eye cream as well. The two products works wonder together. I would buy this again and again.
review_title: A must have in my skincare routine.
product_name: Advanced GAnifique Radiance Boosting Face Serum

review_text: Awesome product! Love that it doesnt make your skin feel greasy. Leaves you feeling super soft and your skin looking bright and refreshed.

review_text: Genifique is definitely worth it- Ive had the 1oz for 3 months now and its probably not even half gone. Its soothing for skin irritations and also makes my skin feel silky. Its one of my favorite skincare products to date.
product_name: Advanced GAnifique Radiance Boosting Face Serum

review_text: Great anti-aging product for under your eyes helps diminish fine lines and wrinkles and also helps with puffiness

I received this complimentary in exchange for my review. Its a very lightweight gel cream and feels nice if you dont have any dryness or sensitivity. I accidentally used too much retinol near my eyes and the area got very dry. The cream stung very bad that time and I had to wash it off. Every other time using it was fine.

I started using this serum for about 3 1/2 weeks. I love the soft silky feel and it goes on super smooth. I can see an immediate difference in my fine lines and wrinkles. It feels like my under eye area is getting a fresh drink of water. After long term use I do see a slight difference! Im sure Ill see more of a difference the more I use it. I apply it after I wash my face in the morning and night.

This eye cream is lovely. The texture is really nice and it moisturizes well. It does seem to reduce fine lines, I have been using it for 2 weeks now and noticed a difference. However, it could do more for puffiness. I did receive this from influenster. Would I repurchase? Eeeehhh, maybe.

I was gifted this product to review. Such a nice formula! Not greasy, not heavy, a little goes a long way. And the difference in the skin around my eyes is amazing. I highly recommend trying this product. It has a steep price tag, but can be worth it for something that really works.

I received a week sample of this product from the influesnter campaign. I used it every night as recommended and the only difference in my skin is that it made it extra sensitive to every other product Ive used.
product_name: Advanced Night Repair Synchronized Multi-Recovery Complex Duo

review_text: Great serum . Very lightweight left my skin smooth. Doesnt have a scent which is good for those that are sensitive. Absorbs nicely into the skin. Dont have to wait to long for it to dry.

review_text: Received a sample from #influenster yesterday. I put it on last night and my skin felt moisturized and tight this morning.

review_text: I received a deluxe sample of this product from influenster and I have been applying it to my crows feet area and between my brows and I cant believe how youthful and vibrant my skin looks now! I want to buy the full size and start using it on my whole face. Highly recommend!

review_text: I love love my face to feel clean and the liquid facial soap does the job and more

review_text: I received this cleanser as a gift about a month ago and decided to try it in place of a proactive cleanser I have been using for a long time. I have acne prone skin that dries very easily and have never really found a cleanser that works for my skin. I love this cleanser! I havent had any breakouts at all and it gets my skin squeeky clean, yet it doesnt dry it out. My husband even commented the other day on how great my skin looks. I am absolutely hooked!

review_text: After finding out I could use this on my eyes without irritation I was thrilled. It does not remove all of my eye-makeup, but Ive never found a cleanser that does. It is non-drying and non-irritating.

review_text: This is my new favourite! I think it makes my skin smoother and I have acne and I feel it reduces my acne as well. I have been using it for maybe a month.
product_name: All About Clean Liquid Facial Soap

review_text: i have used both the mild and oily formulas of this soap and it feels absolutely amazing on your skin! i love washing my face with this soap and it really helps clear up my skin. ive been pretty lucky to be blessed with good skin, but i would get breakouts really badly during my period. since i started using this a few years ago, i have completely eliminated any breakouts and have only had a handful of pimples. it really does work. it lasts a long time since you just need one pump for your entire face. if you get the oily formula, make sure you have oily skin, not combination, otherwise, youll get some dry spots (get rid of them with hydrocortisone cream)

review_text: I have used Clinique all about eyes for yeas and love it. I seldom worry about my eye makeup smudging but more than that, it feels very cool and soothing going on.I seldom have issues with puffiness and/or dark circles, so not sure if it is because I use this regularly or just lucky :-)
So far, this has really worked on my eyes a lot!It hasnt even been a month yet and I already see my dark circles disappearing.. my skin seems so much more smoother now! :) Recommended! <3
Not as creamy as All About Eyes Rich and doesnt seem to moisterize as well either.

i love this eye cream. generally, i havent been a huge fan of clinique but i really like this eye cream. i cant use overly thick eye cream due to milia so ive been looking for a gel-like eye cream that is moisturizing but light. this eye cream does the trick.
I like it, I havent really seen any durastic results but its makes my skin really soft and feels great and it refreshing.

I didnt know I needed an eye cream until my mom gave me a sample of this. Suddenly, I was hyper aware of how dry my eyelids were despite how oily my skin is! Ive always been one to be skeptical of things promising to brighten and tighten eye skin, but this does that quite well, too! a little goes a long way, too!

review_text: when choosing a eye cream i am looking for something more rich, since my eye area (the lids/cease) can get very drying. so i love how this cream is able to combat my dry areas and also hydrate my eyes. so its a great product for moisturizing my eye area.

Its rich and creamy without being greasy. Ive used it regularly for a few years and just turned 30. My friends are starting to complain about fine lines around the eyes & I am not. It doesnt completely eliminate my dark circles, but I have allergies and have tried virtually every product that claims it does eliminate circles--none of them have worked, but this does help.

review_text: I havent seen much of a difference. No help with the puffiness either,but its quite creamy therefore, hydrating hopefully.

review_text: Dr. Dennis Gross Skincare Alpha Beta Extra Strength Daily Peel is incredible. I love how strong and gentle the product was at once. The product was gentle enough for my sensitive skin, but really exfoliated, smoothed, brightened, and cleared my face quicky. This is definitely my favorite peel. You can really see the change in your skin fast.
product_name: Alpha Beta Extra Strength Daily Peel Pads

review_text: I am in LOVE with these peel pads!! Theyre the best thing for at home skin care I have EVER used. Im 32, NEVER had acne or blemishes in my ENTIRE life until I hit 30 and let me tell you! It has been the absolute worst!! Nothing and I mean nothing has helped clear up my face and the scarring is just terrible! I want to cry everytime I look in the mirror but this magical product has given me some hope! I havent been breaking out as bad since I started using them and I totally noticed a difference after just one use. I have never notice a difference after one use with any product Ive ever used across the board. The only thing I dont feel great about is the price point but I guess since it is so magical and works wonders it is definitely worth that price. I will absolutely include this in my skincare routine and let everyone I know about them. They dont burn or anything its just crazy to me how it just works. You dont see your skin E peel no stinging. I mean I dont even really have a ton of redness so it really does work wonders. If youre on the fence about buying these, get them, you will not regret it.

review_text: This product was not right for me. I bought a sample pack of 5 and used them all consecutively over 5 days. I have never had an issue with acne - other than an occasional minor pimple - and I just turned 40 years old. Ive used other products by this brand and love them. This, however, made me break out like a teenager. And I dont have sensitive skin. I developed small red bumps/whiteheads all over my chin, jaw line, cheeks and neck. Ive never experienced anything like it (lucky me). Its the only new product Ive applied to my face, so I know its this product. I recommend trying the smaller sample pack before investing in the full size. It may work well for others, but not for me.
review_title: Skin looked "younger" but not in a good way.

review_text: I have pores, pitted scars and oily/combination skin. I have spent a lot of money trying to reduce pores, scars and oil. After only ONE USE I can see a HUGE difference. This is like magic. I wonder what will happen after a month use. Pricey but so far seems more than worth it.

review_text: Actually life changing! Was worried that my skin would be too sensitive for these but they are a dream and make my skin feel and look amazing. Worth every penny.

review_text: Ill probably buy the 30 pack with the bonus 5 pack because its the Best Buy. I love this formula. Im in my early twentys probably dont need to spend a bunch of money on treatments for my face but I just like what this one does. Its worked for me and I think anyone who has random breakouts should use this product because I never got a breakout after using these. Bang for your buck!
product_name: Alpha Beta Universal Daily Peel Pads

review_text: Im getting VERY close to 50, so seeing fine lines, uneven skin tone, etc. These pads are a nice, quick, easy way to exfoliate/resurface. I did see a difference in my skin after using them.

review_text: i got this as the bday gift. Ive heard the ingredients in this product like glycolic acid are supposed to be good for your skin, but not mind. Didnt have breakouts prior to using this product but do know. I like how it cleans and was hoping it would do good for my skin but didnt.
