Gentle yet effective cleaner for oily acne prone adult skin and some anti-aging benefits. My husband really loves it
Absolutely love this line by PTR . This Cleansing Wash is great for all over your body . It lathers very well .
so far so good.....he loves the face wash. he states that his face feels cleaner and refreshed
I really like how light this is and it feels very refreshing, especially in this hot humid summer! I feel like my skin is hydrated after using this. I have liked everything Ive tried by Belif!
product_name: Aqua Bomb Brightening Vitamin C Cream

review_text: I was so excited to receive this product as Im already a HUGE fan of alllll belif Aqua Bomb offerings.. and let me tell you: I was NOT disappointed!! Im absolutely in love with this cream and its become my new favorite skincare staple! Its gentle enough to wear regularly, and Ive noticed definite improvement with the hyperpigmentation on my cheeks and eye contour area- so Im obviously super psyched about that! Last but certainly not least; the product itself lives up to its namesake and literally feels like luxury on your face; not at all gel-y or sticky or suffocating to the skin E" it literally feels like a drink of ice-water to the face, PLUS all the added benefits of Vitamin C!! 10/10 ~ Highly HIGHLY recommend ~
product_name: Aqua Bomb Brightening Vitamin C Cream

review_text: I love it , it makes my skin feel so refreshed before I sleep and when I wake up.
product_name: Aqua Bomb Brightening Vitamin C Cream

review_text: My skin is dry so this cream wasnt hydrating enough for me. If it was someone with combination or oily skin- think theyd like it as it is quite light and refreshing feeling. I didnt see any brightening effects either but I think youll have to use it for longer consistently to see any result. At least it didnt break me out.
product_name: Aqua Bomb Brightening Vitamin C Cream

review_text: Love that it is clean, it has an amazing smell and it absorbs so well!
product_name: Aqua Bomb Brightening Vitamin C Cream

review_text: This product is fantastic - Melts my makeup off in seconds and leaves me so soft and smooth after! Highly recommend for anyone who struggles to get heavy eye makeup off.
I received this free from Influenster for testing. Its very creamy and melts quickly. It is gentle. It takes off all of my makeup. I appreciate that it has clean ingredients.

To preface this review, I have tried both the Carmack Green Clean and Clinique Take the Day Off, and this cleanser did the best job at removing my waterproof makeup. This makeup remover removed all traces of my stubborn waterproof makeup (including my waterproof mascara!) All of my makeup was removed before I even moved on to my second cleanser! I would definitely recommend this for anyone looking for a great oil based cleanser. Note: there is a strong fragrance that smells like citrus and menthol so if you are irritated by fragrance this may not be the product for you (however cleansers are only on your skin for a very short time so you may still be okay)

I received this product complementary of Influenster. I used my make up wipes to get off most of my make up and followed suit with the balm. This balm glided so smoothly in my skin. It aided with even removing off the extra glue residue on my lid from my eye lashes. It left my face feeling very cleansed and cool. Definitely would recommend this product after a long day as an addition to ones night, skincare routine.
This product has a lovely blue hue and smells amazing! My skin is combo skin and this seemed to dry it out a bit. Im going to continue to try and see if my skin adjusts.

The overnight lip mask was very hydrating! The texture is sticky (almost like a stickier version of Vaseline). There was no strong scent! I wish it can with some sort of mini scooper or spoon to scoop it out instead of using my fingers!

Ive been using this on my lips every other night or so and I can definitely call this a solid lip mask. It provides me with great moisture and it feels incredible on the lips. When I wake up the following mornings, my lips feel so juicy + nourished and soft. I also love that it stimulates blood flow in my lips and gives my lips a punch of stunning, completely natural rosy color, as my lips are usually so colorless and pale looking! Love love love!!

This is a great product! I received a small sample and was kind of disappointed but a little goes a long way - this is obviously great as an overnight lip mask but Ive found myself using it during the day especially now that its the dead of winter. This worked within 2 uses and my lips were DRY!

This lip mask feels great! Its thick enough to last through the night, but doesnt feel sticky and greasy all night. I will see it takes consistent usage to notice a difference on your lips, it isnt a one night miracle cream.

Ive never tried a lip mask before, and I dont know how I went so long without it! I put this on at night, and I wake up with my lips feeling so smooth and hydrated! I no longer get chapped lips, or any skin cracking. Ill be using this from now on!
I have the sample of it and I LOVE it...its the best cleansing Ive ever used to remove my make-up.

I was skeptical at first since adding oil to my already oily face seemed wrong, but I love this product! I am prone to breakouts with so many products and I have used it for almost a month without redness, breakouts or excess sebum (oil) on my face. It leaves your face soft, clean and feeling great. The key, however, is to apply it to a dry face with dry hands first, rub it in (including eyelashes to get makeup off) and then add water to rinse off. I tried it with a wet face and it does not clean as well. Will definitely buy the larger product when I run out of this one!

I have combination skin that is also sensitive and was having a huge problem finding the right cleanser that didnt dry out my face. I started using this cleanser having already started using the organ oil (which I also loved). This product is amazing. I feel like it changed my life in a small way. My skin has been fantastic ever since I started using this. It is gentle, smells amazing, and moisturizes all at the same time. Love it, and will continue to buy!

I have tried numerous face cleansers, even EnaturalE ones, but they all left my face kinda red and I would often break out. This stuff cleanses well, but isnt harsh and Ive noticed my blemishes/redness disappearing as well as no new breakouts. ITS A CHRISTMAS MIRACLE.

Im not gonna lie I used to hate this but thats because I didnt understand how to use it! Shake it up and mix in palms first!! It takes off whole face and leaves skin clean but not stripped! Dont ever stop making this!

I purchased this at the end of winter and used it at night on my face along with my night moisturizer. I still use it a couple of times a week at night even though I live in a pretty humid climate and its been very warm lately, I like to use it along with a lighter summer moisturizer at night and I put it under my eyes as well. I think it has a very light citrusy smell when you first put it on but completely disappears after a few mins, Im extremely sensitive to fragrances and get migraines, but this has never bothered me. I like when I wake up in the morning after using this because it absorbs well overnight and makes your skin glow. I actually keep it in my refrigerator so the cream doesnt melt to much and stays fresh.
product_name: Argan Infinity Cream Intensive Creamy Oil

review_text: This is my go to spot treatment. I dab a little on acne at any stage, and by the next day its almost gone. A tube lasts me about a year - which may not be sanitary but I definitely get my money worth. It also works great at hydrating, I use it on my lips, face, and hands when I need a little extra boost. If i had to chose only one product to use for the rest of my life this would be it.
product_name: Argan Infinity Cream Intensive Creamy Oil

review_text: I wanted to write a NON-SPONSORED review for this product. I purchased this, I did NOT receive it as a gift from the brand. I use prescription retinoids and acids for acne so my skin is VERY VERY DRY. I was looking for a ridiculously thick and goopy moisturizer to bring moisture back to my skin... but unfortunately this is not it...yes its oily, but it seems to just sit on the skin and I dont feel that I wake up with more hydrated skin. 3 stars for the smell though...I love the smell!
review_title: oily/greasy + sits on top of skin
product_name: Argan Infinity Cream Intensive Creamy Oil

review_text: Initially loved Josie Maran Argan Infinity Cream Intensive Creamy Oil as it makes my mature skin hydrated and radiant. Product seems to have turned to pure thin oil. I have placed it in the refrig this AM to see if it reconstitutes to its previous consistency.
product_name: Argan Infinity Cream Intensive Creamy Oil

review_text: My skin feels so moisturized after using this creamy oil. It really helps with my dry skin . Love that this product can be used in multiple ways. Definitely recommend trying this creamy oil!
product_name: Argan Infinity Cream Intensive Creamy Oil

review_text: The packaging and look of this product feels quite luxurious. Its hard to tell if it really works, especially since I dont have super puffy eyes, but it really does feel good and does seem to brighten my under eyes. I started using it both day and night, but I dont think its worth using at night. I like using as part of my morning routine under makeup.
product_name: Auto Correct Brightening + Depuffing Eye Cream for Dark Circles

review_text: The best eye cream! I started using this eye cream couple of weeks ago and already seeing great result for the puffiness and my dark circles! Sunday Riley never disappoints!
product_name: Auto Correct Brightening + Depuffing Eye Cream for Dark Circles

review_text: I am on my 4th bottle, this was my first product from the brand, and I am hooked. There is an obvious difference in my appearance when I do not use (as in my boyfriend, who is often begrudged at the time spent applying skincare, tells me I look tired when not applied). I have since converted to a loyal Sunday Riley fanatic.
product_name: Auto Correct Brightening + Depuffing Eye Cream for Dark Circles

review_text: Amazing!! I absolutely love this eye cream. Instantly makes me look more awake and adds moisture. I will be purchasing a 2nd bottle!
product_name: Auto Correct Brightening + Depuffing Eye Cream for Dark Circles

review_text: I love this eye cream. I actually had an allergic reaction to another eye cream and once that rash healed I was left with tons of tiny lines that werent there before. A Sephora consultant helped me and she felt it was just dehydrated skin that was leaving those lines and recommended this eye cream to undo what the other eye cream had done and for moving forward. After 3 uses I noticed a significant improvement. Now a week later those new lines are almost entirely gone from this great moisturizing product. Also I experienced stinging the first few uses because of how dry my under eye was but now that has stopped. Super happy. I have highly sensitive skin and am thrilled to have finally found an eye cream I can rely on.
review_title: In love with this eye cream.
product_name: Auto Correct Brightening + Depuffing Eye Cream for Dark Circles

review_text: This product is great! Its a thick cream so a little bit goes a long way. Its great for sensitive skin and hydrated your under eye area. I noticed difference as well in dark under eye circles and reducing fine lines.
product_name: Avocado Fine Line Eye Cream with Retinol

review_text: I received this as a complementary sample from Voxbox and oh my gosh this is my absolutely favorite new eye creme! Its so nice and hydrating and I have noticed over the past month of using this that my eyes have been less puffy!
product_name: Avocado Fine Line Eye Cream with Retinol

review_text: I normally believe all eye creams are hype, marketing, and unnecessary...except for this one. I woke up with brighter and less puffy eyes. Also, the milia under my eyes is starting to fade. I have been using this for around 4 nights. Dry, sensitive skin E" and no irritation from the retinol. I highly give this one a try! This is the only eye cream that actually make a DIFFERENCE, unlike other eye creams.
review_title: Wow, this eye cream ACTUALLY makes a difference!
product_name: Avocado Fine Line Eye Cream with Retinol

review_text: Super creamy, decadent and moisturizing. Plus it comes with a little spoon to help you scoop it out!
product_name: Avocado Fine Line Eye Cream with Retinol

review_text: Ive loved using the Avo Retinol Eye Mask. I really enjoy that you can use it as a sleeping mask, or during the day. While it is thick and creamy, it didnt clog up my skin or cause it to drag. I have dry skin that likes to clog if there is too much EcreamE in products, but my skin has loved this product! I def recommend! I did receive this product complimentary for testing!
product_name: Avocado Fine Line Eye Cream with Retinol

review_text: I received this complimentary from Glow Recipe in exchange for my honest review. Let me start with the packaging. Glow Recipe always kills it with the packaging. I absolutely love the glass bottle, color, and the pump. I also love the fragrance. It all makes me want to use the product. I like this serum. I have a lot of redness from hyperpigmentation. It didnt get rid of that immediately but it toned down my overall redness. It is also very hydrating. I really enjoy this product!
product_name: Avocado Soothing Skin Barrier Serum with Ceramides

review_text: FIRST IMPRESSIONS:I have very oily skin and was concerned that this wasnt gonna work for me. Ive been using a retinol serum so my skin is a little easier to irritate and is more red than usual. Let me just say this feels absolutely amazing. Its so silky smooth without being sticky or oily and it reduced my skins redness A LOT in just one use. Its veryyyyyyy hydrating and soothing. Wow. If you have oily acne prone skin like me that is pretty sensitive and red you will LOVE this. This is my first glow recipe product and I will definitely be ordering more
product_name: Avocado Soothing Skin Barrier Serum with Ceramides

review_text: Its a lightweight gel-like serum that will be absorbed so quickly and leave no tackiness or any feel to the skin. After the application, the skin feels so soft and smooth. The scent is a mix of healthy vegitable scent. It must be the natural result of the various extracts and oils they used. It would be the perfect serum for summertime and/or oily skin type. I received it complimentary from Glow Recipe for my reveiw.
review_title: For Summertime and/or Oily Skin Type
product_name: Avocado Soothing Skin Barrier Serum with Ceramides

review_text: I have dry skin in I most definitely noticed it hasnt been as dry when I use this with my moisturizer I like how my skin looks after it absorbed into my skin quickly which means I needed it badly lol I love this product I gonna keep using it, this is my first serum because I didnt think it was necessary. I was gifted this item by the brand
product_name: Avocado Soothing Skin Barrier Serum with Ceramides

review_text: I got this because my skins moisture barrier was wrecked due to winter weather and I was hoping the ceramides would help my skin. Ive found that it did to a certain extent help but that it really wasnt as relieving as I had expected it to be. Then, like all things with niacinimide in the ingredients list, it started to break me out and give me tiny pimples on my cheeks that went away when I discontinued use. It may not work great for my skin but I can see it being good for people whose skin actually agrees with niacinimide. Another note though, this bottle will not last more than a month with frequent use. I used 1-2 pumps, twice a day for 2 weeks before my skin started to disagree with the product and Im already halfway through the whole bottle. Even if you do one pump once a day, I think this product will run out extremely quickly, so its just not cost effective.
product_name: Avocado Soothing Skin Barrier Serum with Ceramides

review_text: Not very hydrating. Its sticky and my skin feels tight after applying it. Not a fan
product_name: B-Hydra Intensive Hydration Serum with Hyaluronic Acid

review_text: Love this product! It makes my skin looks instantly refreshed and sits well under makeup! Definitely my favorite skincare product!
product_name: B-Hydra Intensive Hydration Serum with Hyaluronic Acid

review_text: This was the one DE product that I was skeptical about. I honestly thought I didnt need any additional hydration since I tend to be on the oily side & I was already using Protini & occasionally an oil. Once I started Passioni in addition to an exfoliating serum, my face started to feel dry, tight & sometimes even flaky ... B-Hydra SAVED my skin!! Its made such a huge difference that here I am writing this rave-review. Seriously, if your skin is experiencing any sort of dehydration ... this will be a game-changer!
product_name: B-Hydra Intensive Hydration Serum with Hyaluronic Acid

review_text: This is my first Hydrating serum. I dont have anything to compare it with. I have very dry skin and nothing could quench that thirst. I felt dry after 3-4 hours of applying a moisturizer. This serum on using feels like a burst of water on the face. It cannot be used alone as a replacement for moisturizer. On pairing it with a moisturizer it works like magic! I use 2 pumps B-hydra serum + 1 dollop protini + 1-2 drops marula oil and it really changed how my skin felt. As a line DE is definitely very expensive but I just love how it feels. It works!!
product_name: B-Hydra Intensive Hydration Serum with Hyaluronic Acid

review_text: Best moisturizer ever.Ive used this for few month, and I love the formula!But its too expensive, so I changed my moisturizer.After a month later, I couldnt find any other moisturizer its better than this, I came back to this. This is my go to moisturizer!! It makes my skin really hydrated and not oily.I love everything of it but the cost.
product_name: B-Hydra Intensive Hydration Serum with Hyaluronic Acid

review_text: I received this product free for testing purchases by Influesnter. I have dry skin, so this line isnt perfectly suited for my skin type. However, this particular product in the line wasnt as drying as I expected. If I use this on top of the cleanser, its way to dry and my skin feels stripped. Ive taken to using this every other day, and I feel like my skin is clearer and it feels a bit firmer/tighter. It has a strong Eucalyptus scent, and this products scent is even stronger than the others in the range. The scent doesnt bother me, but I know some people are sensitive to it. I think this is something people with oily skin would enjoy, so give it a try!

I received this product to review from Influenster. The eucalyptus smell is amazing -- reminds me of a spa. The toner makes my face feel a bit sticky afterwards, but it keeps the afternoon oily T-Zone away. I definitely think this should be used in conjunction with the facial cleanser and moisturizer to see the full effects. My skin looks radiant and is becoming more clear everyday.

I have oily (but dehydrated) skin that shines within an hour or two of washing, and not in a good way. Oily skin and large pores run in my dads side of the family, so I know I wont ever completely shake it. While I enjoy the fresh smell of this toner, it really hasnt done much for the oiliness. I think it refreshes my skin following a cleanser, but thats about it. It didnt really do much to tone my face in general, regarding my pores and texture. It also didnt, however, make my skin any worse, so I guess theres that plus.I had high hopes after the multitude of good reviews and a desperate dream that this would be my holy grail. Unfortunately, I cant justify the price for how little it has done for me personally. Everyones different, and while this might work for you (I recommend getting the sample size first if you can), for me, its a no-go.
I received this complimentary for my reviews, but I cannot rave about it enough! Smells amazing and leaves my skin feeling so tingly and clean! My pores have gotten noticeably smaller!
I was pleasantly surprised by this product! I feel like every single toner I have tried, leaves my skin dry and uncomfortable. The Olehenriksen toner was minty and my face felt tingly refreshed.

Okay, Ive found my new moisture cream for night! This pairs well with my routine of barrier + skincare from SkinFix. The container itself is great as the press-down pump helps to ensure the product stays sanitary in between uses without wasting product. My skin has felt instantly hydrated and I love the lipid barrier which helps to lock in those layers of added moisture to wake up with baby soft skin. I like using this at night before bed.

Beautiful light-weight moisturizer that is hydrating and very gentle on the skin. I love the packaging, makes using it super easy. A little goes a lot way so even one pump is too much! I love the creamy texture of it and how radiant it leaves my skin. Perfect for an everyday moisturizer! I would definitely repurchase this product!

I love this product Ive used it for two years now and I was excited to see that they made a refill to cut back on waste. However when I put my refill in it did not pump the cream into the top as it should. I tried taking it out and putting it back in several times several different ways all in vain. I love the idea of this but the mechanics do not seem to work once a refill put in. I hope skinfix resolves this issue.

I love all the skin fix products, Ive been using this peptide cream & it didnt let me down. This peptide cream is so hydrating & fragrance free which I love. I definitely recommend this & the rest of their products.

I was gifted by skinfix for my honest and unbiased opinion.I have to say that I am in love with this rich moisturizing cream. I like the design of the jar which also includes a pump. Which is slightly different concept. This cream really helps skin to restore after sun damage and stress. I love the slight fragrance its not overpowering. It makes my skin really smooth and radiant. I was able to get rid of all the sun damage with the regular use of this cream. It helps in reducing redness and irritation. Provides skin with all the essential nutrients needed to ease aging as well. I massage my forehead with this cream regularly to help me with the wrinkles too.I had no irritation or redness after using this.My skin is somewhat dry and this really provides great hydration.I am impressed that this works. I was initially skeptical but now I am happy that its worth trying ! Rich and thick much needed for winter!
this product is amazing. it just makes your skin feel good and refreshed. i love using this. I keep it in my skin care fridge and its truly life changing.
product_name: Beauty Elixir Prep, Set, Glow Face Mist

review_text: This smells great but the smell fades after about 10 minutes, which is good- you dont want to stink. the smaller size of this same product is perfect for travel. I keep one in my desk to wake me up in the afternoon.
product_name: Beauty Elixir Prep, Set, Glow Face Mist

review_text: I really dont think I can live without this product. It refreshes my face whether I have makeup on or not. I feel like the more I use it the faster my blemishes heal and it really does give a natural glow to the face. Its also a great product to set makeup. I actually use it on everything! Ive used it on razor burn and it halped sooth m y irritated skin. This is the second bottle I buy so I def recommend it!
product_name: Beauty Elixir Prep, Set, Glow Face Mist

review_text: Its very refreshing. I like using it after a shower or after washing my face in the summer. It smells and feels minty, leaving my skin cool and refreshed. However, Im not sure this does anything for my skin. I dont notice smoother skin, tighter pores, or radiance. I think you have to use this constantly to see any results. My skin is pretty clear, so its sort of a waste for me to continue using this product.
product_name: Beauty Elixir Prep, Set, Glow Face Mist

review_text: At the first spray I didnt like the smell and I had a very interesting feeling on my skin because of the mint, but after that my skin became smooth and I liked that.
product_name: Beauty Elixir Prep, Set, Glow Face Mist

review_text: I received a sample of this product from Sephora and truly liked it and decided I purchase a full-size jar. Its helping to eliminate dark circles and puffiness.

I love this stuff I just got it and I was lucky enough to received this product as a free sample to try and goodness is it amazing the scent is pleasant but not to strong and the softness under my eyes is amazing it is smoothing and so hydrating I highly recommend trying

I have been using this product for two weeks now. This eye cream moisturized my eye area very well. I have used other eye creams brand like La Mer, LancA me, Sk2... they all about the same. As long as my fine lines not getting worse, I considered they have worked. But this Shiseido eye creams price beats them all. Although my under eye fine lines have not been improved dramatically, which is within expectation anyway. I dont think any eye cream can fix real wrinkles, they only fix dry lines. The price tag is reasonable for the results.

I have been using this for about three months now and I can really tell a huge difference. Im only 29 but started using for the small lines under my eyes and to prevent future lines. It has smooth out my very small winds and my eyes look refreshed when I use this.

I really liked this product. I found it very moisturizing and I suffer from dry and sensitive skin. It does have a dewy finish so I ended up using it all over my face when not using foundation. Ive found it does contribute to a more youthful / less puffy appearance for me throughout the day.

Got some samples of this with the 100 point gifts. Came back for the full size. Yes, its pricey but the bottle is quite large - leaves my skin feeling so clean and bright. I use it with either a) my Clarisonic by wetting the head with some warm water and then dollop a dime size amount onto it or b) I use my exfoliating gloves to scrub with this cleanser. definitely my new favorite cleanser!
VERY drying. my face was so dry it started to itch. I had to send it back.
review_title: Disappointed for the first time with DE.

review_text: Ok, I received this product as the birthday gift from Sephora along with the moisturizer and I can honestly say this is the worst cleanser I have ever tried. After using it just one time I developed the most painful cystic acne on my forehead and all over my t-zone. I continued to use it because I thought that I was just getting acne from something else but the acne continued to get worse. I decided it might be this cleanser so I stopped and literally within like 2-3 days my skin was completely back to normal. Long story short, If you have acne prone skinE"I DO NOT recommend!

I like a couple of the other DE products so I was excited to try this as a sample. The second I put a little of the cleanser on my cheek, it started to burn. I tried washing it off but then the burning just spread. The glossier jelly cleanser also gave me a similar reaction but cetaphil is still a favorite. Im currently contemplating dipping my face in milk as I write this review to see if thatll calm the red hot feeling, no joke.
Definitely one of my favorite cleansers. Its so gentle on the skin, yet I get that nice deep clean I need.

This product was gifted by Fresh for an honest review. Im a huge fan of fresh products and was excited to try this. I have been incorporating this to my nightly routine and I love how lightweight and it absorbs nicely onto the skin. It also has a nice smell and I can see a huge difference in the texture and look of my skin. Its been two weeks and my skin looks more radiant. I also love the ingredients, cant wait to see how my skin looks in the next few weeks.
product_name: Black Tea Anti-Aging Moisturizer with Retinol-Alternative BT Matrix

review_text: I was gifted by Fresh the best anti-aging cream. lm very picky about moisturizers and their consistency. This moisturizer is my ultimate favorite lve ever tried in my life!!! Just using this product for about a week and my skin texture and hydration has changed tremendously! I was breaking out from my skin being so dry and now I am literally the definition of glowing!
product_name: Black Tea Anti-Aging Moisturizer with Retinol-Alternative BT Matrix

review_text: This was gifted by Fresh. This cream feels super luxe and rich as soon as you apply it. Its left my skin feeling super moisturized. My skin is more on the sensitive side and prone to rosacea flare ups so I did notice a bit of redness after applying, but nothing too serious.
product_name: Black Tea Anti-Aging Moisturizer with Retinol-Alternative BT Matrix

review_text: Gifted by Fresh for an honest review. Let me start off by saying that this product feels luxurious. The packaging is a heavy glass and it looks beautiful on my vanity. The product also smells fantastic, though the fragrance is a bit much since I have sensitive skin. It feels moisturizing on the skin but does leave me red. Im not sure if its the fragrance that is a bit irritating or what it was? I love that this is formulated without retinol so I can use it in conjunction with my tretinoin rx. Would I recommend this? Yes and no. Yes if it is fragrance free, but also no because I do feel as though Ive used more moisturizing and plumping products that were much easier on my wallet.
product_name: Black Tea Anti-Aging Moisturizer with Retinol-Alternative BT Matrix

review_text: This product is so high quality and feels amazing on the skin. I love the ingredients, they are all super beneficial to the skin. I appreciate that the brand is cruelty-free and clean. I have not noticed striking results from the cream, but I hope to soon! It is perfect and moisturizing for winter. I do think it is a bit overpriced though. I received this complimentary from Fresh.
product_name: Black Tea Anti-Aging Moisturizer with Retinol-Alternative BT Matrix

review_text: This mask works wonderfully for hydrating and calming my skin. Im generally oily and acne prone, and it always leaves my face feeling fresh and calmed. There is a strong herbal fragrance, but because you only need a very small amount for your face, it isnt overwhelming at all once its on. Because it goes on thinly, it will also last you a long time.
product_name: Blue Tansy BHA and Enzyme Pore Refining Mask

review_text: I hardly write reviews but this one deserves high praise in my books. I have oily, textured,large pore, cystic acne skin with rosacea. (Mouthful, I know) adding this to my skincare (which is extremely simple) was a game changer. It immediately calmed down my skin, prevented break outs, and decreased the look of my pores. Ive tried using it every day and its perfectly safe and never aggravated my rosacea. Now I really use it about 3 times a week. The smell is pretty EherbyE but I dont have a problem with it especially after seeing the results. I owe my great skin to this beautiful blue creature. YOU DONT NEED A LOT!!!! A very thin layer, let sit for 20 minutes and gently wipe off with a washcloth & POOF!!! Beautiful skin. I will continue to purchase this forever.
review_title: holy grail for oily acne prone skin
product_name: Blue Tansy BHA and Enzyme Pore Refining Mask

review_text: Just going to say this mask is amazing! It does everything it claims to do. I havent been this impressed by a skin care product in a long time. This has really great ingredients and you can really feel it working (no burning or itching). I would by this mask over and over again! Im definitely going to check out more from Herbivore. I recommend this for every skin type!!!
product_name: Blue Tansy BHA and Enzyme Pore Refining Mask

review_text: The difference in my skin is so noticeable the day after I use this mask, I look like a different person. I have moderate to severe cystic acne and this mask clears it without irritating my dry and sensitive skin. Its a life saver and Im in love!
product_name: Blue Tansy BHA and Enzyme Pore Refining Mask

review_text: This product is effective, in that it noticeably exfoliates the skin such that it is smoother and glows the next day. Importantly, it doesnt irritate my highly sensitive skin (and basically everything irritates my skin). However, over the past year or so, the company has started to water down the products -- I guess to save money. This makes the product extremely runny and difficult to apply without spilling it all over the sink counter. Not to mention the fact that the little spatula they include for scooping is rendered completely useless. Just charge us slightly more for the real product, rather than forcing us to use an inferior product. Very disappointing.
review_title: Good product but recently watered down
product_name: Blue Tansy BHA and Enzyme Pore Refining Mask

review_text: Love legit all of their products so was excited for this lip butter. It leaves my lips fry and crusty with that weird cast off towards the I side of my lips - reminiscent of the Bonne Bell of the 90s. This was not it for me.
review_title: Lips are extra dry and crusty

review_text: Favorite Lip Balm of all time. Great for flying, beach, winter, you name it. Wont let you down.
I bought this because I love the smell & to match with the body care line. Its moisturizing but I wished that itll last longer on the lips.

I use this at night right after a lip exfoliant and I am amazed at how well it keeps my lips plump and hydrated. It smells great, which matters to me. Yes, its pricey, but Ive not had to deal with chapped lips all winter!

Its good... I think it stays on the lips well, great when youre out in the sun. Only thing from giving it the fifth star was the scent although lovely is a bit overwhelming under the nose and its pretty big packaging to put on the lips ( minor complaint though)

I love this product! The best way to describe it is refreshing! I always keep one in my purse and now that the weather is getting warmer I bring it with me when I lay out in the sun! Theres no downfall to this product, its a must have!
product_name: Brumisateur Natural Mineral Water Facial Spray Travel Duo

review_text: I love this product. I take it everywhere with me and it so refreshing on a HOT summer day. It also makes a great gift!!
product_name: Brumisateur Natural Mineral Water Facial Spray Travel Duo

review_text: I use this product to moisten my make-up brush for wet eyeshadow application. I love it.
product_name: Brumisateur Natural Mineral Water Facial Spray Travel Duo

review_text: i love this product and is a definite must have. i keep one on me in my purse and one in my kit and its perfect for on the go moisture and refreshment. the only downside is that once its low, it doesnt mist as well.
product_name: Brumisateur Natural Mineral Water Facial Spray Travel Duo

review_text: Ive been using evian water sprays for a couple of years now. I live in florida and its super hot here all year round. this handy thing is always in my purse and i spray all over my face whenever i feel dry. its a MUST HAVE if you wear make-up everyday like myself. its super hydrating and i cannot live without this!!!
product_name: Brumisateur Natural Mineral Water Facial Spray Travel Duo

review_text: Complimentary from Drunk Elephant Ecomm - There are so many things about this product that excites me. First off the PR packaging for Drunk Elephant is insanely adorable, the graphics and bright colors added to the anticipation upon receiving. Regarding the product itself it is virtually weightless while also being fast absorbing, you barely notice you put it on at all. It is extremely potent formula carries 15% of pure vitamin C packed along side, antioxidants, the essential nutrients all working together to help firm and brighten your skin. I would 100% recommend this product to anyone looking to find a new Vitamin C Serum to their everyday routine.

First thing is first, I have to say I loved mixing this myself! Not only does it feel fresh but I know that Im getting the most potent formulation. As far as the impact to on my skin it applies like a serum and absorbs fast! I didnt notice an immediate change in days 1-5 but after about a week I did start to notice some subtle changes in texture of my skin. Im excited to continue to use this and see my results!

I received this product complimentary from Drunk Elephant to try out and review, so here are my thoughts after 2 weeks of use : First of all, I really love the component and packaging. I think itd super smart that it comes as a separate powder and liquid that you can mix together when youre ready to use it. This will definitely help keep the product stable and fresh for longer! I also really like the brightening results Ive seen from using this product. I use it once a day in the morning and it reallt does make my skin looks glowy and bright and healthy! The only downside is that its pretty expensive and you only get <1oz of product, so Im not sure how long it would last you before having to buy another.

Ive used this serum for a couple of weeks now and it really brightened up my face. I love the idea of mixing it up yourself so it doesnt oxidate. I use it at night and follow with moisturizer. I dont really mind the smell like other reviewers stated. The most important thing is that it works.*gifted by Drunk Elephant Ecomm

You can tell that the ingredients in the serum and high quality and so far it has helped even out my skin tome and brighten dark spots. The overall texture of my skin has improved since adding this is. The only think I didnt like is that I had to mix the ingredients like myself. It felt like a science experiment that I was forced to do. Gifted by Drunk Elephant

I absolutely love this product! Ive been using it for about and week and a half and it doesnt irritate my sensitive skin! It also leaves my skin glowing and so moisturized! It has an amazing orange sherbert scent as well.

I was really hoping this product would live up to the hype...and it did! This moisturizer smells so yummy and is very hydrating. It is also super light and not heavy on the skin. It sinks in well and leaves my skin slightly tacky - perfect for make up application. I enjoy this best in the morning. Ole never disappoints!

You guys I got this product complimentary and free to review from influenster and my honest review is I am SO in love! It smells just like a creamsicle and I have dry skin, especially right now Im having a dry patch and this product has done amazing things. I use it in the morning and at night after using ole henriksen truth collagen boost and my skin felt so so smooth and hydrated! I would highly recommend and I will definitely be purchasing again and again!!

I am in love with this product. It smells like orange sherbet and it makes my skin feel great. And unexpected but pleasant surprise is that it has made my pimples clear up. I had some problem zits on my cheeks for two weeks and then when I started using this they started to dwindle immediately. It has a thick consistency so a little goes a long way. I also have combo-oily skin and it doesnt make my skin feel greasy! Hope this helps.

This moisturizer is amazing! I love the way it feels on my skin! The smell is great. My face feels so smooth! The packaging is cute and inviting. It really catches the eye! Its best to use this after cleansing your face. Before, I was using a daily hydration moisturizer. After using THIS moisturizer, theres no going back! This moisturizer is on a whole other level and I love it! Its a 10 for me!* THIS IS A SPONSORED POST; INFLUENSTER PROVIDED THIS PRODUCT TO ME AS A MEMBER OF INFLUENSTER.COM. * I WAS NOT COMPENSATED FOR MY POST; HOWEVER, I DID RECEIVE A SAMPLE FOR MY REVIEW. ALL OPINIONS ARE MY OWN AND NOT INFLUENCED IN ANY WAY.

I want to preface by saying I dont have any severe under eye complaints, but for $64 I wasnt too thrilled with this. Im not opposed to investing in great products, but this felt very standard and normal. Applied nicely into the skin, but one pump was far too much product which I dislike - DE should be able to create packaging that helps me use their product correctly and efficiently. I didnt see any brightening effect after finishing a bottle, and it sat fine under concealer but nothing to write home about. Overall, not a bad product, but not worth the cash and not something Ill buy again. My quest continues!
I really enjoyed this eye cream! It made the area under my eyes look brighter and refreshed!
I have very dry under eyes. This product is very hydrating. I dont have puffiness or dark circles so I cant comment on that but they do seem brighter.
Im always on the hunt for an amazing eye cream and this was just okay for me. While it did nourish the skin under my eyes, i didnt notice any brightening or firming. Just alright.

I dont say this lightly- this eye cream is freaking fantastic. I definitely would recommend this product if youre struggling to find a solution for stubborn under eye circles. I have terrible dark circles under my eyes caused by thin skin and allergies (mostly, although im sure more sleep couldnt hurt...) Ive tried so many eye creams to help brighten and plump my skin and none of them have had any visible results until C-Tango. I received this product as a sample via an online order. Ive been using this for a week now every morning and evening, and I can honestly say that my under eye circles have been slowly fading! Usually I need foundation and like 3 layers of concealer to even remotely hide those suckers, but this stuff is truly helping a lot. I have sensitive skin, and although other reviews say this is not for sensitive skin, I have not had any issues with this product at all. Its a creamy texture that absorbs quickly, and leaves no residue so you can layer makeup easily over it or wear it to bed. A little goes a long way too, so even though this is a bit pricey, this should last you quite a while. I will absolutely be purchasing this full size once I run out of the trial- give it a try!
I used one bottle and didnt do much if at all. It only glowed my face when applied. Its so expensive for such a small amount. Maybe I dont need this product.
Yall...I dunno. I know for sure that it is *not* worth the price. Fades quickly, and ran out before I knew it. I would not recommend.

Im so glad I get this amazing Vitamin C serum was gifted by Sunday Riley. I used it in my day time routine. It works perfectly with my other skincare products. After I use it for a week I feel my skin brighter and softer. Ill keep using it and recommend to everyone
Received this in a Sunday Riley gift set and this is a GEM! Ive gotten compliments on how pretty my skin is. I recommend her whole line from facial cleanser on down..

I purchased this product in May/Mothers Day Weekend, lasted three months. I used this in the a.m. w/good genes & the c.e.o. oil. I experienced random breakouts on the side of my chin. When purchasing this product, I was told to be weary of breakouts. I do feel like the combo helped with my hyperpigmentation, but also created new scars, due to the breakouts. I will not be repurchasing this product at this time... maybe in the future. The Good Genes is amazing, the whole line is amazing... no regrets. For $85.00, I think I can find a cheaper vitamin C w/o the breakout.

I tried this product for free for my review, but honestly I am now a fan and would totally pay for it! Ive never purchased makeup from the internet for fear the color would be terrible but this matches perfectly, I like that it really covers all my freckles and wear it beneath my foundation. This product does not make your skin oily and washes off easily! I used it for swim lessons and it prevented sun burn (but its not waterproof).
product_name: CC+ Cream Oil-Free Matte with SPF 40

review_text: For a CC cream the coverage is amazing! I use it on days I dont want foundation but need some coverage. It definitely has a matte finish to it but I need to set it with powder for it to last. Ive even worn it for family pictures and liked the way it looked on my skin. I use a damp beauty blender to apply, and sometimes just my fingers if Im in a rush. Overall this is a good product with great coverage!
product_name: CC+ Cream Oil-Free Matte with SPF 40

review_text: Goes on smooth, pores instantly look smaller, stayed put pretty well in 85 degree weather. Ii was really worried about color not matching my complexion, Ii ordered the closest color to my skin even though Im a little brighter than what Ii chose. Luckily for me, the Tan is actually lighter than portrayed online. They could benefit making more color variations however
product_name: CC+ Cream Oil-Free Matte with SPF 40

review_text: I have acne prone skin and when I moved to Dallas from Seattle, I knew I needed a foundation that was matte thanks to the humidity. I was recommended this by a woman that works at Sephora and Ive never hated a foundation more. It WOULD not stay on my skin. My skin was more oily than ever as well! I tried using different techniques and no matter what it looked like crap.
product_name: CC+ Cream Oil-Free Matte with SPF 40

review_text: Love that I can use this as a tinted sunscreen or a full coverage foundation. Im VERY oily, but the ingredients in this CC cream help me not be shiny so quickly and when I do, its not as much as I have been with other products. Its super light and I even forget that Im wearing product whether Im using as a sunscreen or foundation. I can even use with a powder and its not heavy. I highly recommend anyone with oily skin to get this. Ive used this in several diff places during summer and it has lasted all day. Even through sweat, when blotting, it stays and doesnt look like I was sweating.I received this product for free in exchange for my honest review.
review_title: Works in CA, NV, AND TN heat!
product_name: CC+ Cream Oil-Free Matte with SPF 40

review_text: I love it I use it all the time help get me up in the morning

This serum claims to reduce puffiness and dark circles, but I found it only to reduce puffiness and it does so very effectively. I personally dont believe a product can reduce dark circles (at least mine) because I think it has a lot more to do with genetics, diet, sleep, etc. I still think this product is amazing though. It really helps with puffy eyes. The downside is it can also dry the skin around the eyes and make the area look more aged than before. I found using a hydrating eye cream over the area after applying the serum really helped bring back moisture. However, Im not sure how clinically effective the serum is when used this way. In my experience it still reduced puffiness. But Im not sure how layering skin care around the eyes works...I assume its the same concept as layering skin care on the entire face. I definitely recommend this serum but be warned it may cause some brutal dryness. Maybe I shouldnt be using it, but hey, it works!
review_title: Reduces Puffiness At A Great Value

review_text: For the price you cant beat it! Im in my third trimester so sleep is not really a thing and I have really dark bags as a result, I feel like this helped with the dark circles, not completely eliminated and didnt do much for the lines but made enough difference to make me happy especially at this price, there is a lot of product in the purchase!

This product gives me life!!! Seriously. My eyes went from looking zombie-like to alive-like. Ive had significantly dark eye contours and eye bags since I was a kid. I also have deep inset eyes so that heightens the dark bits. For once, I feel like they are lightening up. I gave up a long time ago trying to diminish my dark circles/contours to be honest, but I gave this a shot when I learned more about the brand. Plus with that price point its pretty easy to try it out! My eye area looks brighter overall but most noticeably in the area alongside my nose, which has been the hardest to fix. Its a very light consistency and a little goes a looong way. Im pleasantly surprised by this and have definitely bought more.
review_title: Now a staple in my beauty regimen

review_text: Been using this for a couple weeks now. This stuff is potent, feel tightening around my eyes instantly. Decrease puffiness like no other! I dont find it drying at all and works very well under my make up than my other eye creams. In fact, it lessens the amount of makeup creases into my under eye. I think those who have creasing issue is due to makeup technique not the product itself. Only 4 stars because I dont notice any difference with my dark circles.
This didnt do anything for me. It didnt depuff and it dried out my under eye area a bit. I was hoping the caffeine would have an affect but it did not.

They clearly state that dark under eyes and/or puffiness could be genetic. And it goes on to say this product can not fix that genetic issue. Huge fan of honesty and from the companyE"keep up the great things. This product is great for actually reducing puffiness. My darkness is unfortunately genetic. But for the price I think it is still worthwhile.

As the parent of an 8 month old, not only am I sleep deprived (like lots of people) but I had to stop wearing glasses and switch to contacts because of grabby fingers (probably not the reason for a lot of people). Unfortunately the sleep deprivation makes my eyes really puffy, so its hard to get my lenses in. Enter this product! I had never used an eye cream before but this one is a game changer. I keep it in the fridge and 5 minutes after applying I can get my contacts in much easier than I could have before. Will definitely be keeping this on hand as long as they make it. The dark circle reduction is a great bonus.
it works okay and wrinkles did go away, but it did sting my eyes
This eye cream is fantastic! It sinks right in and plumps the wrinkles away!

rubbing my face with a cotton ball dipped in alcohol would not dry my skin out as much is this wash did. but alas all of our skin is different but ladies and dudes please get a sample of this first to see if you like it
product_name: Checks and Balances Frothy Face Wash

review_text: Not a good cleanser, felt like toothpaste on my face
product_name: Checks and Balances Frothy Face Wash

review_text: It leaves my skin feeling tight. Not for me.
product_name: Checks and Balances Frothy Face Wash

review_text: I got this as a sample and tried it out for a week. It made my face feel squeaky clean and then my skin began peeling.
product_name: Checks and Balances Frothy Face Wash

review_text: I got this as a sample and was really excited to use it, but like some of the other reviewers mentioned, this leaves an uncomfortable film on your skin. It goes on smooth and creamy, but thats where the good ends. I immediately washed it off with another cleanser. It felt squeaky/nails on chalkboard uncomfortableness.
product_name: Checks and Balances Frothy Face Wash

review_text: I dont usually use a foundation or colored base layer, but I really like this formula. It evened out the tone and coloring of the skin on my face really nicely. I like the matte finish- and REALLY appreciate the spf 30. It lasted all day! I received this as a free sample, but will buy in the future.
product_name: Cicapair Tiger Grass Color Correcting Treatment SPF 30

review_text: I was looking for something to correct my redness that I could just put on and go without foundation. This is perfect. It took a little getting used to because its thicker and I wasnt putting it on correct at first so it looked a little cakey. But once I figured out what amount and how to spread it looks perfect. Corrects my redness and gives me enough coverage to feel comfortable showing my face to the world.
product_name: Cicapair Tiger Grass Color Correcting Treatment SPF 30

review_text: I like how this product makes my skin look. It does help with evening out my skin tone, and let me skip foundation as it gives a light foundation effect. The reason why i give this only three stars is that it is really hard to take this stuff off my face at the end of the day (just as any other korean bb and cc cream). This cream is very thick, and clog my pores . Fyi, i always double cleanse my face with shu uemura oil before using face wash. Still, when using this product, i need to add one step of micellar water cleansing on top of my double cleansing routine. I once used it for three days straight, and i feel like i have never seen my pores so big and my blackhead so full of dirt. On the other hand, i love the tiger grass serum, and would rather use that and a bit of concealer to achieve the same efficacy and skin finish.
review_title: i like it but... not worth the hassle
product_name: Cicapair Tiger Grass Color Correcting Treatment SPF 30

review_text: Love this day cream. It does a really good job at color correcting and evening out skin tone. Not sure if it helps reduce blemishes/irritation though but I think it does a little bit.
product_name: Cicapair Tiger Grass Color Correcting Treatment SPF 30

review_text: Tried all the EgreenE corrector products but always just settled for the better of the bunch. Kept seeing CICAPAIR on Tik Tok....bought it...LIFE CHANGING!!!!!!!!!!!! I love everything there is to love about this product.
review_title: TIK TOK MADE ME BUY IT!!!!!!!!!!!!
product_name: Cicapair Tiger Grass Color Correcting Treatment SPF 30

review_text: LOVE LOVE LOVE !!! I have very dry skin and a few dark spots on my cheeks. Ive been using this for about a month and wow it has changed my skin so much. Not only does my skin look more dewy/hydrating, but it lasts all day. No need to reapply. This is perfect for those who want to wake up hydrated asf ! Definitely, purchasing it once I run out. EI received this product as a free sampleE and I received this product for free or complimentary for testing purposes.
Really didnt do much for my skin. The product itself is chalked full with a bunch of unnecessary ingredients. If you have sensitive skin I would avoid.

I received this product free of charge from Influenster in exchange for my honest review. I have gone through countless tubes and pots of cream due to my sensitive and dry skin, but I have really fallen in love with Dr. Jarts Cicapair Tiger Grass Cream. It absorbs quickly and completely with minimal tapping in, which means that I dont risk irritating my skin and dont have to deal with a sticky face. I love how well it sits under make-up, since that means I can wear this cream during the day. I have also noticed that my skin feels smoother and looks less red and much calmer since I added this product to my routine.

Its a nice moisturizer but I dont know if it does much in the way of helping with redness. With other products in this line, the soothing effect is almost instant and they feel great on my face. This seems just like any other face lotion but with a green tint to it.
this has become my absolute favourite cream!!! my skin gets easily irritated so this takes away all the redness snd makes my skin feel super moisturized

This is the only product in Cliniques 3 step Skin Care System that I was very, very iffy about, as I am when it comes to most toners. This product is heavily alcohol based which can be a) drying and b) cause oily and combination skin to get worse. Not to mention menthol and witch hazel.. both ingredients which can be potentially irritating. I used this product for a few months before finding that eventually it either made my skin worse (dry at times, oily at other), or stopped having any effect at all.If you must use this, use it sparingly. Personally, I found it to be too harsh when used along with the Clinique Facial Soap (mild).

Wow this product is pure alcohol nothing else. As soon as I put a drop in a cotton pad, it smells strong alcohol, gives me headache immediately :(. Too bad I cant even return this product right now. So I just wasted my money on this product :(. Never buying it again. I do not do not recommend this product to anybody.

My title says it all. Ive been using this clarifying lotion #2 since I was 17, for 10 years now. I started using this when I developed acne and I felt the difference after the first day. I stopped breaking out as much and I use it every day before I put on makeup and at night after I wash my face. I apply my favorite benzoyl peroxide gel afterwards. It does not dry your skin and is gentle. I also got my friends and family using this after I saw them waste money on trying different drug store brands that didnt work for them. They all said its worth it. Skip all the other products and give this a try!
Cliniques Clarifying Lotion 2 is a wonderful product. It cleans off excess makeup and dirt my makeup remover doesnt it got. It leaves my skin feeling clean and refreshed without over drying it.
i had really dry skin (to the point where if I tried to exfoliate it would burn) i used this and it took away all of my dry skin
Cant live without them now , they are always in my purse in case. And god they did remove left over on my red nars lipstick stained lips, they pass the test !
My favorite makeup wipes! Love the green tea scent and they never break me out. The exfoliating side is no joke though.
Light and clean feeling, not sticky or harsh to my face!! I love the coconut its one of my favorites..
This might actually be the best thing Ive ever bought from Sephora, so refreshing and smells fantastic!
I definitely recommend this wipes for heavy makeup. The exfoliating side really removes and gets in the pours. And the other soft side is great for around your eyes
So glad I bought the small one to try. It does nothing good for my skin, instead it left more blackheads. Or is there some special means to rinse the thing off?
product_name: Clear Improvement Active Charcoal Mask to Clear Pores

review_text: I really liked this!It helped clear up my forehead pimples a lot!!Definitely will repurchase!
product_name: Clear Improvement Active Charcoal Mask to Clear Pores

review_text: One of the few products on the market today that I honestly consider a Holy Grail. As far as charcoal products go, this is one of my all-time favourites. I have sensitive, acne-prone skin, but its gentle enough that I can use it weekly to control oil production and keep my blackheads at bay. The product is smooth yet thick, so application is quick and drying only takes about 15 minutes. The results are instant and noticeable - it leaves my entire face feeling and looking refreshed. I LOVE this mask!
product_name: Clear Improvement Active Charcoal Mask to Clear Pores

review_text: I would highly recommend for anyone with oily skin.
product_name: Clear Improvement Active Charcoal Mask to Clear Pores

review_text: I cant get enough of this mask - from my first use, my skin feels softer and my tone more even. Ive been using it regularly along with the Sephora Precision Pore Cleansing Pad my pores are honestly tighter and aside from the occasional imperfection I dont think my skins ever looked so vibrant and beautiful.
product_name: Clear Improvement Active Charcoal Mask to Clear Pores

review_text: I absolutely love this moisturizer. I dont have a lot of acne but get breakouts on my chin and forehead every once in a while. I also suffer from texture in those places. After using this moisturizer just once, I woke up the next day with significantly less texture and the breakouts that I had were much smaller. This also eliminated any redness from the breakouts. After a week of using this once a day, Im still in love! My texture is basically gone and I havent had any new breakouts. I did receive this product free for testing purposes but that doesnt change my opinion.
product_name: Clear Improvement Pore Clearing Moisturizer with Salicylic Acid

review_text: So I first started using this and I thought I was going to be hooked but its not the product for me. I breakout occasionally and I feel like this is a good moisturizer for controlling breakouts. My issue with the formula is that after it has sat on the skin for a few minutes, it feels almost powdery yet the face still feels moisturized which is so bizarre. And adding to that, if you glide your fingers across your skin, the moisturizer starts to ball up and roll off on your fingers. Definitely not a good first impressions using this moisturizer. But other than this, its a good moisturizer for someone who breaks out and this could be more so a nighttime treatment moisturizer. I received this product complimentary for testing purposes from Influenster.
product_name: Clear Improvement Pore Clearing Moisturizer with Salicylic Acid

review_text: I love this moisturizer! It works so good and really makes my skin feel hydrated without feeling oily or looking greasy.It make the blackheads on my nose go away and become less noticeable.I received this product complimentary for reviewing purposes but the thoughts are all my own! I recommend!
product_name: Clear Improvement Pore Clearing Moisturizer with Salicylic Acid

review_text: I received this from Influenster to test out and I think this is a great product for people with oily skin. However, i have very dry skin and find this moisture to not be as hydrating as my skin requires. I do love the concept and the scent!
product_name: Clear Improvement Pore Clearing Moisturizer with Salicylic Acid

review_text: Origins has done it again. I never second guessed this product, its clean, its refreshing and leaves your face feeling polished. The added bonus is the smell! I would definitely use again. I got lazy and didnt use it for a few days, guess who has a pimple? this lazy bum
product_name: Clear Improvement Pore Clearing Moisturizer with Salicylic Acid

review_text: I was so excited and intrigued to try this! It glides on so smooth and leaves the skin feeling hydrated and not sticky. I went over my face twice to make sure I had adequate protection (Im still new to figuring how much spf i need). I had no issue applying makeup over this. It also didnt make my skin look oily or greasy. I thought this was a quick and convenient way to apply sunscreen and I would consider repurchasing! I cant speak to the HeatForce and WetForce because I only wore this on my face since its winter and thats the only skin showing. However, my parents did test this out while skiing and they were impressed by the formula and the performance! Both have the signature citrusy Shiseido smell, that I dont mind. I like that this is reef safe. Im very impressed by both of these products and I would definitely recommend, especially for under makeup
so cute and feels so nice on the skin. you def have to make sure to keep it clean if ur applying over makeup but its so easy and good for the lazy lazy girls

Influenster sent me this awesome sunscreen stick for free, and I would highly recommend it. The effectiveness and the way it melted into my skin was amazing. I didnt notice any strong chemical odor when using it either. The stick itself was very solid but it went onto my skin easily and evenly so it lasted a long time.
review_title: No greasy feeling and spread evenly

review_text: Such an awesome facial sunscreen stick! It goes on clear, no issues with any white color at all. Its literally invisible! Its hydrating and you can tell its truly good for your skin and will not clog up your pores! Its very easy to use and I just stuck it in my makeup pouch. Love that its free of parabens and all the nonsense! You can tell its high quality!

I loved this sunscreen. Personally, I would definitely recommend this stick over the bottled sunscreen. It is light, easy to apply/reapply, and worked well with my cream based makeup routine. I will definitely purchase this again in the future.

Love this clay mask. I got this when it was Sephora 100 point perk. After a week I felt and saw a huge difference. My pores were smaller, redness was lighter and left my skin smooth and brighter. I will for sure purchase the larger size. The cooling of the mask is very refreshing.

If youre looking for a good mask that compliments all skin types, I highly recommend checking this one out. My skin tends to be quite dry but I get oily in my t-zone. This mask felt cool on my skin but didnt make my face feel really tight/dried out like most masks do. After I rinsed it off, I did notice my skin had a healthier glow and my pores looked smaller the next morning. The package also comes with a brush which was perfect for applying it. I received this mask complimentary in exchange for an honest review.

Fresh! Clean! Glowing! This product is just so wonderful, it a 15 minute clay mask that works like no other thanks to its key ingredients (clay, snow lotus, and Alpine Willowherb Extract) your skin is left cool, soft , smaller pores, and this awesome glow. Truly what more could a girl/guy ask for really? Lets not forget about the wonderous application brush though it makes applying the mask a breeze and clean up is quick and easy! Slather this mask on do your thing for 15, wash it off with cold water, and apply your favorite moisturizer. The Voila you can say bye bye to those pesky pores! I received this product for free or complimentary for testing purposes.

This mask feels so good when you put it on, I loved the cool sensation! Was not as pleased with how my skin felt after as its for more oil proned skin. I felt like it dried me out a bit, but was pleased overall as I received this to try for free.

This mask is great for reducing oil and I did see a minor reduction in the size of my pores. The colour is super fun and the cooling sensation is very relaxing. I have combination skin and this mask left my skin feeling a bit dry and tight so I definitely wont recommend this for those on the drier side. I received this product complimentary from Influenster for testing purposes.

i always enjoyed using IT cosmetics products and Confidence in a Cream exceeded my expectations. It feels so soft, hydrating and my skin feels very supercharged. I use it twice a day and it is gentle enough for my sensitive skin.
product_name: Confidence in a Cream Anti-Aging Hydrating Moisturizer
