chemicals: Titanium dioxide (airborne, unbound particles of respirable size)

review_text: I have had hereditary dark circles my whole entire life. In every baby picture, in every elementary school photo, in every single photo in which I am not wearing copious amounts of concealer, they are there. Even with layers of shape tape concealer, I cant fully cover my dark circles. For the last 15 years of my life, I have tried creams, oils, lotions, elixirs, retinoids, serums, in an endless search to find ANYTHING that can reduce the appearance of my circles. Absolutely nothing has worked anywhere near as well as this tiny tub of avocado angel kisses. I had heard so many good things about this eye cream but I sincerely didnt want to waste my time and money on yet another product that doesnt work. I paid no mind to it until I happened upon a sample and in 3 days I was HOOKED!!! I have never seen such dramatic results as I have with this cream. Even on days where I get little or restless sleep, this cream saves the day. I have finally found my holy grail of eye creams! I no longer look like Ive woken up after a long night of partying and a couple of shiners to my eyes. I cannot rave about this cream enough! Im in love!!! It is worth absolutely every single penny, especially for the amount you get in just the .5 oz. If you are on the fence, I highly recommend getting a sample and trying it before you buy it as everyone will not have the same results as me. But I will continue to purchase this for ever and for always as I am just STUNNED at how well this works. 100/10 - HIGHLY RECOMMEND ladies and fellas!
review_title: After 15 years, I've finally found THE eye cream!

review_text: Its almost too thick. Is there a trick to using it.? my eyes are very sensitive, so its really not for me.

My skin can handle just about anything. However, after using this product I started to develop Milia underneath my eyes. Not a good look! After removing different production and through deduction I realized it was this eye cream. Obviously too rich for my skin. FYI I am 47, comibination skin. (Oily in T-Zone only.) I will stick with my Clarins Ginzing.
love this product, i have super sensitive skin and it always makes my under eyes less red

I have extremely sensitive dry skin. This felt amazing as soon as I applied with no reaction from my skin. It applies thick but feels amazing once blended in and wears well under my foundation/concealer.

I wanted to try this for a long time and finally decided to get it. My skin is sensitive and couldnt find the right moisturizer but this one does amazing job my skin is soft and it smell good. Its worth what you pay for.
product_name: CrA me de la Mer Moisturizer

review_text: Great for hydrating. However, there are other creams at a way cheaper price that will be more efficient.
product_name: CrA me de la Mer Moisturizer

review_text: Ive been using this cream for over 15 years and Im so happy its at Sephora now and that I can stock up during the VIB sale. This cream is thick and heavy and not good for the day but it does amazing things for me as a night cream. I always wakeup with smooth and moisturized skin. Definitely overpriced but it works for me :)
product_name: CrA me de la Mer Moisturizer

review_text: It was ok. I was expecting a miracle to happen on my face for the price of this face cream. I think philosophy miracle worker and hope in a jar cream are a better. I just didnt see what the big hype is about. Same your money.
product_name: CrA me de la Mer Moisturizer

review_text: Many years ago I used La Mer to help my skin with intense dryness due to an acne product. After this almost a full year of quarantine, my skin has been a mess and nothing seemed to help until I tried this old friend again. My constant flaky, dry, miserable looking skin is soft, supple, and looking so much better. Its worth every penny and then some.
product_name: CrA me de la Mer Moisturizer

review_text: I have been using this product for years. Since the pandemic, I usually mix it into my sunscreen and bypass foundation altogether since Ive been wearing a mask at work anyway. It gives the perfect sunkissed glow and you can adjust the intensity very easily. Ive also used it to save foundations that have ended up being slightly too light for me. This is a winner in my opinion.
product_name: D-Bronzi Anti-Pollution Bronzing Drops with Peptides

review_text: This really is like sunshine in a bottle. I use it with my favorite moisturizer and it gives my face and neck a nice subtle sun kissed glow. I will definitely continue to use! Perfect for no makeup days!
product_name: D-Bronzi Anti-Pollution Bronzing Drops with Peptides

review_text: I combined this with my Laniege serum and didnt even feel like putting on makeup. Love it.
product_name: D-Bronzi Anti-Pollution Bronzing Drops with Peptides

review_text: I truly do not understand this product. I received a complimentary gift of this, hydra b and protini. They told me to mix them all together in my hand and then apply to my entire face. Who would want bronzer all over their entire face??? Bronzer is meant for contouring or for giving your nose and cheeks a sun kissed look! Its not meant to make you look like youre wearing a mask because now your face doesnt match your neck! Plus after applying all three products my skin was horribly dehydrated after only a couple of hours. Out of this whole line (and I have tried everything) I have returned almost every product. Tatcha is far superior in every way. And buy yourself a regular frickin bronzer. Not this junk.
review_title: Glad it was a free sample
product_name: D-Bronzi Anti-Pollution Bronzing Drops with Peptides

review_text: I got a sample of this and now I can NOTTTT live without it!! I mix it with my Coola sunscreen and it gives me enough color to go without foundation if I want. I love that I can use it on my shoulders and neck if my spray tan is a little blotchy....and get perfect bronzing that is the perfect shade! Ill be honest I have no idea what else it does, but the non transferring color...and the fact it doesnt feel sticky, and mixes well with my foundation or serum or sunscreen..thats all I want it for!
product_name: D-Bronzi Anti-Pollution Bronzing Drops with Peptides

review_text: Perfect! And dimethacone free! Even some of the other more natural moisturizers still have dimethacone in them which Im allergic to! Farmacy has the best products all around!
product_name: Daily Greens Oil-Free Gel Moisturizer with Moringa and Papaya

review_text: I bought this moisturizer for my 20 year old daughter and she said its the best moisturizer shes tried yet. She has extremely oily skin on her T Zone and dry skin on her cheeks and this moisturizer has made her skin feel amazing. The gel consistency is great for the oiliness and moisturizes the dry spots. Shes tried many skin care products and this one is definitely her favourite. This moisturizer also makes her skin look nice and glowing. Please Farmacy make more products dedicated to oily skin.
product_name: Daily Greens Oil-Free Gel Moisturizer with Moringa and Papaya

review_text: I received this product complimentary from Farmacy Beauty. The packaging on it is absolutely beautiful. The container is glass and so nice and heavy and recyclable! The only thing I dont love about it is the opening on the pot is smaller than the body of it so I can imagine that itll be hard to get product out when Im nearing empty. The product itself is really nice! It smells great - sweet, with a citrus smell that kind of reminds me of key lime pie! It doesnt linger after soaking into your skin though which is nice. The gel texture is really refreshing and lightweight and I find it does a great job at moisturizing and layers well under makeup. Ive only been testing this for a few days but so far I really like it! It has some great ingredients like niacinamide which I love, so Id definitely recommend trying this out for oily/combo skin gals. #greensforall @farmacybeauty
product_name: Daily Greens Oil-Free Gel Moisturizer with Moringa and Papaya

review_text: This is my bougie neutogena hydro boost gel cream- the smell is amazing! Perfect for my acne prone skin
product_name: Daily Greens Oil-Free Gel Moisturizer with Moringa and Papaya

review_text: Farmacy Beauty. The daily grees gel moisturizer is absolutely amazing. It comes in a little cute jar and its easy to open. The application is a breeze goes on smooth and smells great. It leaves your skin feeling hydrated and not oily at all. Its a keeper in my house. #greensforall@farmacybeauty
product_name: Daily Greens Oil-Free Gel Moisturizer with Moringa and Papaya

review_text: This Dermalogica Daily Microfoliant Exfoliator is my favorite. It is easy to use and apply. This leaves my skin feeling so soft and clean. My skin looks bright and clear after the first use. I received this product free complimentary for testing purposes.

wanted to love this product. the first few days I used it I really liked how smooth my skin felt! after the first few uses though I broke out in little pimples all over :( it took me back to the days of apricot scrub. sadly this had to be thrown out

What can I say about this product? Its not the first time that I used so you can know that I love it. It has helped me so much, my skin is so bright and clean and all the dead skin is not with me anymore

This exfoliator was so gentle but effective! I love using it the day after a retinol application to help slough off any dry skin. It left my skin feeling so soft without being dehydrated, which is a big win for me. This was complimentary from Dermalogica Sampling.

This product was gifted to me by Dermalogica Sampling. This was something new to me and I was skeptical. I was pleasantly surprised with how soft my skin was after! I like the new concept of this exfoliant. I have sensitive skin and it did not irritate.

This sunscreen is amazing! I needed a good sunscreen while Im using retinol and now its just become a good habit every morning anyway! This sunscreen is super light, blends in beautifully, doesnt leave a white cast or make my skin oily at all!
product_name: Daily UV Defense Invisible Broad Spectrum SPF 36 Sunscreen

review_text: I have no idea why, but most sunscreens Ive used irritate my eyes. This one doesnt! Its gentle and works great, I do wish they made a fragrance free version but at least it smells good! Use this if youve noticed sensitivity with other sunscreens!
product_name: Daily UV Defense Invisible Broad Spectrum SPF 36 Sunscreen

review_text: this sunscreen is of great quality for the price. it takes a bit of rubbing in for the product to fully absorb. at first, it leaves an extremely dewy almost greasy finish but after 15ish minutes the product looks more skin-like. overall its a good sunscreen for 15 dollars however there are sunscreens feel better on the skin for higher price points.
product_name: Daily UV Defense Invisible Broad Spectrum SPF 36 Sunscreen

review_text: Makes my skin Dewy and hydrated look. I have dry skin so I used a lot of hydrating skincare and this doesnt pill over all my skincare. It works wonderfully with it. Its a creamy texture with a dewy finish (Ive been searching for this for a while now!) doesnt really have a smell to it that made me notice it at all. Overall one of my top fave along with the fenty moisturizer with SPF.
product_name: Daily UV Defense Invisible Broad Spectrum SPF 36 Sunscreen

review_text: I recieved this as a complimentary from Innisfree and it works good! I felt protected and didnt worry about the sun! I use this product several times a day after exposure to sun like it says. I would recommend this product for anyone.
product_name: Daily UV Defense Invisible Broad Spectrum SPF 36 Sunscreen

review_text: I received this item complimentary for my honest review. And well, The scent alone is very pleasant. Smells like pie but not too sweet. The consistency is great not thick but not to thin. Leaves your face soft and smooth. After a few days of wearing ive gotten so many compliments on my skin even on no make up days too. Lol get this you wont regret it!

I was unsure of this when I first got it but after several weeks of use I can honestly say this this has improved the overall look and feel of my skin. It tingles when you put it on, but not so much that its too distracting. The scent isnt strong but does last a little while so if you are sensitive to scents this may not be the product for you. Overall I really do enjoy the product and will be purchasing again in the future.
I love this for weekly use. It helps with texture and gives you a nice glow in the morning. Goes on smooth and can be used under regular moisturizer.
LOVE. There is definitely a slight tingle sensation at first but goes away quickly. I love this night treatment because it is not too harsh but you can also feel it working.

I have been using this product for a month now. it reduced pores and helped diminish discoloration. I have been using it at night every day. I am not a fan of how it feels on skin and I think the product is a little pricey.

Ive really been enjoying using this serum from Clarins. Ive used it for about two weeks now, and my skin does look noticeably more radiant. Its lightweight and absorbs quickly without leaving a sticky residue, and I like all of the plant botanicals this is formulated with. This is definitely a luxury product with a luxury price point, but I enjoy it.
product_name: Double Serum Firming & Smoothing Anti-Aging Concentrate

review_text: This is a great serum that is super hydrating! I notice that my skin looks firmer and healthier since I started using it. Its as though this serum plumps up my skin, making my wrinkles and fine lines look less noticeable. Ill keep using it since it actually seems to do what it says it will do!
product_name: Double Serum Firming & Smoothing Anti-Aging Concentrate

review_text: The Clarins Double Serum is amazing. I have already purchased more seeing a difference it made on the complexion on my face. I love the consistency and that it doesnt leave my face feeling dry or too oily.
product_name: Double Serum Firming & Smoothing Anti-Aging Concentrate

review_text: This double serum is packed with many ingredients. Its good for all skin types but dry skin would benefit more since its oily and hydrating. Personally, I am not a fan of the scent in the product. It was too strong for me. Also, my face broke out after using this serum. I recommend this product for those with dry skin or looking for anti-aging properties.
product_name: Double Serum Firming & Smoothing Anti-Aging Concentrate

review_text: I had really high hopes for this product, however I wasnt able to get to see the full 7 day results because the formula was a little too oily for my skin. I would say that my face is not dry, and more of a combo than oily. I do not have a very oily complexion, however this felt like i was just placing oil on my face and I did not enjoy the way it felt. I can see this being great for someone who has dry skin, but it was hard to apply makeup even the next day because my skin felt oily and shiny. Otherwise the product had a good scent!
product_name: Double Serum Firming & Smoothing Anti-Aging Concentrate

review_text: I have very oily skin, this product works amazing!

I have all over oily skin on my face with large pores. I had used the lotion version of this and was not impressed in years past. I had a slow reaction time, but when I realized that the gel version was available, and recommended for oily skin, I hastened to get a sample. It works perfectly well.I apply after my shower (and toner) in the morning, and let absorb for about 5 minutes before I put on my makeup. I cant say that it prevents my skin from being oilier, because I am still shiny after about 3-4 hours (I have embraced this about myself), but it doesnt make it worse thats what I was looking for when I purchased this.
review_title: Works well for my oil slick of a face

review_text: This is in my travel bag and I love using this. I have oily skin and I feel like it really penetrates the skin quickly which I love. I would definitely buy the full size of this and use everyday.
This is by far the best moisturize that I ever bought. It feels amazing on your skin, and you dont have to worry about your skin feeling oily.

I have an oily T-zone and dry cheeks and this product works perfect...I love how thin and lightweight this is...Thin as we say - i can add fillers, concealers, primers, foundations added without feeling one more layer of extra cake...the only downside is that it doesnt have SPF... So be careful to add another layer of sun protection...my skin looks a lot better over the year...

Love it. My face is super dry and this moisturizing is everything I was looking for. I try other lotion from clinique but none of them worked as this one. If you face is dry this is a good lotion to buy, great price, good size and really works. Thank you Clinique for this moisturizing.

I believe they have updated the formula. The lotion is now quite a bit thicker. It is good for really dry weather but not so much otherwise. I used to apply this lotion right after my cleaning routine before makeup application. With the new formula it took much longer for my skin to absorb the lotion. I will keep this as a winter outdoor lotion but have to hunt for a new daily lightweight moisturizer.

No other product really surpasses this one when it comes to mosturizing. Not Perricone, SK II, you name it. You can always try new or expensive facial lotions but you will always come back to classic Clinique Dramatically Different for skin hydration.

I have given up hope on Clinique and realized that none of their products besides the take the day off oil works. But, their skin care is harsh, basic, and use bad ingredients. It didnt leave my skin oily ,but it didnt moisturize my skin enough or at all. Great for sensitive skin though

I love this stuff for overnight use. My skin turns red and flaky and feels irritated at the first cold breeze of Autumn, and Ive been trying for many years to find a non-greasy, light-feeling moisturizer to use on autumn and winter nights. This one is it! I wash my face, apply my serum, then soothe with this nice lotion.It requires some light massaging to sink in, but once it does, my skin feels smooth and comfortable. And it feels great the next morning, too.I highly recommend this lotion.

*I received this product free for my honest review*I wanted to love this product, I really did. But I dont :(. It is extremely perfumed like we are talking super heavy smell. It is fairly thin for a primer. It does feel nice initially but it really did nothing for my skin. I dont feel like there was any blurring. I also feel like the directions could be a little better. Obviously yes I know how to use a primer but really there wasnt much for the rookie.

This is a liquid dream! This felt lovely on my dry areas and felt light on my skin. The packaging was adorable. I love the thought put into this! It dried well and felt great under my makeup for the day. It lasted all day and still felt light! I really enjoyed the silky smooth texture and how it smoothed my skin so that my makeup finish was nothing short of flawless.

I 100% recommend this product!! It feels like butter on my skin. This way it makes my skin feel and look is almost magical. It blurs just like a blurring primer and looks great under makeup or even on its own. I have been using this product for a couple of weeks now and my skin definitely looks and feels better. The packaging is beautiful and feels great in your hand and the best part is its refillable!! Big points there!! I feel more confident when Im wearing this because I know my skin is glowing.

The Dior Dreamskin Care & Protect cream was a great product to try as a primer and as the last step in skincare at night. I found that the smooth formula (it has dimethicone) really helped to fill those lines and tone down the dark spots on my face after one week, just as it claimed. Its not as hydrating as I would like it, so if you are dry, lather up with your fave moisturizer first. Under makeup, it performed beautifully without breaking up my foundation (I tried it with full coverage liquid, stick, and tinted moisturizer.) There is a scent but it is not over-powering like some luxury products are. I loved that the packaging is easily re-fillable-a fantastic option to reduce unnecessary packaging and waste. Would definitely purchase again!

It felt super soft and smooth on my skin right out of the packaging? It immediately helped blur my skin almost like a primer? It is supposed to help with dark spots so I am excited about long term use but I have only used it for 5 days. I have not seen dark spots fade but I have noticed my skin a lot firmer and plumper. The packaging is extremely elegant and expensive looking. Also since It has that blurring effect. I did not need to use a primer. I would definitely recommend.

This is TRULY the BEST moisturizer Ive ever bought. I have tried everything to moisturize my skin without feeling greasy, or waking up to 2 new pimples. I mean everything. I was first hesitant to buy it considering it came packaged in a face wash type bottle, and the fact it was 3.4 oz.. Most quality moisturizers come in fancy glass jars and barely have 2 ounces in them. I had a total of FOUR samples of this and every time was so depressed when the sample jar was empty. I have extremely dry tight flaky skin in the winter, with occasional breakouts. This has changed my LIFE. BUY IT NOW.
product_name: Drink Up Intensive Overnight Hydrating Mask with Avocado & Swiss Glacier Water

review_text: AHHHH!!!! I use this along with the age defense origins toner and my skin is just AMAZING!! I use this 3 times a week and a little goes a long way!! I wake up with nourished, hydrated skin and it smells like heaven!!!! LOVE IT!!!
product_name: Drink Up Intensive Overnight Hydrating Mask with Avocado & Swiss Glacier Water

review_text: Smells great and my skin normally dry skin wakes up moisturized. Recommend putting this on before getting on a plane.
review_title: Exactly what it says it does
product_name: Drink Up Intensive Overnight Hydrating Mask with Avocado & Swiss Glacier Water

review_text: Got this as a sample and I absolutely love the results!! I woke up to absolutely smooth feeling skin that was super duper hydrated!I love love the smell, the texture is like whipped cake batter and it feels so good on the skin. Definitely buying a full size.
product_name: Drink Up Intensive Overnight Hydrating Mask with Avocado & Swiss Glacier Water

review_text: Absolutely love the smell and texture of this however oily skin beware. I always break out whenever I use this. I do love this as a Espot treatmentE whenever I have really dry patches or flakey skin. All over my face is too much and clogs my pores badly.
product_name: Drink Up Intensive Overnight Hydrating Mask with Avocado & Swiss Glacier Water

review_text: THIS IS NOT A CLEAR LIQUID ITS PINK AND I WANT TO RETURN IT
really works on my skin ....good for acne skin

This potion works great. Even foe sensitive skin. Doesnt over dry. In one night it reduces size and redness. After second night the under skin pimple was not notice to the eye but I could feel it. After 3rd night it was gone.
I have used it about 3 times on cystic pimples. They all were diminished within 3-4 days. You just have to keep after them!

I have the most annoying acne that never seems to go away no matter what I use (or dont use). Benzoyl peroxide is usually the only medication that will make a dent, but I have to say, this stuff works pretty good! Its not as drying as benzoyl peroxide and it doesnt bleach your clothes either. The only draw back is the smell, it seems like even after you wash your face, you can still smell a faint trace of sulfur. Its worth it if it keeps working though!

I received a week sample of this product from the influesnter campaign. I used it every night as recommended and the only difference in my skin is that it made it extra sensitive to every other product Ive used.
product_name: Estee Lauder Advanced Night Repair Synchronized Multi-Recovery Complex Serum

review_text: Great serum . Very lightweight left my skin smooth. Doesnt have a scent which is good for those that are sensitive. Absorbs nicely into the skin. Dont have to wait to long for it to dry.
product_name: Estee Lauder Advanced Night Repair Synchronized Multi-Recovery Complex Serum

review_text: Received a sample from #influenster yesterday. I put it on last night and my skin felt moisturized and tight this morning.
product_name: Estee Lauder Advanced Night Repair Synchronized Multi-Recovery Complex Serum

review_text: Influenster sent me a small sample of this serum for free in exchange for my honest review and its like the crack of skincare bc a small tase was all I needed- I have already ordered the mini size so I can chase the dragon, Im hooked! I love the texture and how its not at all oily. My skin has looked really clear, even and refreshed since I started using 1-2 times a day. I wish I could bathe in it.
product_name: Estee Lauder Advanced Night Repair Synchronized Multi-Recovery Complex Serum

review_text: I received a deluxe sample of this product from influenster and I have been applying it to my crows feet area and between my brows and I cant believe how youthful and vibrant my skin looks now! I want to buy the full size and start using it on my whole face. Highly recommend!
product_name: Estee Lauder Advanced Night Repair Synchronized Multi-Recovery Complex Serum

review_text: This is the best facial exfoliator. Offers both physical and chemical exfoliation. I like to scrub my face with it and then leave it on as a mask for a few minutes.
This is an amazing product - that left my face feeling baby soft..... non irritating, even if I use daily - but super effective!

Ive used this mostly for around ten years BUT switched to something else different due to the price. I started using again and its like WOW! It unclogs my huge pores without stripping my skin. You dont need much either. I use about a dimes size or less and it has turned my skin back around! Wont be without again!
review_title: I FORGOT HOW GREAT THIS IS

review_text: LOVE this product!! Exfoliates skin without being too harsh. Got as a sample and had to restock!!

This product is fantastic! It does a great job of clearing out my skin and giving me a deep cleanse. I use it once a week and I have already noticed big changes after just a few weeks of use, especially in the winter!

I have adult (hormonal) acne on my chin and forehead. Scrubs I normally use leave my face feeling dry or oily. Not with this. I used this for the first time 2 days ago and on the first day I used it, my pores seemed smaller and skin was smoother. My skin wasnt oily after using either, it seemed balanced. I normally dont use Clinique products but I think this is gonna be a keeper.

I have used this product for almost 10 years and never had a compliant about it until recently. This product used to do an amazing job balancing out the oil and dryness of my skin. About 2 months ago, I ran out of product and had to purchase another Clinique Exfoliating Scrub to replace the one I had used up. I was very disappointed to find out that the formula for the product had completely changed. It barely had any exfoliating beads and did not leave my skin feeling clean. Now, my nose has reverted back to getting so oily that my foundation does not last long and my face has broken out in acne. I have not had any drastic changes to my diet, lifestyle or beauty regimen. I can only attribute the change to my skin to the decline of quality in this product.
RIGHT AFTER I USED , I PUT MY DAY LOTION AND MY FACE LOOK WHIT GLOW , NICE PRODUCT.

Ive been using this for at least 15 years. I think it may be 20. People always ask me what I do for my skin.This is it. I think the constant exfoliation is the keyIts not for you babies. It does tingle a tiny bit so if you have very sensitive skin its probably too harsh.2 days without this product and my skin starts to get dull.
I dislike this product. I feel like this exfoliator was to harsh on my skin. It would make me breakout and irritate my skin after using this product.
review_title: Not a good product for sensitive skin

review_text: I use this a couple times a week at night and it makes my skin super soft and refreshed and bright by morning! I misread when I bought this and thought it was an exfoliator but works just as well!!

I, like some of the other people that shared their reviews, use a Clarisonic and a daily exfoliator. I was also shocked when I saw all of the dead skin it removed. I have pretty sensitive skin and I didnt experience any irritation. Try this. You will be amazed at how much dead skin comes off. Why buy good products and makeup if youre putting it on dead skin?
Its been hard to find a product for my sensitive skin that is so gentle, like this one. Right after the first use I noticed how smooth, even and brightening this peel gel was on my skin! Love it!
Ive loved every PTR product Ive ever tried with the exception of this peeling gel. Yes, it balls up, but no, its not bc its exfoliating dead cells. Its nothing more than the product clumping together
exfoliates wonderfully! love to do it and put on a moisture mask after for a smooth refreshed feel

The skin around my eyes is pretty sensitive. It was difficult for me to find an eye makeup remover that wouldnt irritate my eyes as well as cotton pads that didnt feel like sandpaper. These are definitely a lifesaver. They are very soft and dont cause any irritations like many others do. Ive been using and repurchasing these for years now. Sure they are more expensive but well worth it in my opinion.
They are so soft. Its silly to spend $10 on cotton but if you love you face and can afford it. Please give it a try
soft and comfortable touch feeling to the skin

HOLY GRAIL! I use these wet with makeup removing balm ( I use drunk elephant or green clean by farmacy) AMAZING! Then I use them to wash off my face wash day/night AMAZING. Finally I use one to dry my face after. Literally feels like a spa treatment. I cannot say enough good things.
Best cotton pads Ive ever used, will continue to purchase..love love it!!!

I use this product morning and night. The first couple of times I used it, it tingled, especially around my nose, but that faded by the time it dried. This helps me so much, especially with the fact that my skin has trouble with shedding dead skin cells. My acne has always been really bad, but when I use this like Im supposed to, my skin really does improve. I wish it was a little cheaper, but hey, its worth it.
These are by far the best facial pads that Ive ever used!! Such a holy grail product for me. I incorporate these in my nightly routine

I have been using these exfoliating pads every other day or daily (depending on the weather, stress, hormones, etc.,) for over a year. My skin is so much more clear, I get less breakouts, and it helps keep my scalp/hairline psoriasis at bay. I have very sensitive skin so I was skeptical at first. Definitely worth it!
never saw that much of a difference when using these, but im sure it helped clean my face at the end of the day and kept my acne at bay!!
Got these in my Play! box and am officially in love! They made my skin feel so fresh and set the tone for the rest of my beauty routine. Love love love

I was really impressed with this essence! I have use several types of essence before and typically dont see results, but with this one I noticed a brightening of my skin after only a couple of uses. My skin looks clearer and brighter! It does have a slight yeast smell, but it did not cause any irritation and the smell goes away quickly. Love it and cant wait to buy more when this runs out.

I was given this product free of charge to test in exchange for my honest review.I used this for the last several weeks to try and give the best review possible. i didnt hate the product but did not notice a difference in my skin. There was no change in my skin appearance, tone, or texture. I felt like I was just applying water to my face. I wouldnt pay for it personally.

I am big on skincare and this is one product that makes my skin feel and look amazing. I prefer to use only few skincare products but I do not mind spending money on them if I believe they are worth it. I use this as my moisturizer/treatment, along with an oil cleanser and that pretty much sums up my skincare routine. Overtime Ive noticed my skin has balanced out (I am usually quite oily), become more hydrated, and its basically eliminated my need to use other products. Maybe because it is the only product I use on my face besides cleanser that I see very satisfying results. I love it and will keep repurchasing.
review_title: One of the only products I feel faithful towards

review_text: This is expensive but very nice. It is one of the only products I saw a difference in overnight the first time I used it. I will continue to use it until I find something less expensive that works just as well... maybe never. :(

I am on my late 20s, I have a combination skin (dry and oily T-zone), the only wrinkle on my face would be the laugh lines that are literally only visible to me, yet SK II did nothing to me.I tried it for four months and I was really disappointed. I had pretty much the same results I had with SK II as I had with African Black Soap, which costs a tiny fraction of SK II.Dont believe the hype. It is literally just water. I didnt apply it on my skin, neither did I rub it on my skin; I pressed on my face and neck several times.

This cleanser is just that - a cleanser. Whenever I try a new product I always hope to find something new, that does something better for my skin, but this was really just a facial cleanser and nothing more. It is really nice and foamy, and it smells great - very minty. I was worried the menthol would bother my skin, but it doesnt. I dont have oily skin, its a bit toward the drier side, and I felt that this cleanser dried it out a bit too much. I have this issue with most cleansers, though. My mom tried it as well, she has oily skin, and said she likes it. I received this product for free in exchange for an honest review.
product_name: Find Your Balance Oil Control Cleanser

review_text: I tried literally everything this oil control line is the only thing that works for my skin.. needed to get something that works deep down in my pores.. this is everything!! xo thanks ole!!
product_name: Find Your Balance Oil Control Cleanser

review_text: I received a sample of this face wash in an ole skin brightening deluxe sample kit. Let me tell you.... this product was the star of the show. I loved it so much that I bought a full bottle even though I STILL have more than enough left in that tiny sampler. It literally only takes One pea size Drop of cleanser to get a really good wash. And it makes me face feel so refreshed and clean. I have had minimal breakouts since using it consistently. It is really really hot in St Louis during the summer so I can not comment on the oil control claim- right now. Nonetheless- This is my new favorite face wash!!
product_name: Find Your Balance Oil Control Cleanser

review_text: I use this cleanser before using the Balancing Force Oil Control Toner and follow it with Counter Balance Oil Control Hydrator. I do this routine in the morning especially before I put my makeup on. I have extremely oily skin with cystic acne (I use about 2 oil blotting sheets per hour per day) and this has been a real life miracle for my skin. The cleanser is not drying and leaves my skin feeling clean. I only need to use around 5 or 6 blotting sheets per day now. If you have oily skin, I definitely recommend you use this whole line of oil control products.
product_name: Find Your Balance Oil Control Cleanser

review_text: Really wanted to love this, about two weeks into using it and the texture of my skin on my cheeks got really rough, stopped using for a few days now and its already starting to get better. My pores on my cheeks look way bigger and Ive been getting random small white heads on my cheeks which never happens to me. I dont even know if I should give the remaining product to someone because I dont want to be responsible for this to happening to someone else.
product_name: Find Your Balance Oil Control Cleanser

review_text: First off the price is painful and whats worse(or better, I cant decide) is it seems to be working! I almost shed a tear when I clicked purchase! No issue with the smell but the dropper....ugh! I understand how it works, but half the time I cant get enough in the dropper! I also hate packaging that prevents you from getting every drop out of a product that is so stupid expensive! I use it twice a day and have used about 1/4 of the bottle. Unfortunately, in my experience(using it for 4 weeks)it does what it claims to do.

I finally tried my sample of this serum & it blew me away! I was recently put on medication for thyroid that made my outer hands raw. Once healed it left deep lines on the back of my hands & wrists. After applying this incredible feeling serum to my face, neck, & chest, I used the remaining on my hands. IT INSTANTLY REVITALIZED MY HANDS! My chest, neck, & face also look & feel so silky & supple. I cant wait to see how it all looks in the morning! Im absolutely going to splurge on this serum! My skin seems to LOVE IT! I need this in my routine!

I have never used collagen on my skin directly and it feels good and makes my skin feel bouncy and hydrated. It goes well with my other skincare products and so far Im loving it. Its lightweight and doesnt feel greasy. Gifted by algenist
Unfortunately this product is too heavily perfumed for me to use. It has been on my face for five minutes and needs to be washed off.

Wanted to love it but unfortunately this product gave me the worst pimples ever. I applied it and felt that my face was extremely hot, didnt think too much of it because of the weather. Literally five hours later I had small little white dots all over my face and bigger pimples as well. So disappointed. Note: I do have very sensitive skin, so if you do as well then i would not recommend this product at all! Save your money and your skin!

Its been a little over a week since Ive started using the Genius sleeping cream along with the liquid collagen and let me tell you , its my favorite part of the day :) I instantly fell in love with the buttery texture and also the fact that its vegan plant based...I give myself a little face massage with it right before I hop in bed and let it do its magic over night. I noticed my face was a lot more hydrated after the second night. If your looking for a new night time cream this is it right here. **I received this product complimentary for sampling purposes but all opinions are your own.**

This product is very moisturizing. There are a few things I am not a fan of, however. Jar packaging is not hygienic and causes some ingredients to lose their efficacy when they are constantly being exposed to oxygen. This also doesnt really have any anti-aging ingredients. It will moisturize your skin, but it wont change it for the better. It also felt heavy on my skin, like shea butter. My skin looked oily after, which is fine for night, but I could FEEL the oils, which I dont like. I received this product complimentary for testing purposes, but all opinions are honest and my own.
I received a 10 day sample of this and loved it. I ended up buying the full thing. My skin looks and feels great when I wake up in my morning.
I absolutely love this product. My skin feels

This product is incredible! I noticed deep hydration and a plumper appearance from the first use. The room that is comes with is amazing to massage out any puffiness, and there is a slight cooling feeling which is super spa-like! I was completely impressed.
My skin feels so much softer and brighter after using it. Its kind of pricey but its worth it!
product_name: GOOPGLOW 15% Glycolic Acid Overnight Glow Peel

review_text: I received this product from Influenster. Since it was free, I only received 1 pad so its hard to really base the product on a 1 time use. Ive used tons of other peel pads and will say this one is very gentle. I have sensitive skin and didnt feel any irritation. I liked that the pad has a little pocket to put your fingers, making it easier to move across your face. My skin was glowing after using this.
product_name: GOOPGLOW 15% Glycolic Acid Overnight Glow Peel

review_text: I received this product as a gift in exchange for my honest review. My honest review is, I absolutely love the product. It made my skin feel so smooth after just one use. I would definitely recommend to my friends
product_name: GOOPGLOW 15% Glycolic Acid Overnight Glow Peel

review_text: Complimentary from Goopglow. Ive used this twice and really enjoying it so far! For reference, Im dry on my cheeks and slightly oily in my t zone. My skin LOVES chemical peels! I felt a bit of tingling for a few minutes after application but nothing uncomfortable. The applicator was easy to use and had plenty of product to use on my face and down to my chest. My skin looked so glowy the next day! The only con is the price.
product_name: GOOPGLOW 15% Glycolic Acid Overnight Glow Peel

review_text: I received this sample from influenster i really like it but i can tell a difference with just one use however my face did feel clean but i feel there are more affordable products that do the same
review_title: I like it but more affordable things on the market
product_name: GOOPGLOW 15% Glycolic Acid Overnight Glow Peel

review_text: This exfoliator was ok. I used it for a few weeks now. It did buff away my dead skin leaving it feeling smooth on my face but also with a few uses left me red and skin burning. Maybe I needed to go longer in between uses and since I spray tan and need exfoliating weekly, this just isnt the product for me. I would recommend it if you dont have really sensitive skin.

Goop gifted me this exfoliator and its changed my skin! The windy, cold PA weather has done a number on my skin this winter and this exfoliator has been a LIFESAVER! My skin has never been softer, smoother, and more glowy! Ill never go back after this! Even my boyfriend has noticed a significant difference in my skin just after a few uses, Im hooked!
Meh ... Not bad but not worth the price. There are plenty of other exfoliaters that work as well or better and where you get a lot more for your money.

Wonderful exfoliating product! If you are one that loves to exfoliate your skin I highly recommend giving this a try. Some exfoliating products are too a harsh on the skin. I was sent this to try and I waited to review until I had used it multiple times! Non-irritating & effective

First off, I absolutely love GOOPGLOW Microderm Instant Glow Exfoliator! Ive never tried the brand before and I was lucky enough to be gifted some, complimentary from GOOP BEAUTY. It had made my skin super soft and even a bit EglowyE. It comes in a good size jar and a little goes a long way. The scent is pleasant and very natural/clean smelling; reminds me of clay mixed with shea butter. Overall, its an amazing product that I never knew I was missing.

I use this with the Nudestix ECitrus Clean Balm & Make-Up MeltE to double cleanse and it has completely changed my skin (for the better). The make-up melt is oil based and removes all of your makeup super easily. I follow-up with this water based cleanser, and I also use this just by itself when Im not wearing make-up. It leaves the skin gently cleansed, but without stripping the skin. 10/10 recommend combining with the make-up melt. Its perfection!
review_title: Taught me how to double cleanse!

review_text: I received this product for free by influenster in exchange for an honest review. Love the scent and the clean feeling my face feels after use!

First this smell is everything! Its a fantastic kick off to the day. Second I love this scrub, its a smooth scrub if that makes sense. Its not intense like most facial scrubs which I love! It also lathers up excellent.
This cream didnt brighten my skin at all and does nothing

first off: the scent is amazing. its exactly how youd want a cleanser to smell (if that makes sense); its clean and citrus-ey without smelling like detergent. as an esthetician, i typically use spa-grade products, but i find this is a nice everyday cleanser (for the price point) for any skin type. it does lather, so i would wipe your face down a couple of times with water because it wants to re-foam and you dont want to keep the residue on your face.
Love the smell!! its citrus but not too powerful and the scrubbing beads are gentle and effective against dirt and stubborn makeup

I have dehydrated skin. Its tricky to moisturize without weighing it down, or under hydrating. I use this morning and night and it performs beautifully under makeup and balanced my dry and dehydrated (read: oily by midday) areas. The scent is TO DIE FOR. I will certainly repurchase. This product was sent to me for reviewing purchases by Influenster, but it did not alter my feelings on the product. Im very impressed.
I love this, I use it every morning!

I got a sample of this with one of my orders and I wasnt impressed. I really liked the smell and had high hopes because of how nice it felt when going on, but when I woke up the following morning, my skin was so incredibly dry. Normally I only use moisturizer once a day and its always plenty for me - my skin is never dry when I do this. I thought it might be a one-time thing, but when I used it again, the same thing happened. If only that initial feeling of moisturized skin remained, but unfortunately I wont be buying a full-size.
review_title: Smells good but the moisturized feel doesn't last.

review_text: I just love this product. I have sensitive, dry and acne prone skin, i cant use many products. But this one is amazing. I dont breakout with this. I am using it since a year now and my skin look hydrated, soft, and amazing!
review_title: Best best best best cream ever

review_text: I really enjoy the smell and texture of this. It absorbs into the skin very quickly and works great under makeup. It doesnt do a lot for my dry areas nor does it add much radiance, however I do enjoy using it and feel that it is good value for money. I would recommend this for people with oily or normal skin.

I was first intrigued by the vibrant purple color of this serum, then to how long the consistency was. I am used to these thick, heavy, smelly night creams and so switching up to using Ole was a big change. I LOVE this serum! It smells like lemonade, it is so thin and smooth and make you feel like you have nothing on your skin, and I was up looking more youthful. I am obsessed

Like most people I found out about this product through social media. One of my favourite YouTuber was raving about this and I thought it would be great to give it a try. After reading all the negative reviews I did feel a little bit sceptical about buying it but all those worries disappeared once I did. After about two weeks of using this I noticed a difference in my skin. It is now been about three months, I am now on my second bottle and Im loving it. Are used so often that I have now stopped using the serum that I previously used and loved before. The only drawback to this product is the price.
I really liked this product a lot. It went on smooth and made my face feel extremely nice. It did not dry it out or cause any acne. Its a really good product.

Unlike many of these people reviewing I did NOT receive this free to make a review. I bought this product & Im absolutely in love with the effects of it. Ive used retinol products for a while & this had just as amazing effects as retinol. The only thing that I do not like is the smell, after first it smells amazing, but the smell doesnt dissipate & it lingers around all day. Ive had the product on for 3 hrs now & still smell it.

Perfect choice for my skin. Feels very moisturizing and creamy when first applied. My skin ate it up. It doesnt feel sticky. It feels lightweight . Its safe if youre breastfeeding unlike retinol products

absolutely love this! i have so much hyperpigmentation on my chin from all my break outs over the years and i noticed a difference after ONE use. this is the only product that has been able to help and it doesnt dry my skin out.

I received this product complementary from Influenster to review. I have been using it every night since I have received it and I love what it has done to my skin. My skin looks and feels so much better! Its one of the best timers that I have used in a while!

This toner is a great combo of glycolic and lactic acids which together are fantastic for brightening and improving skin texture like fine lines. I received this as a gift in my Vox Box from @influenster @olehenriksen and have been using for a weeks now. Its refreshing even with the potent AHAs because of its calming ingredients like chamomile and sandalwood too. It definitely performs well as I have a bit brighter, less dull skin but Ive been using other products to focus on that. For fine line though, this has certainly filled them in, smoothes them out. Only drawback for me personally is the lemon fragrance but I know others who love it! #buhbyedarkspots #olehenriksen #sephora #influenster #contest #complimentary

I really wanted to love this product but it just did nothing for my skin. I used it for a month only at night because my skin is a bit sensitive and nothing. Spot treating with the vitamin c serum did better for my spots than this. This is my first disappointment from this line.

I am African American-brown skinwith some hyperpigmentation and dark marks. I wanted to like this toner, 2 months and no improvement whatsoever. Better off using which hazel with rosehip; waste of money in my opinion.
If you wanna look like a bronze statue, go right ahead.....
product_name: Glowscreen Sunscreen SPF 40 PA+++ with Hyaluronic Acid + Niacinamide

review_text: This is slightly tinted which is nice. My face has stayed clear throughout using this. It doesnt have a strong smell. I like the luminosity it gives to my skin.
product_name: Glowscreen Sunscreen SPF 40 PA+++ with Hyaluronic Acid + Niacinamide

review_text: My first product from supergoop and it piles!! I love the glow too. So disappointed.
product_name: Glowscreen Sunscreen SPF 40 PA+++ with Hyaluronic Acid + Niacinamide

review_text: I look like a tin man even with make up on. Seriously. I used to think theres no such thing as too much glow. Not until I tried this sunscreen.Nope. The first day I put my sunscreen on, with makeup and everything on top and my husband was like Eyou look sick. You ok?E
product_name: Glowscreen Sunscreen SPF 40 PA+++ with Hyaluronic Acid + Niacinamide

review_text: I like the shade Dawn, which is described as a pink pearl more than the original shade, which I think is now called Champagne. It gives me a really pretty glow without looking metallic like Tin Man. The formula isnt my favorite though. It oftentimes pills, making it all patchy on my face. I think this would be better for my neck and chest area rather than on my face.
product_name: Glowscreen Sunscreen SPF 40 PA+++ with Hyaluronic Acid + Niacinamide

review_text: I love this product because my skin was baby soft the next morning! I do leave it on for more than 10 minutes. I put it on before I get ready for night and then rinse it off just before I go to sleep. I would agree that this is not a peel mask, but it works!

I wanted a peel mask. Simply put the mask never dried even after the full ten minutes or twenty minutes. There was no tingling or tightening and my skin felt nice afterwards but no different that using a good moisturizer. It does not do what it says it will do. And at a hefty $55 I expected it to do what the label says. I am returning it.

I got the sample size a while ago and first I must say I have VERY oily skin and acne. The product is quite sticky so I thought it would have a greasy residue but its really nice totally brightens your face and decreases redness and irritation on acne. I typically hate masks because its such a hassle but this is a must and I get complements on my skin clearing all the time now.
Is easy to wash off and brightens and tightens. Not my favorite but Id buy it on sale

This is the most effective mask I have ever used. It burns ever so slightly at first, but its worth it in the end! It makes my face smooth as silk, younger and healthier looking. I use it once a week and look forward to it. Well worth the price and a little goes a long way.
Its an excellent product that works well for me to remove all of the dirt, oil and sweat off of my face after a long day.
I used this as an exfoliating product to help combat my eczema! It doesnt smell bad but it definitely stings going on! But after 3 weeks my eczema is basically gone!
Love this toner! Exfoliating and super hydrating. I have dry to normal skin with low sensitivity.If your face is too sensitive for it, it works great on elbows and knees.

Not gonna lie, I didnt think I was going to like this product when I first purchased it. I thought there was no way it could compete with my more expensive acid toners. I was wrong and now I feel foolish. I saw visible improvements in my skin in just a few days. My skin has a more youthful radiance about it. I dont think I will be repurchasing other acid toners. This is just as effective and is reasonably priced for the average person.
I really like this product...you can feel it tingle and feel it working!!! I definitely wont run outa this now that i found it!!!
Everyone kept raving about this treatment but it didnt work for me at all .
product_name: Good Genes All-In-One AHA Lactic Acid Treatment

review_text: I can see the glow coming back to my skin. This lactic acid treatment is very moisturizing and absorbs quickly. I love how lightweight it feels on my skin. It is such an amazing product. I have been dealing with acne for so many years and I have dark spots on my face. I started with using it every other day and gradually increased to using it daily. My skin discoloration is fading gradually and Ill definitely continue using this. I also love the fresh scent it has. I received this product complimentary from Sunday Riley Good Genes.
product_name: Good Genes All-In-One AHA Lactic Acid Treatment

review_text: I first used this product and my skin definitely purged a bit. I was then swayed to try Drunk Elephants glycolic serum, and was disappointed. There is no comparison in my opinion. GG fully absorbs into my skin, lessens the fine wrinkles in my expressive forehead, clears up clogged pores and has accelerated the lightening of dark acne spots on my jawline. I regret that I ever stopped using this product, and will never be without it again!
product_name: Good Genes All-In-One AHA Lactic Acid Treatment

review_text: Helps me prevent breakouts or random solo zits will quickly disappear. Cystic acne hasnt been a problem for me since I started using this. I started by buying the smaller sized treatment in the pack with the clay face wash by Sunday and then bought the larger bottle after seeing improvements in my face. I have dry skin and bought this to prevent over drying and my face feels hydrated after use. I have sensitive skin but have been able to keep this on my face as a leave on. Ive been seeing improvements on old and new hyperpigmentation. Its pricey but worth every dollar for the results Ive seen since starting.
review_title: Great results! Less acne and decreased dark spots!
product_name: Good Genes All-In-One AHA Lactic Acid Treatment

review_text: I adore this products. Honestly didnt think I would like it but I do. Just wish they had an extra large size because I go through the 1.7 quite fast
product_name: Good Genes All-In-One AHA Lactic Acid Treatment

review_text: I grew up having dryer skin and have never had problems with acne, however this year my skin changed a lot and I began having breakouts on my chin and around my face. I tried a few different products but this one is the best hands down. I noticed a difference after only using the pads for 2 days! Can dry out your skin though if used too much.
product_name: Goodbye Acne Max Complexion Correction Pads

review_text: This really works, cleans well, has my skin soft and super smooth and helps with breakouts. My skin is oily to dry, a rather difficult combination and allergies to many things, however, I will order this again.
product_name: Goodbye Acne Max Complexion Correction Pads

review_text: The pads are easy to use and have a nice amount of the product in them so you dont have to worry about not having enough on the pad for your entire face. Ive been using it for about a week now (once a day) and it has significantly reduced my blackheads on my nose. My chin could look better but I think that if I do that area twice a day it will work. It will be a little drying the first few times you use it, use a good moisturizer like Clinique and you will be fine!
product_name: Goodbye Acne Max Complexion Correction Pads

review_text: I had been using the drugstore version of these pads for the past year and felt like they were over drying my skin and not curbing my hormone-related breakouts as much as I liked anymore. I turned to Sephora for an alternative and found these pads. Ive been pretty happy with the results thus far! They dont sting or burn my skin and the peach bellini smell is a nice touch - they still smell a little chemically but, to be fair, it is a pad soaked in chemicals so I dont mind it. My skin feels fresh and glowy after use. I havent seen a reduction in my blackheads yet but my pores do appear smaller and my breakouts less frequent. My skin is also significantly less dried out. I think these are a winner!
product_name: Goodbye Acne Max Complexion Correction Pads

review_text: This product did nothing but disappoint. I have acne prone skin and this just dried my skin out to the point it was red. After that I used it once a day but it has done nothing to really correct any acne scars or even out tone.
review_title: Can't believe I spent the money on this...
product_name: Goodbye Acne Max Complexion Correction Pads

review_text: This grape seed water is something that you might not need add into your skin care routine but you will definitely love! Great to keep your skin refreshed and hydrated, specially in summer days! Im in love with it. Im going through my second bottle.

Ive been on the hunt for a face mist for a while and this is the most moisturizing and refreshing one Ive tried. So far, Ive used it once a day for about a month and theres plenty left of the smaller size.Much better than Clinques moisture surge spray. My skin is dry and sensitive and this spray is great in the middle of the day if youre moisturizer isnt working anymore or if you just need a pick me up. Keep it in the fridge for extra refreshment.Caudalies Beauty Elixir works good too, but this one is much cheaper!
Bomb I have a very long skincare routine and usually at the end my skin has a lot of product on top I spray this at the very end and somehow it makes all my products seep in and it gets all absorbed.
This feels great on your skin! Super cooling

It was great, and didnt bother my crazy skin. Went to spray it on my face after removing make up, and the nozzel and cap had green mold growing on it. I have never had that happen with any spray product, and I have only had it for 1-2 months. Not purchasing again in fear my money will be wasted if I dont use it fast enough. No idea where that growth came from, havent seen that kind of mold growth before either (and I live in Washington). Didnt take a pic because all I could think was to put it in the trash ASAP. Any sort of EgrowthE should not be allowed to occur on the bottle or within the nozzle spray opening of any spray product. Just...yuck.

I received this cleanser for free in my latest Influenster box. Ive been using this product for a week now, using about every other day, and I can already start to tell a difference. I have temperamental skin (dry patches due to eczema but also an oily t-zone) so I typically stray away from face cleansers in general. However, this has not irritated my skin whatsoever, I feel like my skin looks and feels better, and the smell is light and pleasant. I honestly feel like Im treating myself when Im using this cleanser, and I plan on purchasing it when Ive run out of my complimentary sample. Im grateful for opportunities like Influenster that allow me to test a product before deciding to purchase a full bottle. But trust me, this one is a winner.

New HG face cleanser. Absolutely love for my dry skin. Takes of all of my make up effortlessly, only have to use the smallest amount to cleanse entire face. Smell is lovely and very light, does not make my face feel tight at all and leaves skin smooth and beautiful. Tried in Sephora favorites and decided to buy full size before I even finished my sample!
This cleanser is amazing! Very moisturizing for my dry skin. Also doesnt safe for sensitive skin. Easily takes off makeup, even mascara!

Great cleanser for more dry skin types who still want that foaming action. It was moisturizing, which was nice, but still not strong enough to get everything out of the pores on my t-zone. Not a strong enough cleanser for combo or oily types.

I love this foaming cleanser! It removes all of my makeup and leaves my skin feeling fresh and clean. This product smells delicious and is not harsh on my skin. I received this product for free for testing purposes.

Such a lovely treat for the skin! Ive been looking for a great versatile moisturizer and this hits the mark. I love using it for daytime because its creamy but not too heavy - it feels light on the skin!

This is a light weight yet very moisturizing cream. Its not heavy like a typical cream moisturizer. Its very light and has a similar texture to a face wash in my opinion.I went from using an intense, thick moisturizer to this and my skin didnt react badly. It doesnt feel as soft as my last moisturizer but it kept it moisturized throughout the day.It has a pleasant scent that reminds me cherry almond. It very very light though and does not linger.I would definitely buy this again.I received this product complimentary for my unbiased review I received this product complimentary for review purposes.

This is overall a nice moisturizer. Although, I would not really call it a EgelE cream. It is thick for a gel and very moisturizing. I would use this for night time only and not day time. If you have oily skin this may not be the product for you.
I received this complimentary and really enjoyed it. I thought it would be more of an overnight cream, but honestly I put it on as a moisturizer instead of a primer and my foundation stayed all day!

KOREES Greek Yoghurt Nourishing Probiotic Gel-Cream is wonderful! You do get the Enourishing feelE and the texture is unique. Its very thick but blends and absorbs so differently than others not feeling thick or greasy as intended by gel cream. You do feel the hydration all day and it didnt seem to make me excessively oily. A little goes a long way with This product less than a dime sized amount is all you need. My skin felt really healthy and clean but I havent noticed any added glow. My pores also seemed a bit large for these reasons I gave it 4 stars. Overall the cream is nourishing and feels great.

This is absolutely the best cleansing balm ever. I have tried so many other brands, but this one proves to be the most gentle, but effective. It literally melts the makeup off my face and leaves my skin feeling clean, fresh, hydrated, and ready for moisturizer and everything else! Love this and will be buying more!
product_name: Green Clean Makeup Meltaway Cleansing Balm Limited Edition Jumbo

review_text: The great reviews are lost on me. I dont even want to finish the product. Very hard to rinse off and this is a huge failure for me. Prefer oil cleansing for makeup removing
product_name: Green Clean Makeup Meltaway Cleansing Balm Limited Edition Jumbo

review_text: This is the perfect step 1 to my double cleanse routine !!!Takes all my make up off & smells fresh but not too strongMake sure after you work it in with no water that you wet your hands and massage again your face so the product can emulsify and cleanse properly <3
product_name: Green Clean Makeup Meltaway Cleansing Balm Limited Edition Jumbo

review_text: This is my tried and true love! Im finally doing a review after repurchasing this multiple times now. It has not failed me yet and takes off all my makeup, waterproof or not. A perfect double cleanse companion for someone who wears makeup daily. It smells great and you really only need a small amount. The best value for the amount that you get in the tub. Highly recommend it!
product_name: Green Clean Makeup Meltaway Cleansing Balm Limited Edition Jumbo

review_text: Have re-purchased more times than I can count! Definitely one of the more effective-yet-affordable pre-cleansing makeup removers out there. Dissolves long-wear mascara, foundation, and eye liner without a lot of rubbing or fuss.
product_name: Green Clean Makeup Meltaway Cleansing Balm Limited Edition Jumbo

review_text: This is absolutely the best cleansing balm ever. I have tried so many other brands, but this one proves to be the most gentle, but effective. It literally melts the makeup off my face and leaves my skin feeling clean, fresh, hydrated, and ready for moisturizer and everything else! Love this and will be buying more!
product_name: Green Clean Makeup Removing Cleansing Balm

A perfect double cleanse companion for someone who wears makeup daily. It smells great and you really only need a small amount. The best value for the amount that you get in the tub. Highly recommend it!
