review_text: Have re-purchased more times than I can count! Definitely one of the more effective-yet-affordable pre-cleansing makeup removers out there. Dissolves long-wear mascara, foundation, and eye liner without a lot of rubbing or fuss.
product_name: Green Clean Makeup Removing Cleansing Balm

review_text: I loved the sample size so much I bought the full sized product! Im not usually a fan of primers because they always feel too thick, sticky or greasy and/or they just dont really make a difference in the longevity of my makeup but this product converted me LOL. Sometimes I wear it on its own when Im in a rush - it gives my skin a nice and luminous look and keeps my skin super hydrated during these harsh winters. The smell is definitely a bonus too.
product_name: Hello FAB Coconut Skin Smoothie Priming Moisturizer

review_text: This product works great! Adds a bit of shimmer and moisturizes really well. Gives a really nice glow all day. Smells fantastic. My only issue with this is that it sometimes flakes/peels off (especially in the T-zone area) if you put foundation/primer right on top of it without letting it fully sink into your skin first.
product_name: Hello FAB Coconut Skin Smoothie Priming Moisturizer

review_text: Trash. I am so sad, I was using korres smoothie primer first which I loved but tbh it was expensive for the amount of product. Was referred to this, and after three days I just cant. It is extremely greasy, my makeup looks like absolute trash and patchy. And I beat my face to the gods. Going back to korres for double the price, and half the product. So sad.
product_name: Hello FAB Coconut Skin Smoothie Priming Moisturizer

review_text: This is a lighter moisturizer which makes it a nice primer; however, while I like coconut based products, this leaves a bit of a film on your skin. I like the bit of shimmer that gives your skin a healthy glow, but dont think I would purchase this again. I got this as part of a monthly subscription.
product_name: Hello FAB Coconut Skin Smoothie Priming Moisturizer

review_text: I have very dry skin which foundation clings to in patches. This primer does not fill my large pores but does really help with the dryness and keeps my makeup in place. It has a lovely scent and consistency and feels very good on the skin. I wish it helped with my large pores but for the dryness its second to none and Ive tried a lot of hydrating primers/moisturisers!
product_name: Hello FAB Coconut Skin Smoothie Priming Moisturizer

review_text: I only really started looking into skin care about a year ago. Creeping ever so much closer to 30, it really was time for me to start taking better care of my skin to keep my youthful glow! ;) After researching multiple companies, and based on a few recommendations, I purchased a few products from Origins including this night cream. As someone who was very afraid to use moisturizes (due to cheaper drug store brands always causing me to break out), I was leery to try this product. It definitely has a thicker consistency and takes a while to soak into the skin. I was pleasantly surprised that this product in no way has caused any sort of breakout situation, despite its heavy consistency. I awake in the morning with baby-soft skin. After using this product for about 6 months I can definitely say it has helped improve the texture of my skin. Also, the smell is great and so relaxing to use right before bed. I feel like this product will be a repurchase after repurchase. Lastly, despite a $50 price tag, this jar lasted me a solid 4-5 months. And that is with bringing some of the product down onto my neck as well. A+++ for this and frankly all of the Origins products I have used to far.
review_title: Keeps my skin calm and collected!
product_name: High-Potency Night-a-Mins Resurfacing Cream with Fruit-Derived AHAs

review_text: I wish that Origins would stop putting fragrance into their products. Synthetic or not, fragrance is harmful to your skin, even if the damage is not visible. Otherwise this would be a 5-star night cream.
product_name: High-Potency Night-a-Mins Resurfacing Cream with Fruit-Derived AHAs

review_text: Im now a big fan of Origins! I wanted a substantial yet non-greasy, non-heavy night cream that works and this fits the bill. I love the scent, its pleasing yet not overpowering, and the cream just smooths onto my face perfectly. Highly recommend!
product_name: High-Potency Night-a-Mins Resurfacing Cream with Fruit-Derived AHAs

review_text: This is by far my favorite night moisturizer I have ever used ... I have been using this for over a year and use every night and it really keeps my fave moisturized . this is a fav!
product_name: High-Potency Night-a-Mins Resurfacing Cream with Fruit-Derived AHAs

review_text: Ive been using this cream since I started college, but now just 3 years later I cant seem to love it as much anymore. I dont know if its because my skin has changed or I have noticed that maybe its not the cream for my combination skin. Its quite greasy and doesnt seem to have the wow effect on me anymore. It also doesnt do much for my current dryness. I guess its time to move on.
product_name: High-Potency Night-a-Mins Resurfacing Cream with Fruit-Derived AHAs

review_text: So good! I have super dry skin so I tend to go for the rich and thick creams which are horrible under makeup. Anything light just doesnt cut it for my skin. This, however, goes on light and leaves NO greasy layer. My skin absorbs it so well and it does a beautiful job of keeping me hydrated throughout the day. Truly, a little goes a long way. The magnet in the lid to keep the metal spatula attached, genius! Love this moisturizer and Ive already repurchased to keep in stock even though the jar is far from being empty.

Amazing product. Leaves my skin so soft. Absorbs very well and doesnt just sit on top of skin. Very cool to have a magnetic lid where the applicator adheres to. Smart setup. Love the smell. Highly recommend. Great moisturizer.

I know Im in the minority, but I Do not like this moisturizer. I do not like the packaging. Even with the lil scoop , it gets difficult to get to the product, once its half empty. I found the texture was too grainy. It did nothing for me.
I really wanted to love this moisturizer but unfortunately I couldnt. Every time i use it it breaks me out, i have a combo skin and tbh it moisturizer the skin but not sure why it breaks me out

I received this complimentary from Farmacy in exchange for my honest review. First of all the packing is not only nice looking but the way the spatula magnitizes to the top I love. I cant tell how many times Ive misplaced the spatula. The spatula itself it not only metal but its a nice width as well. The moisturizer though has a different scent works well with my skin. It keeps my skin hydrated.

i was worried it would burn my skin, but it didnt. i felt the tingling and warming sensation. it also didnt dry me out. these were my primary concerns with this product so i am happy that didnt happen. however, after 4x of use i didnt find that it did do anything to improve my skin either. maybe i should be using it longer but i was really excited based on the reviews to see results. i also found that it looked and felt a little greasy on my skin. i dont believe it broke me out though. if youre on the fence about this one like i was, i would say try it out and decide for yourself as people have had very different experiences.
review_title: i don't know how to feel about this one
product_name: Honeymoon Glow AHA Resurfacing Night Serum

review_text: Bought this based off of all the raving reviews. However, I am pretty disappointed as I didnt notice any effect on my skin. My skin felt moisturized and didnt tingle, but I definitely did not have that honeymoon glow that it claims to give you. If anything, I feel like I get more blackheads from this product than benefits. It does smell really good though. All in all, I will not be repurchasing - I have used better AHAs.
product_name: Honeymoon Glow AHA Resurfacing Night Serum

review_text: I was very excited to try this serum after reading all the wonderful reviewsE"however, as soon as I put it on my face was stinging very painfully (like shampoo in the eyes) on the dry spots and my whole face turned bright red, dry and oily alike. I do not have sensitive skin. I can use harsh products without pain. I was very disappointed in this serum because it utterly failed me.
review_title: I DO NOT HAVE SENSITIVE SKIN AND IT STILL BURNT
product_name: Honeymoon Glow AHA Resurfacing Night Serum

review_text: Would highly recommend! Used it as directed, and saw much improvement in the glow of my skin. Only thing I wasnt a huge fan of was the smell of the product but it definitely got the work done!
product_name: Honeymoon Glow AHA Resurfacing Night Serum

review_text: Purchased this about two weeks ago and Im amazed. I suffer from congested pores, small acne scars and blackheads which have dramatically been reduced since using this. I was previously using the ordinary 30% peel but it was too harsh and I kept breaking out. This doesnt make me breakout and if anything has kept my skin clear. Super happy.
product_name: Honeymoon Glow AHA Resurfacing Night Serum

review_text: good serum, great cheap price. Not sure yet if it is effective. lightweight.

I purchased this when I was at sephora returning the tatcha overnight cream (didnt like it and not happy that it contained PEGs). it was standing at the register and I figured why not, for 8 bucks its worth a try. i needed moisture and a barrier badly and tatcha disappointed me so so much. Let me tell you, its amazing. blew the tachta out of the water AND for 10x less. its the last serum i apply before my protini dupe (which I LOVE) and the results are excellent. this serum seals in the other serums and provides amazing moisture and moisture barriers. recommend a million times.
This is literally the best hyaluronic acid I have ever used, and I am e licensed Esthetician. Definitely recommend purchasing on repeat.

It usually takes me a few weeks to see a different when I introduce a new skin product, but I was able to see a noticeable improvement after less than a week using this product. My skin was softer, more plump and more hydrated.

Holy moly. So I have a skin/joint condition that makes me scar very easy, leaving me with ice-pick scars from acne, and stretch marks everywhere from just growing. This noticably plumps my skin, and reduces the look of my scars in ways Ive never had any other product do before. I had some left over from applying to my face, so I rubbed it on my shoulders, and could see with the naked eye how a concave scar plumped up to match the height of the rest of my skin.$7 bucks and it instantly did more for a problem it doesnt even advertise helping with than tens of other products Ive tried charging quadruple the amount.This must be the stuff they put in the pods in sci-fi movies to preserve astronauts in hibernation on long voyages.
review_title: Confidence in a Bottle (EDS peeps, get this!)

review_text: Ive been using this for almost a month and the difference in my skin is amazing, its the second step in my routine and really does hydrate my skin before the other serums. I recommend this!
So far so good I am thoroughly enjoying this and I have very sensitive skin!

I received this free to try in exchange for my honest review. And honestly, I really do love it. I wasnt expecting a lot- the packaging is pretty no-frills, but thats kind of great about it, actually. I dont feel like any product will get trapped in a deceptively large bottle. It also goes on very smoothly, and doesnt leave my face sticky or tight-feeling. It has lasted FOREVER, which I also love.
I really enjoyed The Inkey List Hydrating Serum. It leaves the skin feeling soft and refreshed. I would recommend anyone to try it. It makes my skin feel great and I enjoy using it everyday.

I love using the inkeylist serum as a part of my AM and PM routine! After only a few days I noticed a huge difference in the way my skin looked AND felt! My skin is nice and smooth, brighter and it helped with getting rid of those annoying nose blackheads and dry skin!

I got this from Influenster to test this product and Im actually really surprised with how much I ended up liking this product! It feels great on the skin after application and has a nice scent as well. Ive been using it morning and night for the past month and can see a definite difference in the appearance of my skin. Its smoother, brighter, and plumper which is exciting what I want out of skin product! I will definitely consider repurchasing this when Im out of the jar I have now.
product_name: Hydra Zen Gel-Cream Oil-Free Moisturizer with Salicylic Acid

review_text: I recall walking into Sephora lost not knowing which moisturizer to use for my combination skin. Then I found Hydra Zen! Not only does it smell FABULOUS it gives my skin the right amount of moisture it needs for all day coverage even while wearing makeup. Needless to say Im on my second jar. Wish it come in bigger jar.
product_name: Hydra Zen Gel-Cream Oil-Free Moisturizer with Salicylic Acid

review_text: The consistency is great and it smells really good, it would be a great night-time cream but...it made me break out. I guess my skin is too sensitive.
product_name: Hydra Zen Gel-Cream Oil-Free Moisturizer with Salicylic Acid

review_text: Amazing product it was sent to me via influenster, left my skin so soft and hydrated . Smells amazing, the formula is so rich and smooth. Definitely worth the price.
product_name: Hydra Zen Gel-Cream Oil-Free Moisturizer with Salicylic Acid

review_text: I really love this moisturizer. Im usually not fond of gels, but this one leaves your face so silky and smooth, but not feeling greasy. I have acne prone skin and havent had any problems. The smell is also amazing! I received this product free from Influenster for testing purposes.
product_name: Hydra Zen Gel-Cream Oil-Free Moisturizer with Salicylic Acid

review_text: At first I was a little worried about the perfume they use in this and how it may affect my sensitive skin. Fortunately there was no reaction at all and my skin actually loves this. I have hormonal acne and some of the products I use can leave my skin a little dry but this defiantly brings that moisture back into my skin. It is so light weight and doesnt leave my skin feeling oily afterwards. Will defiantly recommend.
product_name: Hydra Zen Glow Liquid Lightweight Moisturizer with Hyaluronic Acid

review_text: I did receive this product for review purposes. I have been using it fpr about 3 weeks, I did incorporate this moisturizer into my skin care routine at day and night. It worked! I feel my skin more hydrated and since it is light weight and no greasy I can use it under my makeup and it helps a lot to create that perfect canvas. I love the package and the pump on it so the product dont get contaminated. It has a little fragance andnyou can smell it when applying it but it goes away immediately. I cant speak about the price because in this opportunity I didnt buy the product since it was send to me, however, I would likely buy it as soon Im done with the tester. This product works and I highly recommend it to you to try it.
product_name: Hydra Zen Glow Liquid Lightweight Moisturizer with Hyaluronic Acid

review_text: Great product but the formula is too watery. It is moisturizing but the formula dries out pretty fast. It doesnt even smell great
product_name: Hydra Zen Glow Liquid Lightweight Moisturizer with Hyaluronic Acid

review_text: Love this product! A super hydrating option that works for my combination skin, even when layered with other facial serums and oils. Doesnt interfere with my makeup, is absorbed quickly, and most importantly, makes my skin glow to high heaven! After Im done applying it I wont even want to cover up my skin one bit! I received this product free for testing and review purposes.
product_name: Hydra Zen Glow Liquid Lightweight Moisturizer with Hyaluronic Acid

review_text: This product is now my go to moisturizer. Its amazing. My skin looks nice and dewy. It keeps my makeup on without making it look caky.
product_name: Hydra Zen Glow Liquid Lightweight Moisturizer with Hyaluronic Acid

review_text: I got this sleeping mask from influenster as a complimentary product for testing purposes and I have been using this every night after cleansing my face for a few weeks now. Its silky smooth to touch and light and cool on the skin. It gets absorbed by my skin easily and its very hydrating. Every morning when I wake up, I notice that my face has a healthy glow. No irritation, no itchiness, no redness, and definitely no dryness. Its not sticky nor oily on my skin either. Also, it has a very light, barely-there scent. All in all, I love this sleeping mask; it does its job well. The only downside for me is the price, thus 4.5 stars.

I have dry skin so I was excited to try an overnight hydrating mask during the freezing winter where I live. I used it a few nights and noticed that my skin was soft, supple, and hydrated. The mask is like a gel in the container, and when you put it on it almost feels like youre spreading water on your face. Overall I liked this product. The only thing I didnt like is that my face felt greasy in the morning after wearing it all night. I definitely wouldnt be able to put my makeup on for the day after waking up with this mask without worrying about my face looking greasy during the day. After washing my face in the morning though that greasiness was gone and my skin still felt like it was pretty hydrated. I received this product free from Influenster to try and review. This is my honest opinion after trying the product.

Amazing product! This is my first time using any of Dr. Brandts products and I sure hope it wont be my last. I was a little nervous using this mask because of my skin being so sensitive and dry. But its a very light mask that moisturized my face instantly. It also has a very nice and fresh scent that does not irritate my skin. Im very pleased with the product so far, I received it complimentary from Influenster!

I have only a sample of this mask but I will definitely get the full size. I use a retinol product prescribed by my dermatologist and sometimes my skin gets a little dry and flaky from it. This mask, after two nights of wearing it to bed, fixes the flakiness completely! So if you use retinol products and your skin flakes a bit from it sometimes, I could not recommend this mask enough! It also helps healing some of my acne spots that need some help.
review_title: Great if you use retinol products!

review_text: I absolutely love this face EmaskE. I put mask in quotes because I wouldnt really consider this to be a typical facial mask. Its definitely more of a gel consistency and A LITTLE goes along way. When you first put it on your face it feels very refreshing, youll get a cool sensation. It sort of feels slimy at first, but it absorbs nicely into the skin after several minutes or so. With that being said, I highly recommend that you wait a little bit before going to bed so it doesnt rub off on your bedding. The scent is amazing - which is a plus. It smells like something they would use in a high-end spa. Im looking forward to continuing to use the product so that I can get the full results and benefits. I received this product for free in return for my honest opinion. With that being said, if this product sucked I would be more than happy to say it... but it didnt. It was actually a great product that I would be more than willing to spend my money on.
I didnt want to like this because its so expensive, but its seriously amazing. I got it as a sample in an order and fell in love with how thick it was, I just had to buy the whole thing.
product_name: ICE Ceramide Moisturizer with Vitamin F

review_text: I received a free sample of this product in exchange for an honest review, I love this moisturizer, it feels luxurious when applied, it is perfect for people like me who suffer from dry skin, it is a thick and smooth cream and it is not greasy.
product_name: ICE Ceramide Moisturizer with Vitamin F

review_text: The moisturizing creams amazing, makes my face very soft. Easy to use my skin feels vibrant
product_name: ICE Ceramide Moisturizer with Vitamin F

review_text: Im glad I came across this moisturizer. Its easy to apply and its lightweight. I have normal to dry skin. It smells good, doesnt feel heavy and moisturizes face really well. I have used it for a little over a month now and it helped my skin become more smooth, soft and even. I would recommend this to family and friends.
product_name: ICE Ceramide Moisturizer with Vitamin F

review_text: Im going to be blatantly honest here: when I found out I was getting this moisturizer, I wanted to hate it after looking up the price. In fact, from that moment I decided that I was going to judge it harshly. Why is a moisturizer so expensive?! Well, it is worth every penny! I love this moisturizer. It has a nice spa scent, and it really leaves your face soft and glowing after using it. And, its a good amount of product. Ive been using it day and night for two weeks, and thanks to the little scooper that comes with it, I still have a lot of cream left. Oh, and the fact that it comes with a sanitized way of getting the cream out of the jar with the spatula is awesome, too.
product_name: ICE Ceramide Moisturizer with Vitamin F

review_text: The only chapstick/lipgloss that works and actually moisturizes. Every other product I have ever tried only dries my lips and makes me feel addicted to the product. Every scent in this line is fabulous, my favorite is mint and grapefruit. Who needs gum or a mint when you have these natural scents on your lips?
review_title: Only lip moisturizer that doesn't dry my lips

review_text: Exactly what I was looking for! I dont like shine on my lips, and Im usually a Burts bees peppermint balm fan, but my fiance hates the smell and tingle of mint. So I heard about this, headed to my Sephora and I ended up buying the Eblack tea and blackberryE flavor, smells so good and works great! I only have to reapply it 2-3 times a day, so I think its pretty great!

This lip balm is insane! I woke up with cracked lips and peeling skin this morning and thought Id give my sample of this lip balm a shot and I am so glad I did! Immediately, I saw a difference. Good bye flaky lips! The scent and application is very soothing and long lasting. Other lip balms have made my lips feel worse or more chapped once the balm wears off. Not this one! It really healed my cracked, dry lips nearly immediately, leaving soft supple lips ready for a bold lipstick. This is my new staple to my winter survival kit- especially for the price!
My favorite lip balm ever! The only problem is my boyfriend keeps stealing it from me. I think I may have to buy him some for christmas :)
I love this product! The mint is pleasant without being overpowering, and my lips stay moisturized for hours. Having that layer of UV protection in a great lip balm is fantastic.

I dont know why anyone would dislike this product so much. I received this product complimentary to try. It hydrated and soothes my sensitive combination skin. I use it as part of my night routine and am obsessed with how rejuvenated my skin feels in the morning. It has reduced my redness and has not clogged my pores. I will definitely be adding this to my regular skincare routine.
review_title: Great for redness and combination skin

review_text: This Jet Lag mask was gifted by Summer Fridays and is so great and I think that since this mask is named this, I will really bring this on my plane trips in the future. In the meantime I use it at home, and so far my face feels soft and moisturized so I will keep trying this out.
This product is awesome and im always looking for safe products to use on my senstive skin Great quality and doesnt feel heavy on skin.its refreshing
review_title: Super hydrating and a must for skin care routine

review_text: I have tried the original and find it to be so hydrating and like a hug to your face. I love the packaging since it keeps the product clean and makes sure you get every last drop. I cant wait to try the new and improved version.

I use the mask at night and it leaves my skin super hydrated and glowy. I love that it is unscented as well. super interested in seeing how it works in the winter months when my skin is more dry. so far its good, but will be testing it our for a longer period of time.

Love this stuff. I have oily combination skin, and its not super sensitive for references purpose. This definitely gave me a new layer of new skin to work with and it got rid of most of my dark spots and Ive only used it twice over a period of a week. I consider myself dark skin, so its definitely brown girl friendly. Ive tried many high end brands with similar claims but their results always falls short, so I wasnt expecting much with this product, but damn it works! And youre skin will be glowing, even after the first use
review_title: Amazing, and not just for the price!

review_text: I have to say for someone who had extreme dry skin, especially in our deep freeze, this saved my life. After two days my skin improved a thousand fold. It cleared up my skin and finally allowed my moisturizer to finally sink in. My skin is now brighter, softer and more moisturized than ever before. Thank you, thank you, thank you!
review_title: This is the bomb for 52 years old and older!

review_text: This product has transformed my skin and I cannot go without it in my skincare routine. I always know when its been a few days without using this because my skin will get dry again. When I use it consistently, I have the most glowy and radiant skin that feels baby soft. The only downside is it causes my sensitive skin to react with a lot of redness, but it doesnt hurt so I can put up with it for that. Cant beat the price of this product either.

I love this product! I was diagnosed with keratosis pilaris (little bumps of hard skin) and the doctor recommended using lactic acid to treat it and I couldnt find it for years and saw this and have had amazing results my skin has almost smoothed out now!
Love this! I use it three times a week and it doesnt irritate my sensitive skin and its contributed to my skin clearing up

This cream feels so thick at first, but absorbs extremely quickly and unfortunately just does not moisturizer as much as youd think it would based off the initial feel. Ive used lighter feeling moisturizers that have done a better job at keeping my skin plump, soft and hydrated for longer
review_title: not as moisturizing as youd think
product_name: Lala Retro Whipped Refillable Moisturizer with Ceramides

review_text: I love that this product is rich and creamy and actually SOAKS in and works! I have seen results using drunk elephant products and this whipped moisturizer is worth all the pennies! I layer it over their night serum and its *chefs kiss*
product_name: Lala Retro Whipped Refillable Moisturizer with Ceramides

review_text: I wish I hated this product, its pricey but its worth it. Ive tried just about every moisturizer out there, this has been the only one that doesnt break me out. Ive tried a plethora of other drunk elephant products and not been that impressed (with the ordinary making virtually the same products for a fraction of the cost) but this is the one product I say is worth it.

review_text: There are a lot of ElightE moisturizers on the market already. What was the need to change the original formula? It is not as thick and moisturizing, has more of that watery feeling protini has, and overall feels like a different category of cream than the original Lala. Ive been using the original Lala for over 2 years now. Again, they already have a watery cream with Protini. There was no need to reformulate Lala. The packaging also feels cheaper. It kind of feels like their cheapening the ingredients and packaging to increase profit (which I hope isnt true). Bring back the original
product_name: Lala Retro Whipped Refillable Moisturizer with Ceramides

I am not at all one to write reviews but I created my username for reviews JUST to write a review on this product. I held out for months just to buy this exclusively at Sephora and when I finally was able to use this product I was unexpectedly disappointed from an issue I usually dont otherwise notice or prioritize in my cosmetic purchases.. Though I have no qualms with the products performance in the period of time I used it, I do have a major issue I need to warn potential buyers of: the smell. Its not necessarily a EbadE smell but its so concentrated and pungent it made trying to sleep a literal headache. Sometimes I can be a bit judgmental but knew I wasnt alone in my opinion when my partner commented (without me prompting him or mentioning I was trying out a new product) how noticeable the smell was even just sitting in bed together reading before bed. Before purchasing, I scoured the web for well examined reviews of this product and most described the smell as unnoticeable or even pleasant but I have to warn those on the fence: the smell was so powerful I had to return it. Had the smell been half the potency I would definitely have kept this but for now I will not be able to use this without drowning in a foul scent. An honest shame, I truly thought I was to become a new devotee. As for the 3/5 rating I dont think its fair to Elow ballE a rating from the smell, even if it was the main reason for my return.. Bottom line: Waking up with glowing skin is great, but not at the cost of my nose..
review_title: Great product if it weren't for...

review_text: This is by far one of the best, if not the best, serum Ive used. I have very dry skin and Ive learned that I need to use both water-based products and oil to make my skin happy. This serum is the perfect combo of both. Its also silicone-free which is a nice bonus. It leaves my skin very soft, hydrated, and overall healthy looking. I use it after a toner and before a moisturizer. I am prone to very stubborn clogged pores on my nose and chin and while this doesnt clear my pores, it doesnt make them worse either. The texture is very light and thin. It has little floating balls within it that breaks apart easily in your hands. Im not sure what ingredients are in them but it does work better when I make sure to include a few. I do find I have to shake up the serum so the balls are evenly distributed before I use the dropper. Now for the downside, this has a very strong perfume-like scent. I debated taking off a star for the fragrance but honestly this serum is so great I didnt. I have very sensitive skin and the fragrance hasnt caused irritation, it just smells strong. Its rare to find an expensive skincare product thats worth the money but Im on my third (maybe fourth?) bottle of this stuff and will continue to buy it. While expensive, one bottle lasts a few months and I use it twice a day, so it lasts awhile. If you have dry or dehydrated skin, I would definitely try this!
product_name: Mini Abeille Royale Advanced Youth Watery Oil

review_text: I have warm undertone skin. I get red under my nose, have small veins around my mouth, and easily get acne marks after a pimple on my cheeks. review_text: Great for hydrating. However, there are other creams at a way cheaper price that will be more efficient.

product_name: Mini CrA me de la Mer Moisturizer

review_text: It was ok. I was expecting a miracle to happen on my face for the price of this face cream. I think philosophy miracle worker and hope in a jar cream are a better. I just didnt see what the big hype is about. Same your money.
product_name: Mini CrA me de la Mer Moisturizer

review_text: Many years ago I used La Mer to help my skin with intense dryness due to an acne product. My constant flaky, dry, miserable looking skin is soft, supple, and looking so much better. Its worth every penny and then some.

review_text: This Dermalogica Daily Microfoliant Exfoliator is my favorite. It is easy to use and apply. This leaves my skin feeling so soft and clean. My skin looks bright and clear after the first use. I received this product free complimentary for testing purposes.

wanted to love this product. the first few days I used it I really liked how smooth my skin felt! after the first few uses though I broke out in little pimples all over :( it took me back to the days of apricot scrub. sadly this had to be thrown out

What can I say about this product? Its not the first time that I used so you can know that I love it. It has helped me so much, my skin is so bright and clean and all the dead skin is not with me anymore

This exfoliator was so gentle but effective! I love using it the day after a retinol application to help slough off any dry skin. It left my skin feeling so soft without being dehydrated, which is a big win for me. This was complimentary from Dermalogica Sampling.

This product was gifted to me by Dermalogica Sampling. This was something new to me and I was skeptical. I was pleasantly surprised with how soft my skin was after! I like the new concept of this exfoliant. I have sensitive skin and it did not irritate.

Doing skincare and licensed now for 20 years and I have to say this is a great product. Finish with Tatcha Water Cream and you are all set. Smooths complexion, moisturizes for an over all clean healthy glow! You WILL notice a difference within the first 3 washes/ combo water cream! That says it all!

review_text: I recently switched to this after noticing my normal face routine wasnt working anymore. I dont have enough wonderful things to say about this. Also alil goes along way!!

review_text: I use this and the water cream and have finally found what my face needed. This is absolutely amazing for my oily skin.

review_text: It smells so good and I love how my skin looks after using this
product_name: Mini Deep Cleanse Gentle Exfoliating Cleanser

review_text: Great product! I have sensitive, acne prone oily skin and this doesnt dry me out or make me breakout at all! Cleans very well but not too much, doesnt give me that right feelings. product_name: Mini Deep Cleanse Gentle Exfoliating Cleanser

review_text: I use this a couple times a week at night and it makes my skin super soft and refreshed and bright by morning! I misread when I bought this and thought it was an exfoliator but works just as well!!

I, like some of the other people that shared their reviews, use a Clarisonic and a daily exfoliator. I was also shocked when I saw all of the dead skin it removed. I have pretty sensitive skin and I didnt experience any irritation. Try this. You will be amazed at how much dead skin comes off. Why buy good products and makeup if youre putting it on dead skin?
Its been hard to find a product for my sensitive skin that is so gentle, like this one. Right after the first use I noticed how smooth, even and brightening this peel gel was on my skin! Love it!
Ive loved every PTR product Ive ever tried with the exception of this peeling gel. Yes, it balls up, but no, its not bc its exfoliating dead cells. Its nothing more than the product clumping together
exfoliates wonderfully! love to do it and put on a moisture mask after for a smooth refreshed feel
this made my skin so clean and smooth feeling. its not heavy and it has a light scent. I would possibly change the bottle top as I had a hard time getting the product out.

Been using this for about 4-5 weeks now. Definitely takes awhile to see any changes while using, so dont expect it to be a quick fix for anything. More like a long term tool to use. It is a bit on the expensive side so Ill use it for longer and see if its worth the price tag!
review_title: For those dedicated to their skincare game

review_text: I was nothing. I could have used water, and would have had the same effect. Ive used the mask, and it was the worst mask Ive ever used. Many other brands to try other than this one. Would never be worth the money you spend. It would be cheaper to get a really good facial.

I tried a sample of this for 2 nights and immediately noticed a difference in tone, texted, color and visual smoothness the second I applied this to my skin. I swear that IF there is a fountain of youth THIS Essence is drawn from that well. Along with my regular skin routine I start with this glorious Essence.I am a VIB Rouge member and have been one for 2 years now and have NEVER been offered luxurious products like this so this review is based off me walking into the store and asking for a small sample to try 2 times worth and I BOUGHT MYSELF the 11oz bottle... That is how much I love this product!!!!! So just it be clear I spend thousands of dollars with Sephora but this review and all my reviews are based off ME buying the products and using them not them being given to me for free to try and review (I guess thats why Im a rouge, no free samples are ever given to me, they like my money too much)

I love, love, love this product!! This is a must have!! I saw the difference right away the next morning. My skin feels hydrated and softer. Its quite expensive but if you want nice skin then this is the answer.
My skin feels so much softer and brighter after using it. Its kind of pricey but its worth it!

review_text: I received this product from Influenster. Since it was free, I only received 1 pad so its hard to really base the product on a 1 time use. review_text: Goop gifted me this exfoliator and its changed my skin! The windy, cold PA weather has done a number on my skin this winter and this exfoliator has been a LIFESAVER! review_text: Meh ... Not bad but not worth the price. There are plenty of other exfoliaters that work as well or better and where you get a lot more for your money.

review_text: Wonderful exfoliating product! If you are one that loves to exfoliate your skin I highly recommend giving this a try. Some exfoliating products are too a harsh on the skin. I was sent this to try and I waited to review until I had used it multiple times! Non-irritating & effective

review_text: i love looking like a lightbulb so when i got an email saying this product had hit the shelves i rushed to the store to purchase. it does smell like sunscreen but not overpowering which is a plus for me especially if im wearing perfume. but i think it just did an average job? after doing my skin care i put this on, then my BB cream/ cushion foundation. does it make my skin look dewy? yes. do i think i could achieve the same level of dew with hawaiian tropic sunscreen? yes. love that its a clean product though.

review_text: I dont know why anyone would dislike this product so much. I received this product complimentary to try. It hydrated and soothes my sensitive combination skin. review_text: This Jet Lag mask was gifted by Summer Fridays and is so great and I think that since this mask is named this, I will really bring this on my plane trips in the future. In the meantime I use it at home, and so far my face feels soft and moisturized so I will keep trying this out.
This product is awesome and im always looking for safe products to use on my senstive skin Great quality and doesnt feel heavy on skin.its refreshing

I use the mask at night and it leaves my skin super hydrated and glowy. I love that it is unscented as well. super interested in seeing how it works in the winter months when my skin is more dry. so far its good, but will be testing it our for a longer period of time.

review_text: really love this product! absorbs into the skin easily with no residue. a nice dry oil even for my combo/oily skin. would definitely purchase again.

I really appreciate that this brand is cruelty free and they also sustainably harvest the ingredients to make this oil which makes a positive difference for Mother Earth. The oil itself has a light rose scent and its a very pleasant texture. It absorbs efficiently into the skin and gives me a wonderful glow. My skin looks more alive since I began using this oil. I prefer to use it as the final step in my night time skin care routine. Whenever I use it I wake up the next day looking fresh and hydrated!

Ive been really enjoying using this oil. It makes my skin glowy without being greasy. Its very lightweight and gets absorbed quickly. The only thing is it does not really provide me enough hydration, so I need to use a moisturizer on top. The product doesnt really have any smell which is a big plus for me.

More like 10 stars. Amazing product made my skin glowing and within a week I could tell my skin was getting bouncier. I use 3-4 drops every night after cleanser. This bottle will go a loooooooong way. I will buy over and over again

Let me start by saying that I use this as my first cleanser. This cleanser is great to remove oil, dirt and makeup. I have oily acne prone skin and still love this! Because of my skin type I only use this as a first cleanser followed with my Cerave SA cleanser. Ive noticed a huge difference in skin since using this product. Little goes a long way not to mention you get so much product for only $10! Highly recommend!

If you are looking for a cleansing balm to help remove makeup then do not use this one. For me, one thing I need cleansing balms to help with is removing mascara remaining from the makeup remover I used. I use waterproof mascara and this cleanser struggles a lot with being able to remove any of it. If you want a cleansing balm for sensitive skin and a good price point without it needing to remove makeup then I would recommend this, especially for sensitive skin. Something to note is after I use it, my eyes do cloud and I do feel a slight film after washing with a second cleanser still.

I did not like this at all... it felt like washing my face with Vaseline. Im only keeping it cause Im too lazy to return and theres a lockdown in Toronto still. It might be okay to use just as a make up remover and then cleanse again with a different cleanser.

I did receive this product for free from Influenster and inkey for my honest review. Overall I think this product can be useful! The smell of the product is not necessarily bad but its also not great! I was not expecting the texture of it to also be kinda of like a Neosporin ointment. It did not take off my mascara but the removing the rest of makeup was great and easy to do! I will continue to try this product to see the long term affects it can have on my face!

Packaging sucks. The product is hard to get out but I do love this product for nights Im not wearing a ton of makeup. I put this in my labour hospital bag. will be such a life saver since its not as messy as a liquid oil cleanser

(Gifted by Dermalogica)

Its just the price for me because i used it a few times and im already done with half the bottle (this product was gifted by Dermalogica). Apart from the price this product is soo good. I received this product as a free sample, this cleaner i loved it, its like oily but it does not leave your skin oily, it leaves the skin soft. I love how it smells. I feel that after using it my skin is less greasy.

review_text: This is the best toner Ive used. Ive always had large pores and this is the first time I can actually see a difference in my pores after using it. It also helps exfoliate and gives my skin a glow which I need now that Im 50 and have noticed my skin getting dull.

MY FIRST TIME USING AND I LOVE IT THANK YOU TRENDMOOD

review_text: I heard good things about this cleaner so I tried the small size to give it a shot. I LOVE THIS FACE CLEANER. First off it smells great! Very clean, refreshing smell. Lathers well. Both when just using your hands or with the Clarisonic. Finally, it doesnt leave that dry stripped feeling on your face but definitely feels clean. I dont wear foundation so I can speak to how well it cleans off foundation but it cleans off my blush, highlighter and eye makeup very well including brow gel. I also love the glass bottle. Definitely can use it again for something else. I plan to buy the full size. Oh and a little goes a long way.

my new go to cleanser. i received the big bottle on Friday. love I can recycle the bottle into a hand soap dispenser. oily skin at 48 is a blessing (no wrinkles) and a curse...blackheads and whiteheads oh my!! my face feels so clean and healthy but not over striped. it drank in all thst Kale, green tea and Spinach.
review_title: who would think I'd like Kale??

review_text: Great gentle cleanser only giving 4 stars because not a big fan of the fragrance. It doesnt bother my skin even tho i tend to breakout from fragrance i think its just a weird smell
I have dry skin and it kind of does strip my skin but it leaves me feeling deeply cleansed. After I use it I use moisturizer to help with the dryness

LOVE!! I have struggled with acne for so long and I have really oily skin. While I still get breakouts, they are way smaller and less frequent. This cleanser makes my skin feel truly cleansed and I believe it is the reason my skin has cleared up so much!! I recommend this to anyone who asks me!!

I wear Shiseido Ultimate Sun Protection Lotion* to protect my fair/light skin. Its great, but it sticks to skin like tarnish on your best silver. This Clinique balm is the only thing Ive found that removes it easily. Shiseido recommends its Eoil cleanserE, but that formula is messy and well, oily. I very much prefer Cliniques silky smooth balm.*http://www.sephora.com/browse/product.jhtml?id=P173670&searchString=734681

review_text: I love this. I dont find that this takes off my mascara, but the rest of my makeup literally evaporates once I put this on. A little goes a long way, so I actually find this cheaper than the drugstore makeup wipes I was using before. I used to have makeup marks on my white towels, but now there is absolutely no makeup on my face! I have dry skin and have had no issues with this product drying out my skin.
product_name: Mini Take The Day Off Cleansing Balm Makeup Remover

review_text: Best makeup remover Ive ever used & ive used them all!! Gentle to your skin, doesnt dry your skin out!! Will continue to buy this product!!
product_name: Mini Take The Day Off Cleansing Balm Makeup Remover

review_text: Amazing at taking off stubborn eye makeup and waterproof products. It is very gentle around the eyes as well. I find I dont need a lot of product so the full size lasts me a long time. I will continue to repurchase.
product_name: Mini Take The Day Off Cleansing Balm Makeup Remover

review_text: I love this product particularly for my eyes! I dont use it all over my skin because I find it a little on the too oily side for my comfort but it just melts away my mascara! If you struggle to get off 100% of your mascara off your eyes this is deff something you need to try!
product_name: Mini Take The Day Off Cleansing Balm Makeup Remover

review_text: I received this product from influenster.LOVE THIS ESSENCE!! If it werent so dang expensive I would use it as my go to. It has an amazing light rice-wine like scent, and is very light but super plumping/hydrating. It works extremely well as an intermediate step in my skincare routine which is exactly what I need, maintaining proper moisture. Dont know what else to say but this is probably my favorite essence right now! And Ive tried many different ones from k-beauty and american brands alike.

review_text: i havent tried this product but i know there is a lot of hype over it. i wish they sold it in a mini or travel size before i spend 90+ dollars if i dont like it.
product_name: Mini The Essence Skincare Boosting Treatment

review_text: I received these products for free from Influenster and in exchange for my honest review. review_text: Miracle worker. Plumps my skins, and I notice an improvement in the way my skin takes in the serum or daily moisturizer. You dont need a lot.
product_name: Mini The Essence Skincare Boosting Treatment

review_text: Pricey; decent, but not great. I dont feel like it does a whole lot besides moisturize, and there are a plethora of essences out there with added benefits both at and below this price point.If you arent using anything at the moment and dont mind the splurge, this is a good, safe place to start. If youre willing to do a bit more research, you can definitely find better.
product_name: Mini The Essence Skincare Boosting Treatment

review_text: Such a unique and amazing moisturizer, smells and feels so nice on the skin! The water cream glides on and the water/moisture just melts into the skin. Love this product for days my skin needs lightweight moisture. Works excellent under makeup and SPF. I am a fan of so many Tatcha products, they have a line for all skin types, needs, and ages. If youre looking for a lightweight day time moisturizer I would highly recommend this product. For reference I am 41 yo with combo skin.

I received a deluxe sample and used it in its entirety before making this review. I found the texture to be lovely on application. I just didnt find it hydrating enough for my normal to dry skin in the winter. I dont think Ill be purchasing a full size, especially because of the cost.

I got this about two weeks ago and use it twice a day. My skin looks amazing! Ive always had pink splotchy skin with a slightly bumpy texture. The splotches are gone and my skin feels really smooth. Love it!
I love this product; I have combo skin that leans oily and this moisturizer works wonders on my normal skin and the oil zones.

I got this as a 100 perk and it was the full size that is priced at $68, definitely a steal there! The packaging, golden spatula and product itself was just so luxurious! For me, it absorbed really well, but it wasnt a wow for me. I didnt notice a difference with or without it. My mom (older skin) absolutely loves and it says it makes her face feel so hydrated! Her skin does look a lot fresher if that makes sense.
review_title: Luxurious but maybe not worth the price tag

review_text: This cream is great! You need need a lot, goes on smooth and leaves your skin feeling great! Most importantly, it doesnt break me out !! My skin has been clear for a week! I received this product free to test.
product_name: Mini Ultra Facial Moisturizing Cream with Squalane

review_text: Ive swapped my usual moisturizer out for the last couple of weeks and I love this moisturizer. Its perfect hydrating my dry skin during our cold and dry winter. I have sensitive skin and Ive not experienced any breakouts or irritation. If you struggle with dry sensitive skin Id say give it a try! Also a little goes a long way.
product_name: Mini Ultra Facial Moisturizing Cream with Squalane

review_text: I researched a lot as was looking for a new moisturizer but cannot try anything these days so only online reviews. I bought a full tub based on all the reviews. Its a good moisturizer but I would have preferred at least a light pleasant scent. I wish I had tried the smaller size first instead of the big tub I have now. I dont like unscented products but if you are someone who does, its a good one and looks like the tub is going to last a while. I cannot return it so but once i get through the tub I will be looking for something else
review_title: Moisturizes well but dont love it
product_name: Mini Ultra Facial Moisturizing Cream with Squalane

review_text: I love love love this cream. Its perfect for combo skin. In the summer, my skin goes towards the drier side and this is perfect. I use it in the morning and my skin is fresh and vibrant all day long. It has a great consistency and isnt greasy at all, which I have found with other face lotions. I would 100% buy again and recommend to a friend.
product_name: Mini Ultra Facial Moisturizing Cream with Squalane

review_text: I live in a very dry place, and this cream does the trick. Its thick but does not leave my skin oily or greasy, and does not cause breakouts. There is no scent which also makes it non-irritating even on the first use.
product_name: Mini Ultra Facial Moisturizing Cream with Squalane

review_text: I love the feel of this Unseen Sunscreen. Feels amazing and perfect for under makeup. I wear it by itself when working in the yard because it does a great job and doesnt sweat off. Dont forget to apply sunscreen to your ears thats valuable real-estate too!!
Absolutely love this sunscreen its light and it does its job!

Giving it two stars because it feels heavy on my face and suffocating to my skin. I put it on and as others have said it doesnt soak in. It doesnt feel like other primers that I have used with SPF. I can still feel it on my face. I got it because my skin is dry/oily. My T zone gets oily while my cheeks and neck get very dry. I tried Elta 46 for face but it dried out my cheeks and neck and I had very visible dry patches. I read it was because of the zinc oxide. So now Im back to square one trying to find a face sunscreen that works well under makeup and works well with my combo skin and doesnt feel like I have a face mask on. Ive tried Cerave AM and my makeup just slid right off.

I love that this is really unseen! It is also one of the few sunscreens that hasnt broke me out as my skin can be quite sensitive. Its a bit pricey which is why I took off one star but I would definitely repurchase as this sunscreen lives up to its name and exceeded my expectations.

Im a sunscreen junkie and have tried dozens of brands (LRP, Elta, etc.). However, this is my current favorite because it doesnt leave a white cast, moisturizes and soothes damaged/irritated skin, doesnt sting my eyes, and my normal foundation (NARS sheer or tinted moisturizer) applies beautifully. The texture is similar to your traditional AB sunscreen, but thicker and more luxurious. The result is hydrated and healthy looking skin.

I love this watermelon toner. It hydrates my skin without leaving a sticky feeling. I feel like my pores appear smaller. It has an amazing smell like a faint watermelon jolly rancher. My skin has been feeling smoother and less breakouts. I highly recommend it!
product_name: Mini Watermelon Glow PHA + BHA Pore-Tight Toner

review_text: Smells super nice, gives a nice slightly hydrating texture! I knew I shouldnt have held myself back from trying this for so long. I recommend to just putting it directly on your skin, without a cotton pad or etc to get all the benefits!
product_name: Mini Watermelon Glow PHA + BHA Pore-Tight Toner

review_text: I received this product as complimentary from Influenster. The product is incredible, my skin is so good right now. I have open pores and is smoother and brighter. I am very satisfied and now I am also a client.
product_name: Mini Watermelon Glow PHA + BHA Pore-Tight Toner

review_text: Maybe its just me , I hope maybe its just that my skin and the product were not compatible, anyways , I am really upset that it took me this long to figure it out . It started in February 2021 when I saw an ad for it and I purchased it for its pore tightening benefits or wtv . A week or two later , I see my skin break out like crazy , and I brush it off , because this isnt the first time Ive had a break out . I have a hyperpigmentation problem , but it usually disappeared in 1-2 months (the spots) . They never did . They stayed and accumulated and I got pimples in places that Ive never had pimples in and dark spots that never left . I blamed the pandemic stress & masks . And mid December 2021 I decided to just stop using my toner and stick to my cleanser and moisturizer. And my hyperpigmentation started fading early Jan 2022 (now) . I know so because I started taking pictures of my profile and face the second I got a break out and hyperpigmentation due to the product. I took them every few months or so and I took them again today and I went back and compared to see what I did differently and it is all adding up . I dont know . If the product doesnt seem to like you at first, maybe its a sign & im just a fool. First pic is feb 2021 when I first started noticing & second pic is dec 2021 a week or two before I decided to stop using it. + it didnt do anything special to my pores , I just kept on using it because I wanted a toner.
review_title: This product messed my skin up for around a year
product_name: Mini Watermelon Glow PHA + BHA Pore-Tight Toner

review_text: I found this toner is very gentle and can be used daily morning and night, it smells really nice and for application I used to use a cotton pad but theres so much waste with those and theyre not good for the environment (production) so I just shook some into my palm, as recommended, but the first time I thought I needed more than the couple drops I initially got and wasted a bit of product... You really dont need a lot and its better to go back to it twice than to take too much out at once. I feel like like it does what the name says, my pore feel smaller and less noticeable and my skin feels hydrated after application.
product_name: Mini Watermelon Glow PHA + BHA Pore-Tight Toner

review_text: This product didnt work for me. I used it properly and didnt see or feel a anything! It definitely didnt exfoliate my skin...cant say that it did anything special. I was excited to try it at first but its...seems like a off brand (not drug store brand but stuff you get in gag gift sets) skin care product with fillers and ingredients that just filled the tube up. Totally disappointed!
product_name: Mini Yo Glow AHA & BHA Facial Enzyme Scrub

review_text: I was looking for a new exfoliator because Farmacy discontinued their New Day rice grains scrub. This one popped up and had glowing reviews. - Packaging:By the shape of the tube I thought it was eco friendly packaging too so win-win. It turns out to be plastic but they made it look like an aluminum tube. - Alcohol and Perfume in Ingredients:I dont have sensitive or acne-prone skin, but this scrub broke me out. After the first day, there were small bumps, and by 2nd day I had 3 red acne spots from just one use. My face after washing felt dry and tight, and honestly didnt feel cleaned at all. It also left my face smelling like IE d used overly scented body wash. The effect where it feels like youre scrubbing off dead skin is also part of the ingredient. I dont know why this product is labeled Eclean at SephoraE but it felt like a gimmicky product and not true skincare.

review_text: Such an amazing item for exfoliating!! It is very gentle which I love. I do exactly as recommended, I use it on clean dry skin and it feels so good. I love that I can feel the small enzymes working and smoothly resurfacing my skin. I also love the ingredients it contains. My skin is very dry and this product works amazing on it, and no irritation. After a few uses everyone keeps saying how amazing my skin looks. Thank you so much for making this product Huda Beauty. Ai
product_name: Mini Yo Glow AHA & BHA Facial Enzyme Scrub

review_text: Just wow. This stuff is so gentle but you can literally feel the dead skin pilling away. I have incredibly sensitive skin and I have not gotten any reactions from this! Not heavily scented (no scent I think) like their other products.
product_name: Mini Yo Glow AHA & BHA Facial Enzyme Scrub

review_text: Great scrub! Ive been using it now for almost a month I use it approximately twice per week. I have acne prone sensitive skin and this does not irritate it at all! review_text: Stuff lasts forever. Super moisterizing, smells great. Invest in this than rather buying dollar chapsticks.
I really like this product. It gives a sheen to lips without making them shiny. Now if it just wouldnt melt in the heat!

I usually use the regular baklm, but figured Id try this minted rose, as i am addicted to Bigelow and Victoria Secret mint glosses. There is really only the faintest hint of mint, its more like a menthol and alot of rosebud. Its not bad, but not exactly minty. Does leave my lips lfeeling refreshed and looking glossy and it lasts awhile. I just dont love that it comes in a pot. so unhygienic for a girl with a weak immune system like me!!

I use it on my lips of course, but also my hands or flyaway hair in a oinch. Very soothing and tingly. Ive tried the other EflavorsE but the minted rose will always be my favorite. I keep them everywhere - all purses, the car, pockets of favorite coats, :)
review_title: A Classic. I cannot live without it.

review_text: I absolutely love this balm! Heard about it from a friend and Im glad I bought it. It smells nice, feels like satin on my lips, slight tingle from the mint which is great, and its priced great too! Ill be stocking up on this.
I have extremely dry skin and was very pleased to see how long my skin stayed moisturized after using this cream. It was light yet very effective.

it is nice. i received this as a sample from influenster, it was a sample size( very small). for me it was ok i did not felt much difference in my skin because the product was very little. My sample finished in 5 days so i cant see much difference in my skin.
I have been using this for over a week now and love it so far! Recently gave birth and my face has been dry and going through it. This really helped hydrate and give a glow to my skin.

I received this as a free sample and I love love love it! Unlike alot of hydrating serums have an oily finish and this one doesnt at all. It leaves my skin feeling fresh and replenished. Highly recommend this product!

I received my Clinique Moisture Surge replenishing hydrator and I must say that it is a really great product to use on your skin. I love it! I like how my skin looked after only two days of using it. I would definitely recommend this product to anyone who wants to make their skin shine.

After my first use, I thought this eye cream was too thick and rich. I was super paranoid about getting milia, so I wanted to stay away from anything that was too emollient for my eyes. Even though it felt super rich in the beginning, it gets absorbed very quickly, leaving the area around my eyes soft and supple. I also like to mix a tiny bit of it with my concealer and it just smooths out my concealer perfectly. It adds moisture, feels refreshing, and I definitely recommend it.

It left my under eyes feeling really hydrated, and the product isnt heavy or sticky at all. Unfortunately I only got to try it a few times because of the size of the sampleE" I will say that $48 for the full size is a bit steep, so Im not sure that I would repurchase this on my own.

Product is amazing!!! This was my second purchase of this goodness. Keeps my eyes super hydrated. It was shocking! Wont use anything else.

review_text: I love this product!! I received a free sample from Influenster. It smells amazing and is perfect for the morning. My under eye is brighter and I will continue to use this product. Safe for sensitive skin.
Meh. It works better as an eye primer than a moisturizer...It just doesnt hydrate enough for me and its super sticky.

I had high hopes for this one but Im at the end of my bottle & dont feel confident that this particular serum helped much. I do use several products & never miss my skincare routine day & night so I have had steady improvements. I dont think I will repurchase this one. I will likely go for the more expensive, more potent similiar one. If I feel Im missing something after I trade this one out, I will update my thoughts. I do think its a nice serum but I might just need something else. I do absolutely love The Ordinary so I will continue trying to perfect my routine with their many affordable & effective options.

Ok ok ok. Why did I wait so long to try this!!?? I am pregnant and have been looking for a good retinol alternative. After being disappointed with some VERY expensive products I decided to give this a try because I love love love all the ordinary products and this one definitely has found a new home in my line up. I love it!! Its helped everything from pregnancy acne to fine lines to dryness. I will keep using this even after pregnancy. Im in love!!

Yep this works. I normally use Drunk Elephant serums and Stratia products and still have dry patches of skin occasionally unless I do a mask or peel pads. I added this as an extra serum in the morning, and my skin is softer more consistently than it ever has been. This is a lucky find.

je lutilise matin et soir et ma peau est beaucoup plus hydratA et moins rouge aprA s une journAe A porter le masque, je recommande pour les personnes qui doivent porter un masque/couvre visage toute la journAe
Very good afforable peptide serum. Works well both morning and night.
Perfect moisturizer for my skin. Use it as part of my daily routine.

Im loving how soft my face feels after using this product plus some of the ordinarys other serums together! I wish I could give it 5 stars, but it feels kind of heavy when you put it on. This moisturizer is awesome! Great consistency and works very well under makeup. My skin gets really dry so I like to supplement my moisturizer with a face oil - and this moisturizer works very well with my face oils. Plus its so affordable! This product has amazing value

OMG I love it. I have tried so many moisturizers, and this one left my skin, feeling amazing in seconds. And for the price to it was a steal. I love the consistency it went from a thick formula to feeling lightweights.i14 hydrating. i14 OMG I love it.YY

I love this product, since beginning to use it I have noticed significant difference in the amount of breakouts and acne on my face. I still get the occasional pimple but this controls the worst of it. This product has made a positive change to my acne-prone skin within days. I use it after cleansing and before moisturizer in the day and differin gel at night. Was really struggling to find a product that helped with acne - this has done that, as well as brighten and even my skin tone. Cant recommend enough!

review_text: I use this twice a day before moisturizing and it has done really well for me. My face has been clear and my pores have not been as clogged. I like that it does not dry my face out and while the texture is sticky, it dries just fine. I cannot be without this now and love that it comes in a bigger size!

I bought this when I was breaking out nonstop for reasons unknown! This saved me - after one week of use my pimples were visibly smaller and the breakouts stopped. So happy! And the serum is very light, you dont need too much of it, so it lasts a long time.
review_title: Lifesaver! Helped with my random breakout

review_text: I love the way this makes my skin feel after it dries down...so insanely smooth. It does a great job with reducing blemishes and pores. I havent noticed any reduction in redness yet, but Ill definitely be buying more as soon as I run out.

Let me start by saying that I use this as my first cleanser. This cleanser is great to remove oil, dirt and makeup. I have oily acne prone skin and still love this! Because of my skin type I only use this as a first cleanser followed with my Cerave SA cleanser. Ive noticed a huge difference in skin since using this product. Little goes a long way not to mention you get so much product for only $10! Highly recommend!

If you are looking for a cleansing balm to help remove makeup then do not use this one. For me, one thing I need cleansing balms to help with is removing mascara remaining from the makeup remover I used. I use waterproof mascara and this cleanser struggles a lot with being able to remove any of it. If you want a cleansing balm for sensitive skin and a good price point without it needing to remove makeup then I would recommend this, especially for sensitive skin. Something to note is after I use it, my eyes do cloud and I do feel a slight film after washing with a second cleanser still.

I did not like this at all... it felt like washing my face with Vaseline. Im only keeping it cause Im too lazy to return and theres a lockdown in Toronto still. It might be okay to use just as a make up remover and then cleanse again with a different cleanser.

I did receive this product for free from Influenster and inkey for my honest review. Overall I think this product can be useful! The smell of the product is not necessarily bad but its also not great! I was not expecting the texture of it to also be kinda of like a Neosporin ointment. It did not take off my mascara but the removing the rest of makeup was great and easy to do! I will continue to try this product to see the long term affects it can have on my face!

Packaging sucks. The product is hard to get out but I do love this product for nights Im not wearing a ton of makeup. I put this in my labour hospital bag. will be such a life saver since its not as messy as a liquid oil cleanser

It Really Works! I was surprised when I woke up in the morning to find everything it extracted from my nose. To prove it actually works I put one on my husbands nose, his nose would really put these strips to the test. I was amazed when the strip came off, Ive never seen his nose so clear. We had no trouble sleeping with is and its sticky enough to not fall off at night.
Id give it 10 stars if I could!!!!
These are insane! Almost embarassing how much they sucked off my face. I really love Peace Out products in general and this is another great one!

I love putting these on before bed and waking up to see all the nastiness sucked out of my skin. They definitely make an observable difference in the size of my pores and loosen up any impacted dirt and oil, which makes extraction easier too.

This smoothes out my pores so well! I wear it over night on my nose and forehead and everything was soft and the pores were noticeably smaller. It sucked out all of the grease. Although I do feel like you should wear it all night and not just for the 4 hours.
