Easy to apply, and left my skin feeling hydrated with a soft glow to it. Almost like Id just left the spa. Will be purchasing more in the future!!!

I have extremely sensitive skin and found this product to be really soft and soothing. The smell is so nice... like bubblegum! If you have eczema like me, Id recommend pairing it with a good moisturizer afterwards just to keep your face nice and hydrated. I received this product complimentary for testing purposes, which hasnt influenced my review in any way.

Works really great to remove my makeup and is soft enough to use on my eyes and my lips (eyeliner, mascara, lipstick, concealer, etc.). I have a very sensitive skin, particularly my eye areas, and I never experienced anything bad with this cleansing balm like many others Ive tried. The smell is soft and does not stay after you remove it with water. The consistency is oily when you touch it (does not leave an oily effect on the skin), but melts easily while rubbing your makeup areas. Even though 42$ may seem expensive, every penny is worth this product. You dont need a lot of product to remove your makeup and the quantity last a very long way.
product_name: Papaya Sorbet Smoothing Enzyme Cleansing Balm & Makeup Remover

review_text: I received this from influenster, but I was going to buy it anyways! I love this brand, its easily one of my favorites. This cleansing balm has become my new favorite first step in my double cleansing night routine. It smells delicious and takes whatever the day has thrown at my skin off! Even after one use I had the most radiant and beautiful skin!
product_name: Papaya Sorbet Smoothing Enzyme Cleansing Balm & Makeup Remover

review_text: This is so gentle while also removing every ounce of makeup! I love it!
product_name: Papaya Sorbet Smoothing Enzyme Cleansing Balm & Makeup Remover

review_text: If I could give it zero stars I would! This is the worst cleansing balm Ive ever used. I bought it because of all the hype over itE"overhyped and overrated! If I could return it I would in a heartbeat, but unfortunately, I live overseas and returning is too much of a hassle. It smells amazing, but thats the only positive I could find. It doesnt emulsify very well, doesnt even breakdown light makeup, can only imagine how bad this would underperform with those that wear heavy makeup. I wear light tinted moisturizer and occasionally wear some mascara. I literally have to rub continuously, to the point that they get irritated and guess what?? this still doesnt break it down enough for it to come off. I normally use Farmacy Green Clean and will definitely go back to that one. Dont waste your money on this oneE"not worth a $0.01 at all.
product_name: Papaya Sorbet Smoothing Enzyme Cleansing Balm & Makeup Remover

review_text: I have been transformed from makeup wipes to this product! I had never used a cleansing balm before and I was amazed that it melted all my makeup off. The scent was magnificent and it left my skin feeling buttery smooth. I will purchase this again!
product_name: Papaya Sorbet Smoothing Enzyme Cleansing Balm & Makeup Remover

review_text: This product is amazing. Love that its not too thick. Hydrates my skin really well. Makes my skin super soft. Just need to ensure to use the right amount. If you use too much it does tend to get a bit sticky on my skin.
I really like this moisturizer! I typically use it at night before bed- my skin feels smooth and hydrated after use, as well as when I wake up the next morning. Another good one from GR!

I received this product that Ive used many times in the past opened. The seal was broken 1/2 the product was missing. I am not comfortable using this product knowing it was either not package correctly or was returned to the store for resale.
I love Glow Recipe and especially this moisturizer! Its so creamy and smooth and melts into your skin like butter.

Awe, Glow Recipe how I love you! The packaging is always spot on and the texture is heaven. Smells great and my skin craves the hydration. I love a good hyaluronic acid because in the cold winter months my skin always needs a boost.

This serum did a great job at adding that extra boost of hydration my skin so desperately needs. I love the packaging and the pump. Glow recipe does a great job at putting out a quality product! I received this product for free from influenster for testing purposes, in exchange for my honest review.

This serum is GREAT. I wasnt expecting much from hyaluronic acid serums, because I have the one from TO and I think it works great for the price. However, the difference from this serum was crazy! I brought it on a beach trip, and my skin never got flaky once (which always happens). It felt very smooth and silky upon application, and kept my skin so hydrated and plump. Also the cute packaging doesnt hurt!

I really like the smell and packaging is so cute. I think its worth the price because a little goes a long way! Dont overdo it it will get sticky, but Im on day 2 so Ill have to update later! So far so good

Love the bottle and that its a squirt bottle. The fragrance isnt too strong which is nice. The consistency of the serum feels really good on my skin and I feel moisturizer after using it. I would recommend this product gifted by Glow recipe.

This is by far the best hydrating serum ever created. It leaves your skin hydrated and dare I say it plump, smooth and supple. I recommend applying it to damp skin to eliminate the sticky feel you may experience. A little goes a long way. I only have one complaint. The pump on this sometimes doesnt release the product, which is why I gave it 4 stars instead of 5. If the price is too rich for your blood. Go on Mercari and you will find a lot of sellers selling this item brand new and unopen for almost 40% cheaper. Thank me later!

I have been using this for about 5 weeks now and feel like I dont have to wear as much make-up. I just started using the good genes twice a day and Im trying to figure out if that is the right combo or not. I like the Luna, but feel like the good genes is better for my skin. I rab
product_name: Power Couple Advanced Retinol and Lactic Acid Duo

review_text: I bought a bottle of Luna last year and loved it, I was due for a new bottle when I saw this kit. Ive been wanting to buy Good Genes anyway, Ive had samples and loved it, so this kit combines both, perfect!
product_name: Power Couple Advanced Retinol and Lactic Acid Duo

review_text: For acne prone skin or skin with discoloration, spots, and skin that is uneven due to scarring, this product is the key. I have been using this for 1.5 months now and my skin has never looked this good. Skin is supple, firm, free from discoloration, and doesnt add oiliness. Yes, the smell is strong and not the best, but the results are COMPLETELY worth the smell. Order and enjoy! I just received the second set and I have discontinued and thrown out all other night products except for eye-creams. The price is worth the self-esteem I have gained. Hello to makeup-less skin this summer!
review_title: AMAZING - Reordered and will continue to do so
product_name: Power Couple Advanced Retinol and Lactic Acid Duo

review_text: I have been using luna and good genes together at night twice a week for about two months. Good genes stings badly the first uses, but i guess your skin gets used to it and it doesnt sting anymore. I have noticed that the pores on my nose and around it look smaller and my skin is soft in the mornings although it feels a bit dry. I dont think it has done much more than that, not sure if I will repurchase.
product_name: Power Couple Advanced Retinol and Lactic Acid Duo

review_text: Took me a while before i decided to purchase it. a few reviews said they had breakouts after using it. Well I bought it anyway. I have been getting lots of breakouts in the past few months and leaving scars n dark pigments behind. Didnt know what to do. So I thought to give this a try. The Good Genes smelled like lemony ginger but I was fine with it. I dont know what it did after a night of applying both products as it instructed. But when I applied my foundation and make up the next day, my face just looks different: make up looks much smoother and cleaner. Maybe there was some brightening as well. My pimples still came and went for the next couple of weeks after started using them. But around the third week it started clearing off. Luna smells like herbal oil but I dont have a problem with that. Its not that strong. So far Im loving these products they keep my face smooth for make up and I am not using as much make up for coverage. Just a bit small for the Good Gene portion size. But its for trial so I dont expect it to last as long as the bottle sold alone. I will buy the Good Genes after Im finished with this one.
product_name: Power Couple Advanced Retinol and Lactic Acid Duo

review_text: The first cleanse is my favorite step in my evening skincare routine. This is a very gentle, lightly scented first cleanse that does a great job removing my makeup and sunscreen. It doesnt leave behind a film or make my face feel right or dry. I always follow up with a second cleanser or you could probably just use this cleanser twice. Im enjoying it a lot! (Gifted by Dermalogica)
I wasnt too impressed.... I found that it left my skin oily.

I love this brand and it has some of my fav cleansers and face masks. This cleansing oil completely took of my makeup and I even started using it after workouts to remove buildups. It does a great job of cleansing away all the dirt and gunk. Its not stripping, its fragrance free and hydrating. Its just the price for me because i used it a few times and im already done with half the bottle (this product was gifted by Dermalogica). Apart from the price this product is soo good. Def recommend to try it at-least once.

This product was gifted by Dermalogica. One of the best first cleanses! I love a cleansing balm but I find that it often gets in my contacts and messes with my vision. This one is the perfect solution - takes my makeup off without stripping!

I received this product as a free sample, this cleaner i loved it, its like oily but it does not leave your skin oily, it leaves the skin soft. I love how it smells. I feel that after using it my skin is less greasy.

This has always been my go to moisturizer, I will always love it and recommend it. However, theres just nothing special to it. At times I can still feel like the dry patches in my skin, even after using a full pump. Its a great consistency and I love the texture, but I think its time for me to start shopping for something a bit more hydrating.Again, I still fully recommend the product and think its definitely worth a try if you have your eye on it!

I liked this but I didnt love it $70 worth. I used it with the Beste No. 9 Jelly Cleanser and the drunk Elephant Retinol. I liked how it made my skin feel, and while altogether I didnt feel like my skin was totally changed, I would say I had medium results. However, I dont think I would recommend this product because of the packaging. It... looks like a butt. Okay? Okay. Someone had to say it! And then you have no conception of how much product you have left, which is why I think theres many people saying they went through this super fast. Truly, I dont know why its designed this way! Why make your product come out of a butt contraption that no one knows how much theyre really using? Drunk elephant, maybe a little too drunk in designing the bottle...

This stuff is luxurious and makes my skin feel great. My acne has almost completely cleared up. I used a regimen from drunk elephant but this cream was a must. Im not into the popular water creams. My skin needs a lil more hydration and this is it!

It has such high rate so I bought the product to try. I have comination skin, dry under my eyes. This cream just sits on my skin, it will not absorb. It gives you a grassy heavy feeling. I tried with different toner and serum but still doesnt work. I dont understand the hype of it, its not for me.

I would absolutely recommend this cream to anyone. I bought this after endlessly looking for a moisturizer that would really help out my combo/dry skin without being too heavy and breaking me out, and this is it! Although it is a little pricey for me, it is still totally worth it.
This cleanser is perfect for normal skin. I love using it in the morning or at night after using a cleansing balm. Overall, this cleanser is great for anyone who wants to maintain good skin.

I first purchased this product upon recommendation from one of the Sephora employees at the local store. I was looking for a facial sunscreen with at least a 30 SPF which led me to this line of products. The face cleanser is good, but a bit drying. However, paired with FAB 5 in 1 Face Cream (30 SPF), it works rather well. I havent had a painful acne breakout since I started using both products. Also, a little bit goes a long way. Its the end of October and I havent had to start using the tube I just purchased through the site.
this leaves your face feeling and smelling very clean without drying or tightness of the skin.
This is a great cleanser. It removes make-up and cleans my face remarkably well. I keep it in the shower for everyday cleansing.

Because it was meant for sensitive skin. It works great! I have been looking for a face wash that will get rid of the very few facial blemishes I get.What is great is one time after I moved halfway across the country I realized I only had this face wash, shampoo, and conditioner but no body wash. So I ended up using my face wash and after a couple of days the face wash cleared up all these red patchy parts on my arms that Ive had for years and couldnt get rid of. I was amazed.I love this product! I would suggest it to anyone with sensitive skin. I would also suggest it to be used on on other skin blemishes. It works wonders.

Ive been using this toner for about a month now and I really wanted to love it. Unfortunately, it leaves my face a sticky, shiny mess. I very rarely have breakouts, but since using this Ive started breaking out all across my forehead. Very disappointed.
product_name: Ready Steady Glow Daily AHA Tonic

review_text: This is the best toner Ive used. Ive always had large pores and this is the first time I can actually see a difference in my pores after using it. It also helps exfoliate and gives my skin a glow which I need now that Im 50 and have noticed my skin getting dull.
product_name: Ready Steady Glow Daily AHA Tonic
Ready Steady Glow Daily AHA Tonic

review_text: my mine is blown by this product I just bought my second bottle, it helps to fade dark spots and I have noticed my pores getting smaller in just 2 weeks of using this product.
product_name: Ready Steady Glow Daily AHA Tonic

review_text: Made my skin feel gross and dirty after use.
product_name: Ready Steady Glow Daily AHA Tonic

review_text: Wow do I love this stuff.... forsureee a product to buy on repeat!!

This products is quite disappointing, and nothing like those 5 stars reviews are ravening about (on that topic, Im not convinced these are real, honest reviews). I gave 2 stars out of 5 cause it is moisturizing, and it does seem to somehow smooth out lines and wrinkles after being applied, though it doesnt have any lasting effect imo. This is possibly due the fact that the product doesnt seem to be absorbed by the skin, at all. On top of being hard and awkward to apply, it remains sticky and clearly visible. Tbh, it feels like applying lip balm to the contour of your eyes. If youre into that, save your money and just smear your eyes out with your best lip balm, itll be the same.
review_title: Don't trust all these 5 stars reviews

review_text: I work at a sephora but bought this with my own money! I saw it on the app and thought it was such a neat product and thankfully my store carries it. So I immediately bought it. Retinol is so good for anti aging and our eye area ages first so I really wanted to try it. Ive used it a few nights now and really love it! It feels like not much on when you swipe it but in the AM my under eyes feel so smooth and hydrated without leaving a film on the skin. Really enjoying it and I cant wait to see what other cool products they release next.

Gifted by Peace out skincare. Great retinol eye product! My eye area is very sensitive,and I have had retinol make the area around my eye look awful so I am glad this eye stick is so gentle ,and really helps with dark circles. I also love that its in a stick form! Super cool! I would definitely recommend!
After several weeks I noticed obvious results! so far very happy with the product! Really like the convenient application!
I enjoyed this mousturizer. It nourished and hydrated my 50 year old skin. I like to use this at night due to the density. This would be great in Winter.
product_name: Revitalizing Supreme+ Youth Power Creme Moisturizer

review_text: This product is perfect for my dry winter skin. I have combo skin but in the winter I stay very dry. The extra moisture boost that this provides is amazing. And the smell is a nice bonus too!! I received this product as part of promotion. However my opinion is my honest and true opinion.
review_title: Perfect for my dry winter skin
product_name: Revitalizing Supreme+ Youth Power Creme Moisturizer

review_text: I received a sample of Revitalizing Supreme+ Youth Power Creme Moisture and I love it. I feel a difference as soon as I put it on. My skin was tight on touch. It does everything it promised. I highly recommend you at least trying this moisturizer.
review_title: Revitalizing Supreme+ Youth Power Creme Moisturize
product_name: Revitalizing Supreme+ Youth Power Creme Moisturizer

review_text: Its good! Helps keep me moisturized all day. Ive used less then a month so not sure if I see a difference but it sits well with all other products in my routine
product_name: Revitalizing Supreme+ Youth Power Creme Moisturizer

review_text: After 3 weeks of using this product Ive learned some things. 1. Its a great moisturizer! Its thick but not sticky and has a light pleasant scent. And 2. It did absolutely nothing for my skin other than a normal moisturizer. I am getting older and noticing small fine lines and was really hoping this would be THE product. I wont be buying in the future however maybe with long continuous use one would notice a difference.
product_name: Revitalizing Supreme+ Youth Power Creme Moisturizer

review_text: Love this moisturizer. It is light, smells amazing and makes my skin glowing. I will continue to use this everyday and would definitely recommend it to my friends. I received this product complimentary from Fresh in exchange for my honest opinion.
product_name: Rose & Hyaluronic Acid Deep Hydration Moisturizer

review_text: used this for around four days, and my skin broke out like never before. My family thought i was having an allergic reaction, since i have never been acne-prone. It has a heavy fragrance, so if you have sensitive skin i do not recommend.
product_name: Rose & Hyaluronic Acid Deep Hydration Moisturizer

review_text: I was hesitant to try this moisturizer because I have used Fresh skincare products in the past and didnt like them because they were so heavily fragranced, however, I really liked this moisturizer and did not find that the rose scent was overbearing. I felt that it really nourished and hydrated my skin without making it feel sticky and I liked that it didnt pill under my sunscreen, because I have that issue with 80% of moisturizers I try, so overall this was a win. I cant wait to see how my skin looks after continued use.
product_name: Rose & Hyaluronic Acid Deep Hydration Moisturizer

review_text: This product was gifted to me complimentary by Fresh. This Rose Fresh Deep Hydration moisturizer works great. Super moisturizing on my face and has a very fresh soft scent. Super cooling and drys very easy.
product_name: Rose & Hyaluronic Acid Deep Hydration Moisturizer

review_text: Whose not obsessed with this moisturizer its smooth durable & lustrous of a rose scent. This was gifted for testing purposes. This cream smells like a short trip to a Turkish bath. Super authentic & packaging is a classic to the fresh line.
product_name: Rose & Hyaluronic Acid Deep Hydration Moisturizer

review_text: I started using this after about a week of resting my skin after drying out my face with a particular other brand toner for about a week before realizing my face was starting to feel like construction paper. After about day 3 of using this FRESH toner I could already feel my face coming back to life. Im impressed and a fan for sure.
review_title: Brought my skin back from the Sahara.
product_name: Rose & Hyaluronic Acid Deep Hydration Toner

review_text: I just finished my very first bottle. As someone who has sensitive skin, I really love that this toner doesnt have any alcohol in it. I am very susceptible to contact dermatitis as a result of makeup and skincare products, and I had no negative reaction to this toner whatsoever. I use Dr. Jarts Ceramidin Serum and Moisturizer, which keeps my skin hydrated, but doesnt do much else. My skin was soft, but quite dull and imperfect with just a serum and moisturizer, and when I started using the toner I notice my pores were smaller, my skintone was more even -- my skin looked great. The only thing it didnt address was the redness around my nose. Also, when I got to the the last quarter of my bottle (which I think is a significant amount), the rose petals physically blocked the remaining toner from coming out. I used a knife, picked off the top of the bottle, and just held a cotton ball to the opening for the remainder, but that was quite annoying.
review_title: Great, but rose petals block last 1/4 of toner
product_name: Rose & Hyaluronic Acid Deep Hydration Toner

review_text: My skin gets super dry in the winter and adding this to my morning and night face wash routine has helped so much. It smells like a garden of roses.
product_name: Rose & Hyaluronic Acid Deep Hydration Toner

review_text: Very subtle scent. A refreshing yet moisturizing toner. An absolute pleasure to use.
product_name: Rose & Hyaluronic Acid Deep Hydration Toner

review_text: The pretty rose petals caught my eye, and I love anything rose scented so I said Ewhy not just give it a try?E. So glad that I did! Ive tried other toners that have made my skin feel really tight and dry... This toner makes my skin feel soft, moisturized and refreshed. I actually look forward to my night time skin care routine just because I love this toner that much. I never skip it. My skin very rarely breaks out since Ive started using this, and the scent is also very relaxing to me. New night time skincare routine staple.
product_name: Rose & Hyaluronic Acid Deep Hydration Toner

review_text: I got the as a free complimentary gift from Influenster... but that does not mean this review is bias at all. I actually love this so much Ill be repurchasing it!!! It make my skin looks so smooth, glowy, and my complexion was so much more even than it usual is. And it smells so good! I absolutely love it.
Ive used this mask for a few nights now and Im in love! My skin feels so good the next morning. Its super easy to apply and smells so good!
Leaves my face feeling amazing in the morning!

I received this product as a free gift from Influenster and Fresh- but I can honestly say that its made a believer out of me. Im not one for a 30 step nightly routine so I thought that adding this mask this mask might just be a waste of time. I was wrong. It doesnt take long to apply and its not super sticky or annoying when Im trying to sleep. Plus, when I wake up my skin feels softer, smoother and more plump. Im obsessed with this product.

LOVE THIS !!! The sleeping mask is so essential to a good skin routine. I woke up feeling refreshed and glowing. I love that it comes with two different moisturizing items, one gel and one lotion. The sleeping mask smells nice and just like other rose products from Fresh. Both sides feel lightweight, not greasy and absorb quickly without leaving stickiness/tackiness or oiliness on my skin.
It hydrates well, but sort of not worthy the price. Id rather add some money to get black tea.

I have extremely dry skin and blemish prone skin and I adore this mask. I love it because it is super hydrating and leaves my skin feeling soft and plump. It is also super soothing, so when my skin is feeling irritated this feels like heaven, and my complexion is much more even after I use it. It has a light cucumber-y scent and a cooling sensation. I usually leave this on while Im watching tv or doing something around the house for longer than the suggested time. I usually leave it on for about an hour with no problems.
This stuff works! It makes your skin sooo soft and smooth. The only thing is, its kinda expesnive

When I first bought this and opened it, I thought Ewhat have I done? $55 for this?E It looks terrible in the jar, but does wonders for my face. It eases the redness and makes my skin feel so soft. I love this product!
review_title: Helps reduce redness on my fair skin

review_text: Received this as a sample, and I really am enjoying it. Super light-weight, and a little goes a long way. Left my face looking extremely fresh, bright, and moisturized. May just have to purchase the full size when Im done.

Picked this up near the checkout, honestly as an afterthought. This stuff is incredible. While Im never a huge fan of lip balms in tins, this just makes my lips so moisturized and comfortable. Matte lipsticks have become easier to apply since Ive started using this. For this little, definitely try it!
My favorite lip product! Will choose this over any lip balm

i like this because it keeps my lips soft but i can only use if at night (before i go to be so when i wake up my lips stay nice throughout the day) if i use this during the day i feel that it goes everywhere

Ive been buying these for years and will continue to buy them. Theyre my go-to lip balm before bed and during the day when Im not wearing makeup, and I rub the excess into my hands for extra moisture. The scent is light and pleasant, and the little tubs last a while and are economical.
I always have a tin of this lying around. Its the perfect post-shower balm for your lips. I have used it on my children to treat diaper rash... even my boyfriend uses it!
Very light, non-greasy lip salve. Love the light pink color and rose smell. It makes my lips look pretty. Not very long lasing, but still a good product.

Has the familiar, delicate, rose scent of the original, and the tube is handy without the worry of it melting in a pocket or purse left in the FL sun. I do like the vintage look and feel of the tin better. Also, in cooler weather its very hard to squeeze out, for fear of popping, as some reviewers have noted.

This is the only lip product that doesnt dry my lips out. I have very dry and sensitive lips and am allergic to most lip products because they have beeswax in them. This hydrates my lips like nothing else. I have one in my purse and one beside by bed. I know now why it is so popular.

I LOVE this balm. The tube is cute and easy to open and carry, and the price is right (so stock up!). Its perfect for my dry lips in the winter and leaves a nice shine. The smell is not overpowering, but I do wish it stayed on longer like other balms or glosses I own. I didnt realize it also helps soothe irritated burns or dry skin, so I think now this will be my go-to for just about everything!
I absolutely love this product. it is the only product i buy for my lips. i have one in my car, purse, nightstand, pretty much everywhere. would recommend this to anyone.

At this point, I dont think Ill be using a different cleanser any time soon. Two pumps removes all my makeup, and leaves my skin so smooth feeling fresh, not raw. After using this night and day I can say it really contributes to my clear, even skin.
chemicals: Retinol/retinyl esters, when in daily dosages in excess of 10,000 IU, or 3,000 retinol equivalents.

chemicals: Retinol/retinyl esters, when in daily dosages in excess of 10,000 IU, or 3,000 retinol equivalents.

review_text: Originally purchased a mini pack with 3 Rainforest of the Sea products (cleanser, hydrating mist and moisturizer) and fell in love immediately. I have since purchased all three full size products more than once. I have very sensitive skin and really dislike perfume-y / floral scents. This light citrus scent is fabulous, refreshing and mild. The water-based products feel so light, airy and super natural. I use day and night. My face literally just drinks this stuff up!
review_title: a drink of water for my face!
product_name: SEA drink of H2O hydrating boost moisturizer
chemicals: Retinol/retinyl esters, when in daily dosages in excess of 10,000 IU, or 3,000 retinol equivalents.

review_text: I love this pore cleanser! Second time using it and I really like it! Great price too!
I continue to buy this cleanser! It works so well with my skin type and is very affordable! I love how it makes me skin feel afterwards and the salicylic acid does wonders for my skin.

Ive purchased this 3 times now and I imagine if I dont find anything else like this, it will be a staple for a while. My skin is so easily irritated and I break out from things on my face all the time. This is the first face wash Ive had no issues with and that does a good job of removing makeup. It doesnt remove all of it so I would suggest a double cleanse. Love it!
This is a skincare staple in my routine. It has helped keep my hormonal acne under control. After washing my face, I let it sit for 2 minutes and have had wonderful results.

I was really excited to try out this product as it would be the first from this brand and for my skincare concerns and needs. Although I dont have large pores or lot of acne, I enjoyed this cleanser for my stubborn blackheads. This cleanser foams up lightly and I feel my skin glowing from this product. I enjoyed it very well and the price point for Sephora is also really great. The product did seem pretty small to me but you dont need a ton of product to do the job. Overall, great product and I will recommend to others.
Two stars for sticking well enough overnight but do absolutely nothing for the acne :-( Not buying these again.

This product is a dream! As soon as I notice a pimple coming in, especially a deeper one, I put a patch on and when I take it off the pimple is practically gone. This is amazing for me as someone who picks their acne because when the patch is on I cant touch them so it helps me leave them alone.

Love these! They work best on recently popped whiteheads, not heavy underground zits. but they are miracle workers on the type of zit they work on! My husband has started using and taking them. A little pricy but fully worth it.

Ive purchased these multiple times & each time I was satisfied with the results. I dont wear the dots for the 6 hours, I wear them overnight & my blemishes are usually gone within 2 days. The swelling & redness go away for sure; I will definitely keep repurchasing.
An amazing product. Buying it again. Wish they made bigger patches for my hormonal acne during that time of month!

It mostly works; I love that the cream is lightweight, absorbed quickly, smells great...Unfortunately I didnt see that much pore shrinking :( Ive been using the product for 3 weeks now so maybe I need to keep using a bit longer. I did see some shrinking though.
I received this product free from Influenster and Korres in exchange for my honest review. My honest opinion is dont. It stinks, its sticky, and I would not recommend.

This moisturizer just melted into my skin I tried it both at night which I do recommend if you have been dry during the winter months as for me I had a bad breakout recently so Ive been dry trying to correct that but anyways this melted in left me a smooth finish to apply my foundation it didnt separate my make up even hours later I would suggest that you make sure its fully absorbed before applying make but I would recommend wish I got a full sizeI have already added this to my basket for a full size
Received this complimentary from Influenster! This cream is lightweight and non oily! Blends really well into the skin! Would recommend!
I received this product free from influenster in exchange for my honest review. This skin cream smelled great, was smooth going on and made my skin feel baby soft. No breakouts or irritation either!
This product is great! It gives my face a nice, sun-kissed glow without being orange. I am fair skinned with blonde hair and blue eyes.
This product is great, but if you put too much on itll look orange and patchy. I put 3 drops and mix it in my moisturizer. You have to make sure your face is dry before you put it on though.

Bought this on a whim after seeing a bunch of hype over it! Ive been mixing it with my summers Friday mask and its been lovely ! The first time I used I only put 4 drops and it was just a subtle tan. The next time I tried up to 12 drops and I was very very tanned, however it slowly faded and was looked much more natural the second day. I have yet to try it out on the rest of my body but so far am loving it for a little extra glow !

When I first use this with my day cream I got the patchy look on my face, but I switched to mixing it with my Cera Ve moisturizer and now mix it WELL in my fingers (most important) and circulate it evenly all over my face. The tan is so even and natural and gorgeous, Im obsessed. Im using this all winter and will definitely buy more when it runs out.

This is foolproof tanning. No oompa loompa orange colour, no bad smell and you cant mess up the application. Super easy - just add some drops to my amazing grace lotion and voila. It looks best when you put it on at night, leave it to develop and shower in the morning. I used this to build myself a tan before my beach vacation and I was so happy with the results. Also bought the tanning water in dark, different application but also a nice product. Next time i think i will just get the drops in dark.

I was gifted by Paulas Choice with SKIN PERFECTING 2% BHA Liquid Exfoliant. I have heard so many great things about Paulas Choice and was excited to try this product. I noticed my skin was more calm after using this product. I have acne prone skin and any type of change, weather, skincare routine, food etc. would cause me breaking out. This product was able to keep acnes away from my face.

I ended up buying it because of all of the hype going around for this product. It definitely does live up to the hype. I noticed that my pores are becoming less visible after using it. I do have a bit of a bumpy texture and it seemed to get rid of that as well!

Im literally losing my mind right now Im 18 and Ive had irritation, patchy textured skin, pimples, big pores, and an uneven tone since since I was 12 and this literally cured everything over night my face is the smoothest its felt since I was a kid. It made my face so gooey and bright and it made me so look much better too. I tried skincare products for years and thought it was all just a scam but no. This works. And Im so happy and shocked. I never leave reviews but I literally have to this thing is incredible. Seriously so worth the purchase. PS: Make sure you moisturize after!! Use a toner first and then this exfoliant and then moisturize. Bravo to you Paulas choice I am shocked
review_title: My skin has been saved after so long

review_text: I order the travel size version of this to give a try. I heard so many great things about this product. However, I personally dont see what the hype is about; especially for the price point! All you need to do is add a few items in your skin care routine with Salicylic Acid and you should be fine. I personally think this is unnecessary. But if you want to give a try I recommend ordering the travel size.
review_title: Had to see what the hype was about!

review_text: They said to give this one a while to see resultsE. One thing I have definitely noticed rapidly i14is that it has definitely shrieked my pours a lot like others said it would ! But so far I love it.

I received this product complimentary of Influenster for reviewing. This product is AMAZING! I love the way it smells and how clean it feels. I noticed a HUGE difference in my skin within one week of using it. This is such an incredible product and I would recommend it to anyone.
product_name: Skinlongevity Long Life Herb Anti-Aging Face Serum
chemicals: Retinol/retinyl esters, when in daily dosages in excess of 10,000 IU, or 3,000 retinol equivalents.

review_text: Ive always been a fan of BareMinerals products and the Skinlongevity Long Life Herb Serum is no exception. It is a creamy, but not overly thick serum that doesnt leave your skin feeling heavy. After a couple uses I felt that my skin looked more refreshed and radiant. Im excited to see how my skin looks after more continued use.I received a sample of this product for free from PinchMe in exchange for my honest opinion.
product_name: Skinlongevity Long Life Herb Anti-Aging Face Serum
chemicals: Retinol/retinyl esters, when in daily dosages in excess of 10,000 IU, or 3,000 retinol equivalents.

review_text: This serum is amazing! It makes my skin look so smooth and soft despite the fact that I have acne and its actually helped with the acne. Would recommend it?:)
product_name: Skinlongevity Long Life Herb Anti-Aging Face Serum
chemicals: Retinol/retinyl esters, when in daily dosages in excess of 10,000 IU, or 3,000 retinol equivalents.

review_text: The serum works exceptionally well to add more texture and glow. The serum is very smooth and blends right in. I applied after washing my face in the morning and evening. I received bareMinerals Skinlongevity Long Life Herb Anti-Aging Face Serum free to test.
product_name: Skinlongevity Long Life Herb Anti-Aging Face Serum
chemicals: Retinol/retinyl esters, when in daily dosages in excess of 10,000 IU, or 3,000 retinol equivalents.

review_text: I really like this serum. I received a sample from Pinchme in exchange for my review. Its easy to say I love it. It melts right into my skin. I would definitely recommend on the fact that it feels so good on the skin
product_name: Skinlongevity Long Life Herb Anti-Aging Face Serum
chemicals: Retinol/retinyl esters, when in daily dosages in excess of 10,000 IU, or 3,000 retinol equivalents.

review_text: I found this product did a very good job of removing my make up - including my (very tough to remove) mascara! I gently massage it around my eyes for a 20-30 seconds, and then I wash it of with cold water. What I really like is that it feels moisturizing and gentle on my skin. I felt like I needed a bit more than I would like to use given the price point but other than that, Im a fan!

Obsessed! I have dry and sensitive skin and was desperate to find a makeup remover that wasnt abrasive. This is the stuff. I dont use the exfoliant that often, but I use the butter every night and my skin is so soft and youthful looking!

Im seriously impressed with this . Ive had issues with dry skin lately after a face wash that I picked up at a drug store . This stuff cut through my Huda resting boss face setting spray . A little goes a long way , but I didnt have an oily face after , it was just soft. Im so glad I bought this product .

Really love this cleanser. It takes off a full face of makeup without feeling drying. I see many reviews stating that it leaves E a film behind-I get what they mean but personally I dont mind the feeling; my skin feels hydrated as opposed to being stripped of its natural oils. I love that the smell is bland and doesnt feel like a bunch of unnecessary ingredients were added. This is now an everyday, makeup-removing cleanser for me that leaves my skin feeling silky and hydrated, especially impressive in the cold winter dryness.

Got this in the Play! box this month and I was so excited but unfortunately was so let down. This melting cleanser didnt feel great during application - I have only ever tried one other Ebutter cleanserE and it felt more oiler and smoother than this one. As well, after rinsing, and even using the exfoliant, I felt like there was this film left on my face. I felt like my face has been packed on with beeswax or like I spread lip balm all over my face. I did like the exfoliant and would use that with other products, which is why there is a two star rating instead of one.

Great moisturizer for combination skin - a little goes a long way. I have used a wide variety of face moisturizers from Aveeno to Eucerin for dry skin around the cheek and neck from shaving. This is one is a keeper. Naturally everyones skin is different, but if you are on the fence - price is reasonable and it is a top end product.
product_name: Smart Clinical Repair Wrinkle Correcting Cream

review_text: I was given a 5ml sample tube of the Wrinkle Correcting Cream by Topbox Circle and Clinique as a #freeproduct for trial and review. Unfortunately, the tube only contained enough product to use for 3 days & nights, so my review is limited to first impressions and cannot speak to long-term results (for which you need at least a month of use) or value for money. The formula is gel-like and unscented, which I appreciated, and my sensitive skin felt refreshed in the morning with no irritation whatsoever. The product also worked well under my makeup. Im sorry but I just cannot recommend the product without at least a full-months trial.
product_name: Smart Clinical Repair Wrinkle Correcting Cream

review_text: I have been applying the Repair Wrinkle Correcting Cream and I feel a big difference in the way my skin feels nourished, smooth, and hydrated. The correcting cream has a very lightweight formula that absorbs quickly without making my face look greasy. My face looks healthy and glows. I appreciate that the ingredients and formula in this correcting cream will help to reduce any signs of premature aging or wrinkles. I also like that the correcting cream is fragrance and oil-free. #freeproduct
review_title: my skin feels nourished and hydrated
product_name: Smart Clinical Repair Wrinkle Correcting Cream

review_text: I am thankful that I was chosen for this review. I received this product as a #freesample from #tryitwithtopbox . I found it absorbed well into my skin, and I was able to apply my makeup almost immediately after using. As far as having any notable differences to my skin, I would say it is hard to confirm that I benefitted mainly because of the sample size. I found the sample to be too small to be able to use consistently to achieve the desired results. That being said, I would try it again for sure! I liked the EweightlessnessE of the cream.
product_name: Smart Clinical Repair Wrinkle Correcting Cream

review_text: I received this as a sample with Influenster and I love it.. it made my skin smooth without being heavy.I think this is the first time i actually used every bit of a sample.I noticed a difference in my neck and face and plan on purchasing this soon.
product_name: Smart Clinical Repair Wrinkle Correcting Cream

review_text: I got this product for free for a honest review!! I must admit i completely loved it!
product_name: Smart Clinical Repair Wrinkle Correcting Eye Cream

review_text: I received a sachet sized sample of this product to try for free from topbox Canada in exchange for an honest review. This eye cream is thick but absorbed quickly. My skin felt really dewey after applying. I think it helped in the shorter with puffiness in my under eye area. Long term I think it would be great for preemptively targeting wrinkling.
product_name: Smart Clinical Repair Wrinkle Correcting Eye Cream

review_text: I received this ESmart Clinical Repair Wrinkle Corrrecting Eye CreamE from CLINIQUE as a #freeproduct from #trywithtopbox for free in exchange for my honest review.I used the product 3 times, because the sample I received was really small.I really liked the eye cream, it spreads well and absorbs quickly. It doesnt irritate the eyes like some creams and it has no smell, which I really like.Unfortunately, I could not assess its long-term effect.
product_name: Smart Clinical Repair Wrinkle Correcting Eye Cream

review_text: Received this product complimentary from Influenster in exchange for my honest review. Ive been using this cream for a few days now, and although it has nice texture (thick and not greasy), I havent noticed much of a difference in my fine lines or bags under my eyes... perhaps with more time/continued use, it will become more noticeable.
product_name: Smart Clinical Repair Wrinkle Correcting Eye Cream

review_text: I received a sample packet from #topbox. I was able to use the Clinique eye cream for 3 days. I didnt notice any results but it was only a few days. However I really liked that there is barely any scent, perfect for the delicate eye area. It wasnt a heavy cream and felt nice. #freeproduct
product_name: Smart Clinical Repair Wrinkle Correcting Eye Cream

review_text: I received this product as a small sample with #topbox to try. I only had enough to apply once, but I can say it went on nicely with a light scent. I do love the cream that joins this serum, happy with this line of products. If this has results the same as the moisturizer cream, I will definitely be purchasing! The price point for this serum seems high, but again, I would purchase as I love the cream that matches this line. Pleasantly surprised with Clinique this time!
review_title: Happy with this line of products from Clinique!
product_name: Smart Clinical Repair Wrinkle Correcting Serum

review_text: I received a #freeproduct sample through #topboxsamples, and have since been using it daily. I love the way it smells and how it feels. It is quickly absorbed into my skin, leaving no issues when I apply makeup. Ive noticed results within days and am glad I tried it! Highly recommend!
product_name: Smart Clinical Repair Wrinkle Correcting Serum

review_text: I got this Clinique smart clinical repair wrinkle correcting serum sample for a review. I really like this serum. My skin looks hydrated and smooth. And feels softer. I am 40 so starting to deal with little wrinkles. I wish the sample was larger cause I was starting to see a decrease in wrinkles. Will definitely purchase.
product_name: Smart Clinical Repair Wrinkle Correcting Serum

review_text: I got a small single use sachet sample of the smart clinical repair wrinkle correcting serum with the wrinkle correcting cream and the wrinkle correcting eye cream from top box circle. I have used this with the correcting cream and I am not sure which of the two products induce the tightening feel. But for a single use sample you can visibly see a softening of the fine lines. It is also scent free which is a plus. It is smooth to apply and non greasy. I have purchase a bigger size to check if it does what it says.
product_name: Smart Clinical Repair Wrinkle Correcting Serum

review_text: The consistency of this product was my favorite. It feels really emollient and moisturizing, which is nice for a retinoid product. It isnt a runny serum, it feels nourishing. After a few minutes, it felt absorbed into my skin and wore well under makeup and other creams. After a few days of use, my skin seemed to feel smoother, as would be expected with these ingredients.
product_name: Smart Clinical Repair Wrinkle Correcting Serum

review_text: I have very sensitive combination skin thats acne prone and problematic. Ive had such a hard time finding a face wash that it liked and then I received this one from Boxy Charm. I have to say its a huge game changer. My skin doesnt feel stripped and dry at all. My face is left feeling moisturized, clean and soft. It keeps my acne at bay and Ive noticed that a lot of the inflammation in my cheeks has calmed. Some people dont like the scent but honestly to me it smells like fresh cucumbers so I find it refreshing. Ill never use another face wash ever.

Loved the smell, the texture, and that it got all the funk off my face. However, I had my skin under control until I tried this and ended up with a few cysts in places I never break out. So that was a bummer.

I love this product! I have combination skin that is prone to breakouts, so I usually only purchase oil free face products. Although this facewash isnt technically oil free, the natural oils have never made me break out. In fact, this cleanser removes makeup so well, it has helped keep my skin soft and breakout free. It takes off foundation, bronzer, and even waterproof eye makeup in one easy step. I always use this facewash at night to remove my makeup. Also, since it is so gentle it helps even out my combination skin by not over drying. In the summer when its humid it takes off all the grime, and in the winter when my skin gets really dry it is gentle and helps soften my skin. I definitely reccommend this product for anyone who has sensitive skin or wears a full face of makeup everyday like i do.
review_title: makeup remover and cleanser in one

review_text: LOVE IT!! I love how it feel on my skin. It is so gentle and hydrating. I would definitely purchase again.

This is my second purchase of this face wash and I love it! I have combo skin and this face wash cleanses my skin leaving it smooth and soft without any oiliness. While it is not acne specific, using this wash at night and in the morning has improved the blemishes on my face. The formula is gentle, yet it still packs a punch. I do enjoy the cucumber fragrance.

This moisturizer is amazing. It does not irritate my skin and leaves it looking nice. But the smell is horrendous. Dont think I can justify purchasing the full size with how it sort of ruins your relaxing routine.
product_name: Squalane + Omega Repair Deep Hydration Moisturizer

review_text: I have oily skin and I was so delighted that this moisturizer didnt cause any breakouts some times oily skin still needs a little boost. The smell is unique not my favorite but the texture is amazing and it just melts into your skin.
product_name: Squalane + Omega Repair Deep Hydration Moisturizer

review_text: Like a warm sweater for my dry, winter skin. For some reason Ive developed this teeny flake on my skin that keeps coming back. This Omega repair cream has helped get this area of my skin feeling nourished and supported during winter months. Now that were in spring time, Im usually reserving this as my night time moisturizer. I usually use this in combination with a hyaluronic serum and depending on how dry Im feeling I either top it with straight Biossance Squalane oil or leave as is!
product_name: Squalane + Omega Repair Deep Hydration Moisturizer

review_text: This a good thick moisturizer that absorbs pretty well. If you have dry skin its good all year round. If you run a. It oily, Id save this for the winter/drier months mainly due to how thick it is. No noticeable fragrance, no skin irritations, doesnt pill under makeup. Overall a good thick moisturizer.
product_name: Squalane + Omega Repair Deep Hydration Moisturizer

review_text: Really love how moisturizing this cream is its nice for the day under makeup because it soaks in without leaving a greasy residue. I like to add an moisturizing serum at night with it because I like the extra hydration but that is not a necessity. It has a very light natural smell and a little goes a very long way.
product_name: Squalane + Omega Repair Deep Hydration Moisturizer

review_text: Even with my extremely dry skin Ive never been a face oil person because Im very sensitive and prone to breakouts on my chin. I received the face oil as a sample with the purchase of another Biossance product and fell in love and since repurchased. This oil is pretty fragrance free, light and easily soaks into your skin. Its the perfect way to lock all your skincare in for the night. I always wake up hydrated and glowing. Holy grail.
product_name: Squalane + Vitamin C Rose Firming Oil

review_text: I really love this product. My skin looks radiant and supple after applying it. In spite of having oily skin, it penetrates without leaving a residue and I love the light scent. The only reason I dont give 5 stars is due to the dispenser. It is too short for the bottle. I am 2/3 through and have to turn the bottle over to get more product. It is wasteful & risks contamination. Please redesign!!
product_name: Squalane + Vitamin C Rose Firming Oil

review_text: I got a free sample and have been using this product every night for almost two weeks. I have had tiny blackheads in every pore on my nose for years now, like, visibly clogged and can squeeze stuff out of them after warm water on the face. I thought they were there forever until this. Im literally watching them fade away more and more every morning. Its surreal. Old acne scars are fading, my skin is brighter and my pores are disappearing before my eyes! I have dry, sensitive skin and wouldnt use an oil in the daytime, so I just use it at night after my moisturizer. Make sure to wait a hot sec between your moisturizer and applying this oil. The first night it started rubbing off my moisturizer like it was pilling. But waiting a couple of minutes between applying the product solved that easily. A little goes a long way and when I run out of my sample I will 100% be purchasing a full size.
review_title: Blackheads, Scars and Pores Be Gone!
product_name: Squalane + Vitamin C Rose Firming Oil

review_text: The best face oil i have ever tried. I usually dont like oils at all as i have a very sensitive skin and it makes my skin supper irritated and red but this one is the only one that its super lightweight and doesnt cause any irritation to my skin. It makes my skin so glowy and fresh
product_name: Squalane + Vitamin C Rose Firming Oil

review_text: This oil makes my skin glow as if Ive just had a facial! my face feels so hydrated and soft too.
product_name: Squalane + Vitamin C Rose Firming Oil

review_text: its good but its kinda waxy and sticks
The smell is amazing but I dont find it to be as moisturizing as I expected. It has more of a glossy feeling. Dont get me wrong it does enough if youre using it before your lipstick.

I used to have this product but the lid got bent somehow and was difficult to remove, and then it cut my finger open, so I tossed that one right away. Then I purchased the mint rose one which I use ALL the time and smells great too. Now, I just repurchased the strawberry one because I missed the scent :) These are great lip balms with a slight glossy hue and they last FOREVER! I have had the mint one for a year or two and it looks almost brand new! even though I use it almost every day!

This product is one of a kind. The old fashioned metal tin, filled with a super strawberry scented wonder balm. I suffer from chapped lips year round, and this lip balm braves all weather conditions. Even in the hot summer months it doesnt melt! If you havent tried it you are missing out! It is a great example of what a lip balm should be!

I got this lip blam from a friend for my birthday a couple of years ago. Even now i still have plenty. it might sound a tad bit expensive but you get so much that it is totally worth it. it smells so yummy, is non sticky, and actually works. As a bonus is it a little bit glossy but not shiny.

It makes my lips feel really conditioned, and it doesnt dry them out like most lip balms do. I have asthma, and my lips tend to get dry easy from having to breath with my mouth open, and from the dry weather here in Arizona. I will keep using this product as long as they keep making it.
product_name: Sugar Advanced Lip Balm Intense Hydration Treatment

review_text: First of all, if youre trying to decide whether to purchase this one or the balm in the container, this one is way better! This balm is creamy, soft, warm, and so soothing! The version in the container is more stiff and waxy. Like other reviewers, I dont recommend storing this in your pocket or car or even your handbag on a hot day. It is very soft, and I can imagine it melting very easily. I love using this product because its very nourishing and it feels so good. (My eyes flutter and roll back into my head when I apply it.) The only complaint I have (or is it a compliment?), after the product does its job and wears off after about 8 hours, my lips beg for more. I dont find this to be true with other balms, which I do love. Something about this one leaves my lips addicted and needing more. In an expensive way.
product_name: Sugar Advanced Lip Balm Intense Hydration Treatment

review_text: Got this product as part of a Christmas gift set. LOVE IT. my lips stay smooth and hydrated for hours. Love the smell. I got the mini version though. I am not sure I would pay $30 for a full size which is why this review is not getting 5 stars :(
product_name: Sugar Advanced Lip Balm Intense Hydration Treatment

review_text: I thought Chapstick was where it was at when it came to lip care. No other brand, high end or drugstore, touches Sugar, though. This stuff, although expensive, is amazing at hydrating, smoothing and cushioning your lips. It has a slight smell/flavor, but isnt perfumy or overwhelming like some other lip treatments. It works wonderfully at those tasks, however, I dont see any plumping effects. This is ok with me but dont buy this if you are looking for a plumping effect.
product_name: Sugar Advanced Lip Balm Intense Hydration Treatment

review_text: I love this lip treatment its one of the best!! works great and is more like a treatment (like the name suggests) then a lip balm that just sits on top of your lips this product actually works!! only complaint is that it runs out too fast i wish i had an endless supply so i dont have to pay $25 eveytime i run out :)
product_name: Sugar Advanced Lip Balm Intense Hydration Treatment

review_text: I love this lip balm, it smells amazing. Might have to buy a few more and stock up!
Love this lip balm. Its hydrating & smells amazing. When I purchased this, prior to using, the Sephora cashier told me this was her Edesert Island productE - after using I understand why.
I got this as a reward and I loved it

I tried this in the store and loved it... I never spend $18 on lip balm... but my lips are so dry from the winter so I figured itd be worth every penny.. WRONG. it makes my lips even MORE dry.. how is that possible? Makes me so disappointed
review_title: Dont buy- makes your lips more dry

review_text: It feels and smells amazing. Coconut is my all time favorite smell. Not sticky at all. It does not what it says.

When first applying the lip balm it comes off patchy but after applying more product the color becomes evenly layered. Its not as moisturizing as I thought it would be. The product feels light on the lips and not sticking which I like. Complimentary from Fresh.

This lip balm has already become my favorite. It is so hydrating and moisturizes my dry lips very well. I love the tint it has and also smells good. I will be buying more. I received this product complimentary from Fresh beauty.

Complimentary from Fresh. This lip balm glides on my lips effortlessly and I love how it keeps my lips hydrated, nourished, and moisturized. This product is both a lip balm and a lipstick. One swipe will give you a light pink sheer, but the more you apply, the more prominent the color will be.

[I recieved this complimentary from Fresh, but all opinions are my own.]This is such a beautiful lip product- its hydrating and feels buttery on the lips, has a really pretty, buildable pink tint, and smells incredible! Its easy to apply and the packaging is really nice too! I love that the top screws on so it doesnt come off easily in my makeup bag (or when my toddler daughter gets ahold of it lol)

I was gifted by Fresh. Ive always been a fan of the Fresh Sugar balms and have several shades but this one is my favorite. Its the perfect Ejust bittenE pink that compliments anyones lip color. Its buildable which is really nice and the formula keeps my lips hydrated for hours! I always get compliments when I wear this. The packaging is beautiful, luxe and looks expensive. This is my go to balm! I also really love that I can feel good about the ingredients list. Im a big fan of clean beauty and only buy products that are paraben and phthalate free.
I love the texture and scent of this product it definitely does its job for a gentle physical exfoliants however in terms of cleansing it really does nothing to strip the skin of oil.

Perfect for the summer! With the sugar strawberry exfoliating face wash I have a pro tip I recommend not having your face super wet only slightly damp. Once you start scrubbing it in it instantly starts dissolving. So make sure you dry your face almost completely before scrubbing it if you want a good scrubbing. It did not strip my skin which means my face did not feel tight after washing it off. Which is perfect for all skin because if it takes all the oil from your skin your face starts to produce excess oil and you look to greasy. I received this product complimentary for review purposes.
I received a sample of this with my online order. I was excited to try it as I love the soy cleanser, but this was very harsh on my skin and uncomfortable.

This product is truly amazing, Fresh did it again! It smells amazing and it isnt too harsh or too gentle. After every use my skin felt amazing and super clean, it really felt like I got everything out of my pores. My overall skin texture and appearance improved after using this for a month, my skin is smoother and softer now. I use the Soy cleanser every day and this every 2 days. I did receive this complimentary for testing purposes and I honestly love it!

I love the gentleness of this product and how after using it my skin feels extremely smooth. I have combination skin and I didnt mind the hydrated and somewhat oily result after using. But for someone with oily skin I dont think this would be a great product for you. Only con is the smell its not the best in my opinion.

I used this after breaking out with another sephora product. Were talking massive allergic reaction blemishes.... this product knocked them out noticeably in a day. I could tell a noticeable difference in about 8 hours. Will definitely repurchase!
product_name: Super Spot Remover Acne Treatment Gel

review_text: After a recent hormonal change, I started having breakouts around my hairline on my forehead. Ive tried many products and nothing was working. After reading the reviews, I had to try it. I used this religiously in the morning and night and my pimples varying in size all disappeared in 3 days! A little dryness the first day of using it, but not anymore. I cannot believe how amazing this product worked! Miracle! A little goes a long way!
product_name: Super Spot Remover Acne Treatment Gel

review_text: I highly recommend this product. At first it seemed a little pricey, but I did my research and am happy. It does that is says its going to do and has helped my skin out a great amount.
product_name: Super Spot Remover Acne Treatment Gel

review_text: Didnt do much for my acne. I can feel a tingling sensation when I apply it but it doesnt improve at all. It comes in a REALLY small bottle.
product_name: Super Spot Remover Acne Treatment Gel

review_text: I had a pimple on my face for about two weeks prior to buying this product and then I came across this and checked out all the reviews and since the reviews seemed legit I went ahead and bought it. This is actually one of the best thing that has ever happened to me. This product helped, my pimple went two days after using this. Its awesome, I highly recommend.
product_name: Super Spot Remover Acne Treatment Gel

review_text: Youth to the people is an amazing brand and this product is no different. To start off I have dry skin thats pretty prone to small but frequent breakouts. The product smells amazing very faint but also fresh and citrusy but dont worry it didnt cause any irritation. Its super thick which is good if you want something that hydrates all night. I will admit it does make your face look kinda greasy but its nighttime so who cares also when you wake up its all absorbed so your face looks refreshed literally I go to bed with dry skin and wake up with normal skin! 10/10 would recommend its got a ton of helpful ingredients that Id recommend for dark spots and hyperpigmentation.
product_name: Superberry Hydrate + Glow Dream Night Mask with Vitamin C

review_text: Smells so good and makes my skin feel incredibly soft!
product_name: Superberry Hydrate + Glow Dream Night Mask with Vitamin C

review_text: Seriously the best product ever. I use this every morning (and sometimes at night if Im not using other actives) as an eye cream. Seriously amazing product and works GREAT under concealer. Once a week I use this as a mask. Will buy 2 during the sale
product_name: Superberry Hydrate + Glow Dream Night Mask with Vitamin C

review_text: I recently have been looking for a new skincare regimen to start caring for my skin a bit more at night time and get a kick-start on preventing wrinkles. I was told about this product from one of the employees at Sephora and this is my 6th day of using - I hope Im not speaking too soon but I am absolutely obsessed. The first few nights I was skeptical and didnt really notice any difference at all, but for the past couple of days I have been noticing that my skin is really starting to improve! It feels SO soft, and so hydrated and repaired. I am incredibly prone to hormonal acne, and I havent had anything pop up since I started using this so thats another plus. Im so happy with this product that I havent even felt the need to wear makeup for the past few days. This bottle does seem expensive at first, but since I am only using it at night, I know it will last me a really long time. Its so worth it to try this product!
product_name: Superberry Hydrate + Glow Dream Night Mask with Vitamin C

review_text: This product is mazing!!!!!! It works wonders. My skin is now hydrated, soft and with a nice glow because it looks healthier!! Im super impressed with the quality. Also it is easy to used because you can sleep with it!!! No need to take it off until the next day. If you are looking for a skin care product that is going to improve the texture of your skin, look. I further!!!!!! This product is mazing!!!!!! It works wonders. My skin is now hydrated, soft and with a nice glow because it looks healthier!! Im super impressed with the quality. Also it is easy to used because you can sleep with it!!! No need to take it off until the next day.
product_name: Superberry Hydrate + Glow Dream Night Mask with Vitamin C

review_text: I started using this a little over a month ago in conjunction with the YTTP Serum, and WOW! This moisturizer is light but powerful. It hydrates just enough without feeling weighted down. Can apply makeup over with ease, even in this dry Wisconsin winter weather. I added the face wash into my routine as well, and my skin has never looked better! I had dry patches, acne scarring, and some cystic acne which is nowhere to be found since Ive been using YTTP. Get it!!!!
product_name: Superfood Air-Whip Lightweight Moisturizer with Hyaluronic Acid

review_text: I received this as sample in my Play box. Nice moisturizer, kept me hydrated and my skin felt smooth. Not sure if I would play full price though.
product_name: Superfood Air-Whip Lightweight Moisturizer with Hyaluronic Acid

review_text: I love this moisturizer, I have sensitive combination skin and Im always afraid to use new products for fear of irritation or breaking out but this gave me zero issues. On the con side it is a light moisturizer so on my dry days I do need something more.
product_name: Superfood Air-Whip Lightweight Moisturizer with Hyaluronic Acid

review_text: I adore this moisturizer! I have oily skin and I never used to wear moisturizer during the day. This product is lightweight, but effective, and never leaves my face looking greasy! Another plus: it has eliminated the fine lines that were beginning to form on my forehead.
product_name: Superfood Air-Whip Lightweight Moisturizer with Hyaluronic Acid

review_text: My skin seemed to be soft and dewy after I used it :)
product_name: Superfood Air-Whip Lightweight Moisturizer with Hyaluronic Acid

review_text: If you have oily/combo skin, you NEED to buy this. It leaves your skin soft and makes your skin feel clean. Took off a star because I dont like the smell. Thats just a personal preference. If youre in the market for a new clean cleanser and dont mind the smell of of veggies, go ahead and take the splurge!

I wanted so badly to love this. I mean, it isnt the worst and I might repurchase it but I did notice my skin flaking my forehead and a bit near the eyes. It does feel very clean and a little goes a long way but I have pretty oily skin and this still seems harsh for me.
review_title: I wanted to love it but

review_text: i was shook. i was hearing ab this sooo much that i have in and tried the mini. skin feels #slay. just get it. thanks byee

I had a small container of this and liked it. I felt like it left my skin clean and residue free. So I bought the 8 ounce size. First, the pump wouldnt work, and I was going to return it. It functioned as a mediocre cleanser for a while. I was away from home for a while and came back to see that the remaining cleanser leaked out of the spout and emptied itself.

I purchased the 2oz version during the recent VIB Rouge summer sale after months of debating whether or not to purchase the full size offering, and I have to say Ill totally be buying the full size. One) a little bit goes a long way as I have been using the 2oz bottle every day, sometimes twice a day, since August 19th and I still have over half the bottle left.2) I have oily skin, and a few weeks back my husband mentioned he could see my pores under my highlight. Since using this cleanser daily, he made mention that my pores Eseem less openE which in turn has made them appear smaller. This alone would be reason enough for me to buy this product again, however . . . 3) since using this cleanser, my skin texture has improved, the radiance in my skin has become a little brighter, and my skin never feels stripped or dry.10/10 would recommend
3/5 only bcs Ive been applying it mainly on my nose
product_name: T.L.C. Framboos Glycolic Resurfacing Night Serum

review_text: This is a staple part of my routine to de-scale my face and on my underarms to help minimize ingrown hairs the day after shaving. I use it twice a week in cooler weather and once per week in warmer weather so the one ounce size lasts me a year. I noticed an immediate improvement after one use and my skin absorbs other products better after using this. I am careful not to use any cleansers that have active ingredients (such as tea tree) before applying this to my skin and follow up with the marula oil mixed with aloe vera gel. I have no reason to swap this out for something else because this has worked consistently for three years. I am a Black American with oily, acne prone skin.
product_name: T.L.C. Framboos Glycolic Resurfacing Night Serum

review_text: This magical serum is everything people rave about. Its changed my skin after a week of use. The bottle eliminates mess and is easy to travel with.
product_name: T.L.C. Framboos Glycolic Resurfacing Night Serum

review_text: This serum definitely smooths skin immediately upon application. Im so excited to keep using this to see long term results.
product_name: T.L.C. Framboos Glycolic Resurfacing Night Serum

review_text: Broke out my skin so not for me.Overall, good texture and absorbs into the skin well.
product_name: T.L.C. Framboos Glycolic Resurfacing Night Serum

review_text: This product is magic! My skin feels amazing after each use and it really helps to prep my skin for other products. I love that you just need a thin layer and its not messy to use. So easy!
product_name: T.L.C. Sukari Babyfacial AHA + BHA Mask

review_text: Perhaps this will work for some but it didnt work for me. I applied product to skin as directed on Saturday. Afterwards skin was baby soft and plump. The following Tuesday(right now)morning my face is red, blotchy fine itchy bumps. Ive never really had break outs. So this is a first and Im annoyed but when you try a new product. You have to take the good with the bad. I will return this because I will not be out of $80 dollars. Congrats to those who the DE baby facial worked in your favor.
product_name: T.L.C. Sukari Babyfacial AHA + BHA Mask

review_text: Makes my skin silky smooth and so soft. Imparts a beautiful glow and helps with my acne.
product_name: T.L.C. Sukari Babyfacial AHA + BHA Mask

review_text: This product broke me out every single time I used it. It doesnt tingle much while its on, but for three days after, my skin will break out and peel, and even my most gentle moisturizers burn my skin. I tried to only use the DE marula oil since they recommend it, but it didnt help. I dont typically have sensitive skin, so this surprised me. Ive read some other reviews for this suggesting that I mix it with other products to EcutE it, but for the price point Id really expect a product that works on its own without my having to experiment with it. After trying it three times and having the same reaction each time, Im calling it quits. Probably wont be purchasing Drunk Elephant again.
product_name: T.L.C. Sukari Babyfacial AHA + BHA Mask

review_text: Get. It. This stuff is great with cell turnover, which helps with a lot of skin concerns. Right when I put this on my face my skin started to tingle, when I went to take it off, my pores were substantially smaller and it felt like my skin was breathing & my skin looked glowing. I already can tell I will see great results when I use this more.
product_name: T.L.C. Sukari Babyfacial AHA + BHA Mask

review_text: I wear Shiseido Ultimate Sun Protection Lotion* to protect my fair/light skin. Its great, but it sticks to skin like tarnish on your best silver. This Clinique balm is the only thing Ive found that removes it easily. Shiseido recommends its Eoil cleanserE, but that formula is messy and well, oily. I very much prefer Cliniques silky smooth balm.*http://www.sephora.com/browse/product.jhtml?id=P173670&searchString=734681
product_name: Take The Day Off Cleansing Balm Makeup Remover

review_text: I love this. I dont find that this takes off my mascara, but the rest of my makeup literally evaporates once I put this on. A little goes a long way, so I actually find this cheaper than the drugstore makeup wipes I was using before. I used to have makeup marks on my white towels, but now there is absolutely no makeup on my face! I have dry skin and have had no issues with this product drying out my skin.
product_name: Take The Day Off Cleansing Balm Makeup Remover

review_text: Best makeup remover Ive ever used & ive used them all!! Gentle to your skin, doesnt dry your skin out!! Will continue to buy this product!!
product_name: Take The Day Off Cleansing Balm Makeup Remover

review_text: Amazing at taking off stubborn eye makeup and waterproof products. It is very gentle around the eyes as well. I find I dont need a lot of product so the full size lasts me a long time. I will continue to repurchase.
product_name: Take The Day Off Cleansing Balm Makeup Remover

review_text: I love this product particularly for my eyes! I dont use it all over my skin because I find it a little on the too oily side for my comfort but it just melts away my mascara! If you struggle to get off 100% of your mascara off your eyes this is deff something you need to try!
product_name: Take The Day Off Cleansing Balm Makeup Remover

review_text: I am so so so impressed with this product. It has been a staple in my everyday skincare routine. I love this formula and the benefits this gives are unlike anything Ive tried. Fresh has never disappointed and this product is no different.
product_name: Tea Elixir Niacinamide & Hyaluronic Acid Anti-Aging Serum

review_text: Ok, first of all, the formulation is this serum is so dreamy. The way it applies is so luxe, you really feel like you are treating and plumping your skin. And yes, it makes your skin so glowy and beautiful!
product_name: Tea Elixir Niacinamide & Hyaluronic Acid Anti-Aging Serum

review_text: absolutely love the scent. it feels very herby/natural. ive never had issues with fresh products either with my skin or breaking me out which is why i felt safe using this. i havent noticed significant effects but possibly over time and for now it feels nice going on and doesnt irritate
product_name: Tea Elixir Niacinamide & Hyaluronic Acid Anti-Aging Serum

review_text: Really impressed at how using this serum on a daily basis has really made my skin feel so smooth. I love that it hasnt irritated it either. I do have rosacea and Im always very careful on what I put on my skin.
product_name: Tea Elixir Niacinamide & Hyaluronic Acid Anti-Aging Serum

review_text: this serum has a milky texture and very hydrating. It absorbs nicely into my skin and love how it feel. Feels very luxurious and smells amazing. I will be adding to my nightly routine! Could be used day or night.
product_name: Tea Elixir Niacinamide & Hyaluronic Acid Anti-Aging Serum

review_text: Best cleansing oil ~ holy grail product for me. It is a gentle oil that cleanses beautifully. The pump packaging makes for easy dispensing. You pay a bit more for Tatcha but this oil will last. I wont be without it. Nice travel size also.
product_name: The Camellia Oil 2-in-1 Makeup Remover & Cleanser

review_text: This is amazing! Works great taking off make up but is also quite lovely as a cleanser. I got a sample of it and Im seriously considering buying it. Its great.
product_name: The Camellia Oil 2-in-1 Makeup Remover & Cleanser

review_text: This is the only tatcha product Ive used and it was a deluxe sample. Im still trying to use up the bottle but I have to wash my face afterwards with my face wash. My skin doesnt feel clean and feels kind of greasy. Also it doesnt remove all of my mascara. It feels like an unnecessary step. Maybe it would work for really dry skin?
product_name: The Camellia Oil 2-in-1 Makeup Remover & Cleanser

review_text: Great cleansing oil. The slip of this oil is perfect for cleansing without tugging or pulling harshly on the skin. Two pumps is more than sufficient to cleanse my face and neck. The fragrance is very light, slightly floral. Going to use with the Foreo next, just been using my hands so far. Even with using my hands, this oil is very good at removing practically every spec of dirt, makeup, and grime on your face. It also washes away easily, which surprised me. I immediately follow this up with the enzyme powder, and the combination of these two products is amazing. I will absolutely be purchasing again. Also, that enzyme powder does an amazing job of retexturizing the skin, many times better than the amore pacific version. Both of these products are now my holy grail cleansers. I hope Sephora carries more of this line. Looooooove.
product_name: The Camellia Oil 2-in-1 Makeup Remover & Cleanser

review_text: Was really Hesitant to put an oil on my face but it takes off even the toughest waterproof makeup; and my skin feels like butter. Would definitely buy again.
product_name: The Camellia Oil 2-in-1 Makeup Remover & Cleanser
