review_text: Doing skincare and licensed now for 20 years and I have to say this is a great product. Finish with Tatcha Water Cream and you are all set. Smooths complexion, moisturizes for an over all clean healthy glow! You WILL notice a difference within the first 3 washes/ combo water cream! That says it all!
product_name: The Deep Cleanse Gentle Exfoliating Cleanser

review_text: I recently switched to this after noticing my normal face routine wasnt working anymore. I dont have enough wonderful things to say about this. In a few short weeks my skin looks better then it has in years. It keeps my oil at bay and i Belize helps with the redness in my face. Go ahead and splurge you wont be disappointed! Also alil goes along way!!
product_name: The Deep Cleanse Gentle Exfoliating Cleanser

review_text: I use this and the water cream and have finally found what my face needed. This is absolutely amazing for my oily skin.
product_name: The Deep Cleanse Gentle Exfoliating Cleanser

review_text: It smells so good and I love how my skin looks after using this
product_name: The Deep Cleanse Gentle Exfoliating Cleanser

review_text: Great product! I have sensitive, acne prone oily skin and this doesnt dry me out or make me breakout at all! Cleans very well but not too much, doesnt give me that right feelings. And a little goes a long way so it will last a while! The only reason I give it 4 stats is because it doesnt keep ALL my breakouts at bay, a few still slip through. I handle those with masks and spot treatments! Still an amazing cleanser, love it
product_name: The Deep Cleanse Gentle Exfoliating Cleanser

review_text: omg this is the best serum ever! its light yet so fast absorbing and leaves my skin so smooth and revives it. my skin looks so dewy and plumped throughout the day. Get it
product_name: The Dewy Serum Resurfacing and Plumping Treatment

review_text: Ok this is an amazing serum. Love the texture and how it gets easily absorbed. My face is glowing and more radiant since Ive started using it. I am impressed
product_name: The Dewy Serum Resurfacing and Plumping Treatment

review_text: I received this complimentary from Influenster. Let me say, this is hands down the most AMAZING product I have ever put on my face! I have used it for 3 days and I can already tell a huge difference in my texture. It has a cream consistency and feels like literally velvet. It is pricy but I will not live a day without this, I am sold!!
product_name: The Dewy Serum Resurfacing and Plumping Treatment

review_text: When I started using The Dewy Serum I immediately noticed the nice texture. So lightweight and felt refreshing. Works very well in conjunction with The Rice Polish (Deep), and especially after applying to slightly damp skin. The only reason I am giving the serum 4 stars is that it didnt provide the hydration I wanted to my dry flaky forehead. When I applied the serum it seemed promising and felt hydrating, but in the morning my forehead was more moisturized but still slightly dry. On the rest of my face it worked beautifully. Also layered well with other products I had containing niacinamide and dry oils.
product_name: The Dewy Serum Resurfacing and Plumping Treatment

review_text: I received this product for free to try from Influenster in a voxbox. I am so glad they sent me this product to try because it has significantly improved my skin texture. My skin is very oily in some spots and dry and flaky in others. This really calmed down my texture issues amd makes my skin feel so soft! I will definitely be purchasing when I run out!
product_name: The Dewy Serum Resurfacing and Plumping Treatment

review_text: sadly this cream made me break out like CRAZY. i originally bought it to help with my dry skin due to my acne medication and after using this cream for a week my skin flared up after being acne free for months.
product_name: The Dewy Skin Cream Plumping & Hydrating Moisturizer

review_text: This is the 2nd time I have purchased this moisturizer. I use it in the winter when it is really dry and cold outside. It seems to keep me hydrated and moisturized!
product_name: The Dewy Skin Cream Plumping & Hydrating Moisturizer

review_text: I receive this product as a Birthday gift and all i can say is omG what a great product i love it
product_name: The Dewy Skin Cream Plumping & Hydrating Moisturizer

review_text: Thick, hydrating cream for the dry skin. Infuse it day and night and it keeps my face soft, smooth, and dewy. I am hopeful that the larger size remains available.
product_name: The Dewy Skin Cream Plumping & Hydrating Moisturizer

review_text: I received a travel size as my birthday gift from Sephora. I have large pores, texture from past acne scars, and dark spots. I tried using this moisturizer in the morning and at night, but I noticed excess oil throughout the day. I went into Sephora and purchase the water cream, and switched that as my morning moisturizer. I continued to use the dewy skin cream as my night cream. I wake up with my skin glowing, my pores are noticeably smaller, and I have no new acne. I recently purchased the value size, to ensure that I dont run out of my favorite moisturizer.
product_name: The Dewy Skin Cream Plumping & Hydrating Moisturizer

review_text: I received this product from influenster.LOVE THIS ESSENCE!! If it werent so dang expensive I would use it as my go to. It has an amazing light rice-wine like scent, and is very light but super plumping/hydrating. It works extremely well as an intermediate step in my skincare routine which is exactly what I need, maintaining proper moisture. Dont know what else to say but this is probably my favorite essence right now! And Ive tried many different ones from k-beauty and american brands alike.
i havent tried this product but i know there is a lot of hype over it. i wish they sold it in a mini or travel size before i spend 90+ dollars if i dont like it.

I received these products for free from Influenster and in exchange for my honest review. This product is used after cleansing your face, it absorbs quickly, leaves the skin soft and hydrated, ready to apply the other products, it has a very mild smell, its transparent very liquid texture and its packaging is very beautiful.
Miracle worker. Plumps my skins, and I notice an improvement in the way my skin takes in the serum or daily moisturizer. You dont need a lot.

Pricey; decent, but not great. I dont feel like it does a whole lot besides moisturize, and there are a plethora of essences out there with added benefits both at and below this price point.If you arent using anything at the moment and dont mind the splurge, this is a good, safe place to start. If youre willing to do a bit more research, you can definitely find better.

I have super dry sensitive skin and despite living in a ridiculously humid climate my lips are still ALWAYS dry and peeling. I bought this mask several months ago to replace my nightly chapstick that I have always applied just before going to sleep. I can not quite put into words the difference it has made. It surprises me how many people have had issues with this product but it has been hands down one of my favorite finds the last few years. At first glance the container is pretty small for the price but I have used it at least once (if not twice) daily for almost 5 months and am just now emptying the container.

not what I wanted...was hoping for a product that left my lips super moisturized the next morning. Id say they feel on the verge of dehydrated and I immediately put more on so they dont become dry and chapped. Seems like an expensive Vaseline

Im giving this a two star because I JUST put it on and Im already going to return it because its not buttery and silky as the original lip mask. I will say that the Red Camellia lip mask is still better than most lip masks Ive tried, and gives a nice tint to it, however the texture just doesnt beat the original. I will return this for the original one which is my holy grail.

This s a good lip mask with a smooth consistency however u have to apply it more than once as compare or other overnight lip mask like bite. It does help smooth out lips and provide a very soft pink glow to ur lips wish it was little more hydrating. Definitely better than other lip sleeping masks..
review_title: good lip balm not a lip mask

review_text: I was so excited to try this but I can already tell its going to be a let down in comparison to my LANEIGE lip sleeping mask. I exfoliated my lips, applied the TATCHA, and within an hour my lips were dry. They almost felt drier than before I applied this. I did not eat or drink while wearing this either. Im not sure how it will stay on all night if it wont even last the hour. My LANEIGE, even though designated as a sleeping mask, lasts for hours if I put it on during the day. This mask is a nice consistency, smells nice, and does give my lips a nice appearance while its on which are all pros, just wish it lasted and actually hydrated my lips for longer. I had high hopes for this but will not be replacing it once its used up.

I had gone to Sephora to buy this, and a sales associate convinced me to buy the AmorePacific Treatment Enzyme Peel instead which was a BIG mistake. I exchanged it for this, which I LOVE. The packaging, the company support of girls education and especially the product itself are all amazing. I should mention I have very sensitive skin and this doesnt trigger any reaction at all.
product_name: The Rice Polish Foaming Enzyme Powder

review_text: The staff at Sephora recommended this to me and said it was so gentle as an exfoliator I could use it twice a day. Yes its so gentle, it pretty much does nothing. I think your fingers are doing most of the work, its just rice flour I dont get the hype.
product_name: The Rice Polish Foaming Enzyme Powder

review_text: My skin was a mess after coming home from a cruise. I was peeling from a sunburn and flakey - it was terrible. I went to my local Sephora thinking Id be leaving with some kind of scrub to really get off the dead skin, but was advised otherwise, and am I ever glad I was. A scrub would have probably worked but also caused a bit more damage to my already fragile skin. This miracle powder is so gentle and it WORKS. After my first use all of my dead skin is gone and my face feels brand new. It didnt leave my skin feeling tight or overdry like some products have. Theres no better feeling than spending your money on something that actually works and benefits your skin. Im writing this review after only using it the one time and thats all I need - Im SOLD!! ATMi
review_title: Worth the price - by a long shot!
product_name: The Rice Polish Foaming Enzyme Powder

review_text: Purchased after a in store demo. I was very pleased with the texture and the way my skin felt afterward. However, this is not for sensitive or dry skin.It can be harsh. Had to return it. It says it is gentle enough to use every day, this is not true if you have sensitive skin.It is also very soapy.
product_name: The Rice Polish Foaming Enzyme Powder

review_text: It got rid of some EseedyE pimples, but broke out after using a few times.
product_name: The Rice Polish Foaming Enzyme Powder

review_text: Tatcha has always been a favorite of mine. This product is very moisturizing. I have dry/oily combination skin and this leaves my face feeling clean and refreshed, but not dry or irritated. Only note is that it does have a slight perfumed smell, but not over powering, its kind of nice. But if you are sensitive to smella it would be something to consider
review_title: Moisturizing with a light nice smell.

review_text: Ive been using this cleanser for about three weeks. I use a medium pea sized amount. I like the texture a lot, my skin feels super cleansed but soft. Pricey but the tube is large. Will repurchase.

Got this in my Influenster box. Came in a pretty box. I like how it was sealed on the big box, the box with the product and the wash was sealed. Followed the instructions which were clear but on the actual bottle didnt give enough instructions so had to find the paper that came in the box. Then I used it with my mom. It made our faces super soft and we thought it was going to smell, but it actually smelled pleasant. Would use and recommend. I received this product complimentary for review purposes.
I love the way it leaves your skin. I like that It does not make your face feel stripped. It smells like a spa :) totally recommend
MY FIRST TIME USING AND I LOVE IT THANK YOU TRENDMOOD
I had high hopes for this product. Mostly because I love the Tatcha brand, and have a number of products. But, this one honestly does nothing for me.
product_name: The Serum Stick: Treatment & Touch Up Balm

review_text: I received this complimentary from Influenster for my honest opinion.I do love this product before makeup or as part of my nighttime Skincare. I love the coolness this product gives. I took off a star because I dont see how this works as a midday touch up Unless youre not wearing makeup that day.
product_name: The Serum Stick: Treatment & Touch Up Balm

review_text: Sleek and portable casing the size of a lipstick. Great for touch ups and its fragrance free, great for sensitive skin. Smells abit like crayon though. Applies smoothly on skin and does not leave any greasy or thick layer on skin. Feels like it absorbed pretty well on my dry patch of skin. Have not tried it with makeup yet. It looks like a lot of product for the price, little goes a long way. But Im sure other serums out there or moisturizers can do the same. I got this product free from Influenster for my unbiased review.
product_name: The Serum Stick: Treatment & Touch Up Balm

review_text: This new serum stick by Tatcha is a treasure. It leaves my skin hydrated, flexible and feeling luxurious. Blurring out my fine lines around my eyes that are starting to peek through, my smile lines and worry lines. I also notice my acne spots are less visible as well. I love the ingredients so many benefits Hyaluronic Acid, lemon balm and squalene keeping my skin moisturized and protected through the entire day. It glides into my skin effortlessly. I use it on bare skin and before applying foundation, my makeup looks absolutely flawless. My experience has been delightful.
product_name: The Serum Stick: Treatment & Touch Up Balm

review_text: This is a decent product, the biggest selling point to me is it is easy for on the go. All of my serums are liquids and makes it hard to travel. This is easy to throw in your purse or carry on. It works decently well as it glides in the skin and sinks in well, but for results some of my other liquid serums have had a quicker impact. If you are a fan of this brand and do not put a price on skin care it is worth trying just to keep for on the go purposes. I did receive this product for my honest opinion.
product_name: The Serum Stick: Treatment & Touch Up Balm

review_text: Im so excited, I recieved my #complimentary Tatcha eye silk peony. I opened my container and felt the texture, and oh my gosh it feels AMAZING! This is the first time ive used this cream and Ive only used lancome eye creams in the past and this one is perfection! I already love it! I received this product complimentary for review purposes. Next time I will be purchasing it because my skin is going to NEED this!
product_name: The Silk Peony Melting Eye Cream

review_text: I love most of the tatcha products. However this eye cream disappointed me a lot. After using it for just a month I got milia all around my eyes and it darkened the eye area. I dont recommend it at all
product_name: The Silk Peony Melting Eye Cream

review_text: Great eye cream! My undereye always looks fresh with this cream!
product_name: The Silk Peony Melting Eye Cream

review_text: Everyone raved about this, which is why I tried it, but really, I see no difference in the wrinkles around my eyes. I didnt think it would make them go away, but I thought I would see some difference....none
product_name: The Silk Peony Melting Eye Cream

review_text: I received this product complimentary from Influenster. I am biased because I already adore every Tatcha product I have tried and this eye cream is no different. The texture is so creamy and thick but absorbs really well into my skin! I have super sensitive skin especially around my eyes and Tatcha is the only brand of eye cream I can use. LOVE LOVE LOVE!
product_name: The Silk Peony Melting Eye Cream

review_text: I like Belif products but found out that they are mot considered cruelty free. They do sell in China. There are a lot of brands that are so after finishing my current container I will be trying something else.

When I first got this I LOVED IT. I thought I finally found a moisturizer that actually moisturized my dry skin. I only needed a little dab to cover my whole face. Lately, I feel like after this absorbs, my face feels extremely tight, so I go back in for another layer... I have been putting on a face oil first and then putting this on top which is fine, but kinda defeats the purpose. It may be better for the spring and summer, but for now, I am still on the hunt for a moisturizer for my dry skin.
Love this moisturizer so much. Its so hydrating and refreshing. It smells pretty good and absorbs really fast.
Nice lightweight moisturizer excellent for everyday wear in the summer. I only wish it didnt have alcohol even though it doesnt seem to bother my skin id just rather not have any in my moisturizer.

I was first introduced to this product at my makeup consultation with Sephora in March and was hesitant to buy it because I didnt think I really needed a moisturizer for my face. Thought my coconut oil worked just fine for me. Fast forward to June, Sephora featured the product as one of the Beauty Insiders items, so I redeemed my points for 2, and the decision was well worth it. I have been using this product for over a month and have seen a miraculous change in my skin. I have combination skin and this product provides the best moisture for my face. I love the texture as it is very lightweight on the skin. A little goes a long way.

I tried this as a Hail Mary. I have eczema on my face, which results in very dry, flakey skin. On top of that, I struggle with acne. I needed a new moisturizer as the one I have been using isnt available to me anymore. I have tried a lot of moisturizers, everything from CeraVe to Tatcha. THIS IS THE BEST!!!! Not only does it clear up my dry scaly patches on my face, but it also DOES NOT make my acne worse!!! In fact, its been better since using this! Yes, it is scented (not too happy about that), but its not a big deal when considering the pros. The scent is a fresh lemony-citronella scent. It is super lightweight, absorbs quickly. I dont love that it comes in a pot as it is less hygienic, so I use a small plastic scoop to get the product and wash it each time. I really never leave reviews for products, but I want to help other people with acne prone skin who still havent found their holy grail moisturizer - HERE IT IS!!!
review_title: Dry and acne prone skin? LOOK NO FUTHER!

review_text: Love it! Very light weight and very moisturizing my skin loves this ! Would recommend it

I received this complimentary product from influenster to test out and review. I have to say I was pleasantly surprised. It has a really nice fresh scent, not too powerful but just enough to make your face feel and smell fresh. Not too greasy, goes on very soft and light. Leaves the skin feeling mosturized, refreshed and plump. Would definitely recommend if you are prone to dry skin. Great for the winter weather!

Fantastic moisturizer. Just a little goes a long way and it leaves my face feeling GREAT! I got a sample size for free in this months VoxBox from Influenster and will definitely be purchasing the full size in the future
I love this moisturizing cream more than the Aqua one. I think this is for me. I cant live without it. Thanks Belif. I use all line of Belif. I believe in Belif.

Such a unique and amazing moisturizer, smells and feels so nice on the skin! The water cream glides on and the water/moisture just melts into the skin. Love this product for days my skin needs lightweight moisture. Works excellent under makeup and SPF. I am a fan of so many Tatcha products, they have a line for all skin types, needs, and ages. If youre looking for a lightweight day time moisturizer I would highly recommend this product. For reference I am 41 yo with combo skin.
product_name: The Water Cream Oil-Free Pore Minimizing Moisturizer

review_text: I received a deluxe sample and used it in its entirety before making this review. I found the texture to be lovely on application. I just didnt find it hydrating enough for my normal to dry skin in the winter. I dont think Ill be purchasing a full size, especially because of the cost.
product_name: The Water Cream Oil-Free Pore Minimizing Moisturizer

review_text: I got this about two weeks ago and use it twice a day. My skin looks amazing! Ive always had pink splotchy skin with a slightly bumpy texture. The splotches are gone and my skin feels really smooth. Love it!
product_name: The Water Cream Oil-Free Pore Minimizing Moisturizer

review_text: I love this product; I have combo skin that leans oily and this moisturizer works wonders on my normal skin and the oil zones.
product_name: The Water Cream Oil-Free Pore Minimizing Moisturizer

review_text: I got this as a 100 perk and it was the full size that is priced at $68, definitely a steal there! The packaging, golden spatula and product itself was just so luxurious! For me, it absorbed really well, but it wasnt a wow for me. I didnt notice a difference with or without it. My mom (older skin) absolutely loves and it says it makes her face feel so hydrated! Her skin does look a lot fresher if that makes sense.
review_title: Luxurious but maybe not worth the price tag
product_name: The Water Cream Oil-Free Pore Minimizing Moisturizer

review_text: This mask really does clear up my skin fast! I also have to use it as a spot treatment overnight (the spot I put it on is almost completely gone in the morning) but I used it a bunch of times as a complete mask and it made my skin so dry and flakey. Last time it took me about a week to stop peeling and balance my skin again. Its the best spot treatment Ive found and will continue to use it as such.

Wow, I am shocked by how well this product works on my face. Im one of the EluckyE people who didnt get acne until my early 20s. It mostly cleared up with help from the dermatologist, but now at 27 I still get cystic acne on my chin, my forehead, and occasionally on the sides of my face. And it lingers for weeks and scars when it finally decides to leave. I usually have five to seven pimples of varying sizes on my face at all times. Since using this product, Ive noticed a huge improvement in my skin. Right now as I type this review, I have two pimples on my face, but theyre so tiny that I almost didnt notice them at all. Everything else has cleared up and stayed away without scarring. I use the product 3x a week as a mask and as a spot treatment the rest of the week. I follow with an overnight water mask (Laneige or Belif).Also, about the smell: It smells exactly like the lime dip that you give cats for ringworm. Its not a bad smell in my opinion, but its not your typical pleasant scent either. It does linger. I get a whiff of it occasionally, but it doesnt bother me because it works so well.
review_title: Made me ditch my prescription topicals

review_text: I love a good sulfur mask. For years I used one from my derma but for some reason the supplier stopped making them. In comes this! This mask does a great job of calming my skin and pulling out embedded dirt and oil. If I use this I know that my skin will be even and smooth. My only issue is that I have some sulfur sensitivities so I recommend being careful around the eye area. I also suggest using a washcloth to remove so you dont get any in your eyes-- this is true for all sulfur products for me though. I highly recommend!

I dont use this often but its my saving grace on the rare occasions I breakout. I just layer it on top of any horrible, red cystic acne before bed and leave it on while I sleep. By morning, any pimple has practically disappeared.
I was so excited for this stuff, but it did absolutely nothing for my skin except make my face smell like sulfur. Waste of money.

I love this toner! Ive only been using it for a few days and I feel like my skin is so fresh and hydrated. I especially like that a little goes a long way with this product. you dont have to lather up on it a small amount will leave your skin feeling and looking so fresh.
product_name: Tonique Confort Re-Hydrating Comforting Toner with Acacia Honey

review_text: This product is refreshing and helpful for moisturizing. A little bit goes a long way and feels lovely on my skin. The rose scent is nice and not overpowering. I received this product free for testing in exchange for my honest review.
product_name: Tonique Confort Re-Hydrating Comforting Toner with Acacia Honey

review_text: It is a gel like consistency and smells awesome. It isnt drying of the skin and it is mild. Some of the toners I have used in the past seem to strip the skin of its oils but this is light and doesnt not do that. I received this product complimentary.
product_name: Tonique Confort Re-Hydrating Comforting Toner with Acacia Honey

review_text: This is a very interesting toner. By that I mean that its not a traditional toner. This is a moisturizing toner so it doesnt leave your face feeling dry like some toners do. I took off a star because unfortunately the best way to put this toner on is with your hands which I dont like. Also the floral smell can be strong as well. I received this complimentary for testing purposes.
product_name: Tonique Confort Re-Hydrating Comforting Toner with Acacia Honey

review_text: Honestly this toner is everything. Highly recommend
product_name: Tonique Confort Re-Hydrating Comforting Toner with Acacia Honey

review_text: Triple the action with this power-packed eye renewal eye balm. The balm is creamy and fastly effective, after one use my eye lines and dark circles were less visible. I used this on my eyes every morning and night for one month, and the results were incredible! If your eyes are in need of some TLC, then this is the perfect eye balm for you.
product_name: Triple Algae Eye Renewal Balm Eye Cream

review_text: Been using this product for 15 days now. I received this as a free sample and I will continue to use the product. I dont have issues with puffiness but I do have issues with dark circles and lines/wrinkles. I didnt see much difference with the dark circles but felt like my lines and wrinkles werent as prominent. I will continue to use product because I feel like the area underneath my eyes does look smoother.
product_name: Triple Algae Eye Renewal Balm Eye Cream

review_text: I did enjoy the Algenist Triple Algae Eye Renewal Balm. As I age, the area around my skin is drier than normal and this eye balm definitely delivers moisture. It is so moisturizing that by the end of the day I can still feel it on my skin. It is not a greasy balm and I did see that my dark circles were very slightly improving. This is a decent eye balm. I just cant get past the price point. It is pricey.
product_name: Triple Algae Eye Renewal Balm Eye Cream

review_text: Gifted by Algenist. I have been using this eye cream for a few weeks and have been pleasantly surprised. It hydrated my under eye without being greasy. It also gets along with my under eye concealer- never creasing. I dont have terribly dark under eye so I cant say anything to that regard.
product_name: Triple Algae Eye Renewal Balm Eye Cream

review_text: I have used a few eye creams before and never really noticed a big difference but when using this one I started to see a difference it has great consistency. I did not have any issues with it and no problems with irritation. I used at night after washing my face and about 15 minutes before applying makeup in the morning so it would soak in and it is helping. I definitely recommend trying. I did get to try this for free through PINCHme but my opinions are based on my own experiences.
review_title: Great consistency and seemed to work well
product_name: Triple Algae Eye Renewal Balm Eye Cream

review_text: This product is really impressive. When I first got it, I used it everyday and I found that it made me break out. I figured I was using too much, so I switched to every other day and I have notice a lot of positive results. I hardly break out and if I do, the healing time is dramatically reduced.
product_name: U.F.O. Salicylic Acid BHA Acne Treatment Face Oil

review_text: Literally the best product Ive ever purchased. Not even mad about the price because Ive probably spent hundreds on things that never helped my acne. I have very sensitive, dry, acne prone skin and this completely saved my skin. Holy grail, will never be without again.
product_name: U.F.O. Salicylic Acid BHA Acne Treatment Face Oil

review_text: I have been a faithful Sunday Riley user for years. Id rather have my faves than pay my car payment. Lol but I reordered my ultra clarifying oil and tried it today. Something is definitely different. Even the labels are different. They no longer mention the tea tree oil and black cumin. Please tell me they are screwing around with one of my fave products. Im heartbroken. Id have given the old formula a solid 5 stars. I kept the box on this one in case I need to return it and start hunting another fave line of products.
product_name: U.F.O. Salicylic Acid BHA Acne Treatment Face Oil

review_text: I never write reviews or spend $80 on products but my skin was breaking out so bad and I needed something that would work so I splurged. And Im so glad I did. This oil works. Ive only been using this for 3 or 4 days and all the breakouts I had are gone and my pores and blackheads have definitely improved. Ive always had breakouts and sensitive skin and nothing has really ever worked for me until I tried this. Its expensive and smells odd but so so so worth it.
product_name: U.F.O. Salicylic Acid BHA Acne Treatment Face Oil

review_text: So I dont know why every review doesnt say this...but the smell is just rancid. I use P50 on my face and this smell is 10x worse its absolutely repulsive. It didnt do anything for my breakouts and Im not someone with terrible acne-I occasionally get clusters or just general clogged pores. For what it does (or doesnt do) its not worth dealing with the scent that lingers well over a couple hours after application
product_name: U.F.O. Salicylic Acid BHA Acne Treatment Face Oil

review_text: I really like this product. I received it for free but I do not like how it leaves a tint of purple on the skin. It is very lightweight and protective.
product_name: Ultimate Sun Protector Lotion SPF 50+ Sunscreen

review_text: I love this lotion! It does on the skin very well and it feels awesome on the skin! Blends in well and really protects from the sun!
product_name: Ultimate Sun Protector Lotion SPF 50+ Sunscreen

review_text: I love this suntan lotion, living in Florida I use it a lot! Looks good under makeup as a primer if you are going out in the sun all day!
product_name: Ultimate Sun Protector Lotion SPF 50+ Sunscreen

review_text: Love love love this sunscreen. It gives a nice glow lit finish and using it everyday you dont need to use a lot to cover your face and neck so it last a long time as well!! It doesnt leave a white caste and it doesnt leave a residue on your skin.
product_name: Ultimate Sun Protector Lotion SPF 50+ Sunscreen

review_text: I love this sunscreen !! It goes on easily and doesnt leave an oily or sticky residue. No white cast. And doesnt have a strong smell to it. I will definitely be using this regularly.
product_name: Ultimate Sun Protector Lotion SPF 50+ Sunscreen

review_text: This cream is great! You need need a lot, goes on smooth and leaves your skin feeling great! Most importantly, it doesnt break me out !! My skin has been clear for a week! I received this product free to test.
product_name: Ultra Facial Moisturizing Cream with Squalane

review_text: Ive swapped my usual moisturizer out for the last couple of weeks and I love this moisturizer. Its perfect hydrating my dry skin during our cold and dry winter. I have sensitive skin and Ive not experienced any breakouts or irritation. If you struggle with dry sensitive skin Id say give it a try! Also a little goes a long way.
product_name: Ultra Facial Moisturizing Cream with Squalane

review_text: I researched a lot as was looking for a new moisturizer but cannot try anything these days so only online reviews. I bought a full tub based on all the reviews. Its a good moisturizer but I would have preferred at least a light pleasant scent. I wish I had tried the smaller size first instead of the big tub I have now. I dont like unscented products but if you are someone who does, its a good one and looks like the tub is going to last a while. I cannot return it so but once i get through the tub I will be looking for something else
review_title: Moisturizes well but dont love it
product_name: Ultra Facial Moisturizing Cream with Squalane

review_text: I love love love this cream. Its perfect for combo skin. In the summer, my skin goes towards the drier side and this is perfect. I use it in the morning and my skin is fresh and vibrant all day long. It has a great consistency and isnt greasy at all, which I have found with other face lotions. I would 100% buy again and recommend to a friend.
product_name: Ultra Facial Moisturizing Cream with Squalane

review_text: I live in a very dry place, and this cream does the trick. Its thick but does not leave my skin oily or greasy, and does not cause breakouts. There is no scent which also makes it non-irritating even on the first use.
product_name: Ultra Facial Moisturizing Cream with Squalane

review_text: my face is glowing all day long with this serum I use it every morning !!!
product_name: Ultra Glow Serum: Glow + Strengthen Vitamin C Serum

review_text: Love the product but the top sucks... it peels and leaves white paint all over my hands and eventually my face... Would love for Sephora to change the top to something that isnt painted and wont eventually start peel off at the touch..
product_name: Ultra Glow Serum: Glow + Strengthen Vitamin C Serum

review_text: After a week of using, my face has brightened and I can see a glow throughout the day
product_name: Ultra Glow Serum: Glow + Strengthen Vitamin C Serum

review_text: This product is worth the price. I use it in the morning after I clean and dry my face. It great to use on dry skin especially in the winter time. It will definitely keep my skin moisturized all day long.
product_name: Ultra Glow Serum: Glow + Strengthen Vitamin C Serum

review_text: Been using for a week and I think it may be too soon to see results, but I do think this product has brightened my skin and possibly helped lighten redness on my cheeks. The smell isnt as bad as other vitamin c serums I have used either.
product_name: Ultra Glow Serum: Glow + Strengthen Vitamin C Serum

review_text: Best all around moisturizer. I use this on my baby, my eczema, and sometimes as a night cream with my Nude Rescue Oil when I feel like I need a little more moisture.
This stuff is so thick. But its amazing. My skin feels amazing the next day. I have the worlds most sensitive skin and this doesnt irritate it at all! Highly recommend!

i used the Etry meE in the local sephora of this product then went back and bought it instantly. i couldnt believe how soft and silky my hands felt- and they looked more even toned & radiant! its very intenseive but not heavy at all! i think this cream is really going to help my hands stay moisturized this winter!

Ive used this for a couple of years now and have tried different products, but always come back to this one. It works. Not really big on the smell of it when you initially put it on, but its pretty light and fades fast so its not a deal breaker. What it DOES do is hydrate very well. Even after washing your hands you can still feel it on - not like other products that disappear at the first touch of water. Ive used it on my belly to hydrate my skin during my third pregnancy. I used coconut oil and cocoa butter for my first two pregnancies, but it was so greasy and ruined a lot of my clothes. With my third pregnancy I decided to use this and guess what? No stretchmarks (yes, its true). My youngest son also has baby eczema and this has proven to be the winner. It really calms the skin and doesnt irritate it so he doesnt scratch. If you have dry skin problems, buy this. You wont be sorry. A little pricey, but not nearly as pricey as other brands and you get what you pay for.

I used this product for a week and developed the largest breakout I have experienced in years, Large painful cysts developed around my mouth and chin and my pores around and on my nose became clogged. This was the only change in my skincare routine, so I know this product is what caused my problem. The breakout took longer to heal than the amount of time I used this product. As soon as I switched to a new moisturizer my face instantly began to heal. DO NOT buy this product if you have sensitive or acne prone skin. Was hoping this would help with the side effects of tretinoin during the winter months. I will never be using products from this brand again.
I like the fact that it doesnt have a bad sunscreen smell but after putting this on my face, it flakes. It creates little tiny flakes on my face! Horrible to see after a long day!
product_name: Umbra Sheer Physical Daily Defense SPF 30

review_text: When I first bought this DE sunscreen, I liked it despite its thickness. Now that I have been using it for awhile now, I find I do not enjoy it as much. I have combination skin and I find the product melts towards my eyelids by the afternoon and causes discomfort/stinging to my eyes. This does not happen with my other daily sunscreens. I also experience more oiliness on the sides of my nose with this one. I am a fan of Korean and Japanese sunscreens and this one is not up to par. This DE sunscreen would be better in cooler and non humid weather for me. Tip: I like to warm this sunscreen between my fingers before applying so that its more spreadable for easier application.
product_name: Umbra Sheer Physical Daily Defense SPF 30

review_text: The photo is after 8 hours of wear under foundation and powder blush. I actually am really impressed by this product. I have tried a few spf products and I always find that they oxidize and look orange. This one wears so well under foundation and doesnt feel too greasy. It doesnt quite dry down but it also doesnt slide around on my face and make my makeup look patchy. Ive worn it to work for a twelve hour day and still looked fresh. Im not crazy about the smell but it goes away quickly. I took off one star because I do find that it has a white cast on my skin even though it is advertised as not having one. I will definitely purchase once mine is gone.
product_name: Umbra Sheer Physical Daily Defense SPF 30

review_text: Im giving it three stars because Im not a fan of the consistency of the product as well as how it gives my face a white cast. I have to rub it into my face really well in order to make sure there arent any white spots on my face. I am giving it three stars instead of something less because I am really happy with the size and how much product you get. For me, the formula is not my first choice
product_name: Umbra Sheer Physical Daily Defense SPF 30

review_text: This was just okay. Feels greasy upon applying. It does absorb well though.
product_name: Umbra Sheer Physical Daily Defense SPF 30

review_text: I love the feel of this Unseen Sunscreen. Feels amazing and perfect for under makeup. I wear it by itself when working in the yard because it does a great job and doesnt sweat off. Dont forget to apply sunscreen to your ears thats valuable real-estate too!!
Absolutely love this sunscreen its light and it does its job!

Giving it two stars because it feels heavy on my face and suffocating to my skin. I put it on and as others have said it doesnt soak in. It doesnt feel like other primers that I have used with SPF. I can still feel it on my face. I got it because my skin is dry/oily. My T zone gets oily while my cheeks and neck get very dry. I tried Elta 46 for face but it dried out my cheeks and neck and I had very visible dry patches. I read it was because of the zinc oxide. So now Im back to square one trying to find a face sunscreen that works well under makeup and works well with my combo skin and doesnt feel like I have a face mask on. Ive tried Cerave AM and my makeup just slid right off.

I love that this is really unseen! It is also one of the few sunscreens that hasnt broke me out as my skin can be quite sensitive. Its a bit pricey which is why I took off one star but I would definitely repurchase as this sunscreen lives up to its name and exceeded my expectations.

Im a sunscreen junkie and have tried dozens of brands (LRP, Elta, etc.). However, this is my current favorite because it doesnt leave a white cast, moisturizes and soothes damaged/irritated skin, doesnt sting my eyes, and my normal foundation (NARS sheer or tinted moisturizer) applies beautifully. The texture is similar to your traditional AB sunscreen, but thicker and more luxurious. The result is hydrated and healthy looking skin.

I received this complimentary for testing and reviewing purposesEShiseido makes some of my all time favorite sunscreens! The Clear Sunscreen Stick is my holy grail when mixing California sun & makeup. I have purchased and repurchased the Ultimate Sun Protector Lotion for years! The Fresh Moisture Hylauronic Acid seems to set in better than the Oil Free version, kind of odd... But aside from that this leaves a white cast and can not be blended in. But most importantly for me, neither performed well under makeup. They broke it down, had it fading MUCH faster, and had me looking shiny not dewy.
review_title: The newbie is not for me
product_name: Urban Environment Fresh-Moisture Sunscreen Broad-Spectrum SPF 42

review_text: Ive been a big fan of Shiseido for many years, so was very excited to try this sunscreen. I tend to be pretty picky about my sunscreens, as I need something that Im motivated to reapply throughout the day, and something that is easy to apply & reapply. It has to absorb easily, not leave a white cast, and not pill. This sunscreen absolutely fits the bill. The hyaluronic acid likely helps it to absorb better, and it left my skin dewy and healthy looking. Happy to be a fan of yet another Shiseido product!
product_name: Urban Environment Fresh-Moisture Sunscreen Broad-Spectrum SPF 42

review_text: I received this free for my honest opinion from Influenster. Easy enough for daily use, not too oily. Great sunscreen coverage.
product_name: Urban Environment Fresh-Moisture Sunscreen Broad-Spectrum SPF 42

review_text: This has a nice hydrating effect and is perfect for no makeup days! I was honestly a tad weary of the chemical sunscreen, as it usually irritates my eyes and I had no Ill-effects!
product_name: Urban Environment Fresh-Moisture Sunscreen Broad-Spectrum SPF 42

review_text: I want to start off by stating that this will be a new staple in my skin-care routine. It does not have that typical sunscreen smell or feel. Ive used this in conjunction with my other serums and moisturizers as well as just on its own, because it feels that nice. It helps keep my dry face moisturized all day, and the best thing about it is it is not greasy AT ALL. Absolutely love this product.
product_name: Urban Environment Fresh-Moisture Sunscreen Broad-Spectrum SPF 42

review_text: I LOVE this sunscreen! When applying the sunscreen it looks shiny but after a couple of minutes you cant even tell you have anything on your face. Thats my favorite part about this sunscreen and the fact that it is SPF 42. It truly is oil free. Love it!!!!
product_name: Urban Environment Oil-Free Sunscreen Broad-Spectrum SPF 42

review_text: I dont think this is as moisturizing as the other lotion I received to test. But this is great for reapplying after being in the sun all day. I am oily so this does a great job mattifying my face.
product_name: Urban Environment Oil-Free Sunscreen Broad-Spectrum SPF 42

review_text: I received this free in exchange for my review. This has not been my favorite product to use. The texture was slightly greasy even though its oil free. You have to quickly apply it so it doesnt run off your fingers. The scent is not bad. I wont continue to use as it leaves a white film on my face.
product_name: Urban Environment Oil-Free Sunscreen Broad-Spectrum SPF 42

review_text: I enjoyed testing the oil free skin protectant. I love to play in our outdoor pool and this product comes in handy for protection grok the suns Rays. I would definitely recommend this product to others.
product_name: Urban Environment Oil-Free Sunscreen Broad-Spectrum SPF 42

review_text: You know when you just want to take a break from the serum, creams and everything else during the day and still want to keep your skin hydrated and protected from the sun? Now we found it! I loved the consistency, the fragrance and how it spreads easily! The absorption in the skin is also wonderful! I highly recommend!!!
product_name: Urban Environment Oil-Free Sunscreen Broad-Spectrum SPF 42

review_text: This product is really working for my dry skin in the winter! It is so moisturizing and leaves me with soft, glowing skin. I dont have to use a lot which is a great benefit as well.

I am really not a fan of this moisturizer. It feels thick and heavy which I dont mind for at night, but my skin is a lot more dry than it is with my Drunk Elephant or Tarte moisturizer, both of which are lighter and do a much better job, day and night. I used this stuff for a week and a half and my skin is now flaking like crazy. The ingredients are decent but the outcome for me is not.

I love trying new moisturizers to see what works best for my dry/dehydrated skin. But for the first time Im planning on repurchasing a product because it works so well I have no interest in switching it up. I was suspicious because it was really hyped up but I tried it on a whim after looking at the ingredients and Im in love. Its very thick so if thats not your thing you probably will want to try something else. But if you dont overdo it with the amount you use its fine. certain moisturizers make my skin feel different but this is the first one that Ive found a noticeable difference in how my skin LOOKS. it might not be for everyone but Im in love with it.

This moisturizer is very rich. It makes my skin very smooth and fresh. Also I can combined it with my sunscreen and it wont get ball up like other creams that can be mix. I have oily to combined skin tone and it doesnt make my skin more oily. The cream is thick but not thick heavy because when you apply it it goes smooth with the skin

I received this product for free for testing purposes.I havent been using this product long and will update my review accordinglyI love that it is unscented and the texture is amazing. My holy Grail moisturizer is DE LaLa Retro and this moisturizer is very close in consistency and feel, at half the price! This moisturizer is thick and creamy and goes on so satisfyingly. A pea size amount covers my whole face and neck. Upon using this moisturizer for a few days during the winter when my skin is as its most dry I really enjoy it. I wasnt bogged down with oil halfway thru the day and I dont have any pesky chaffing on my skin due to lack of moisture. Also, I havent broken out from it yet! I really think I could have a cheaper replacement for DE LaLa here. And that would be AMAZING.

Ive been a fan of other Caudelie products for a while, but for some reason had never tried the Serum. I used my Sephora birthday gift as part of a contest through Influenster, and now I feel bad for not trying it sooner! I read other Sephora reviews before trying it because I have extremely sensitive and dry skin and was surprised to see so many positive comments about it working on age spots. I am 44, and live in a hot and arid area and have developed a couple of dark spots on my face and the back of my hands so I used the Serum on both and it has really seems to be making a difference! Not only has it lightened the spots but my skin feels smoother and the skin under my chin seems fuller and more taut. I am also happy that a little of the product goes a long way, so the small bottle is lasting longer than I expected, but I will repurchase once its gone! Thanks Sephora and Influenster for a great birthday present! I did receive this product for free in exchange for an honest review, but the opinions are all my own!
review_title: Great For Age Spots and Aging Skin!
product_name: Vinoperfect Radiance Dark Spot Serum Vitamin C Alternative

review_text: Its just amazing. My dark spots start vanish after a 2 weeks of use. Will buy more for sure
product_name: Vinoperfect Radiance Dark Spot Serum Vitamin C Alternative

review_text: it has not evened my skintone-which was my main reason for getting it in the first place & spending all the money on it. On my second bottle now and I think Ill be trying Ren. Still havent found my HG product for clearing up my acne scars along with the Retin A Im using at night but hopefully Ren is it b/c it has alot of great reviews. I love the antiox power of this, the smell & awesome hydration as well as the glow but I really really really want to get rid of my post acne hyperpigmentation.
review_title: It helps with radiance and hydration but..
product_name: Vinoperfect Radiance Dark Spot Serum Vitamin C Alternative

review_text: Didnt work for my combo/oily skin. Left sticky, greasy residue. My face felt sticky for more then 1 hour. Used it for a week, not sure if it is effective for dark spots since stopped using due to greasiness.
review_title: Not so good for oily skin
product_name: Vinoperfect Radiance Dark Spot Serum Vitamin C Alternative

review_text: I could notice a huge difference in my skin just in 3 days. It was softer and healthier. I will definitely purchase it again.
product_name: Vinoperfect Radiance Dark Spot Serum Vitamin C Alternative

review_text: I received this #freeproduct from #trywithtopbox in exchange for my honest review. I have really oily acne prone skin. This stuff is amazing!.it really helps keep acne and breakouts away without being harsh or abrasive. I have really big pores too and it visibly improved my skins texture after about a week of use
product_name: Vinopure Natural Salicylic Acid Pore Minimizing Serum

review_text: I am really enjoying this serum, its perfect. Only two pumps are needed for my face. It has a nice fresh, minimal scent. I has helped minimize my pores. I have seen a reduction in my breakouts. Will be buying again.
review_title: Perfect serum to minimize pores and breakouts
product_name: Vinopure Natural Salicylic Acid Pore Minimizing Serum

review_text: I like this product a lot in combination with the toner from the same range. They have definitely helped clear my skin and minimize my pores. I dont like the smell (like citronella) but it doesnt last so its fine. Definitely best for oily and acne prone skin as its not moisturizing.
product_name: Vinopure Natural Salicylic Acid Pore Minimizing Serum

review_text: This Caudalie Paris Vinopure Natural Salicylic Acid Pore Minimizing Serum is my new go-to! I was able to try this product in exchange for my honest review, but I will certainly be purchasing it on my own as soon as I run out! I have a pore problem on my nose, as many of us do, and this product helped shrink them to the point of being unnoticeable! I cant recommend this product more! Their Allure Readers Choice Award is much deserved.
product_name: Vinopure Natural Salicylic Acid Pore Minimizing Serum

review_text: I wanted to love this serum considering all the glowing reviews. However, I will be returning this product. I bought this because I wanted to add a solid serum to my routine, and the fact that this one was supposed to minimize pores and had salicylic acid sounded perfect, but it ended up just breaking me out. The smell and feel of the serum is nice but there were very few positive effects from using it. I hadnt broken out this badly since I started taking my skincare regimen seriously (~2 years). I wanted to give this serum another shot, just in case the breakout was environmental or hormone related, so I tried it again after about a week off. It broke me out AGAIN. Im beginning to feel pretty dubious about the authenticity of the reviews around this product. Ill just go ahead and say that it did not work for me whatsoever and that my skin would have been better served to not use it at all.
review_title: Did not live up to the hype
product_name: Vinopure Natural Salicylic Acid Pore Minimizing Serum

review_text: I love this moisturizer! Its so lightweight, yet it moisturizes well. I use it in the summer when my skin is feeling parched and all winter long. When Im more oily I tend to use a gel moisturizer, but this is great most of the time for me.

Please get rid of the fragrance. Its preety common knowledge now that added parfum/frangrance irritates skin, especially those with sensative skin, which this is branded for. Other than that, its lightweight for my skin in the hot, humid south Florida weather.
I originally received a travel sized sample of this product and I love it! I use it after the shower or after washing off my makeup at the end of the end and it leaves my skin soft and moisturized.

I recieved this in my Play box this month. This is a great moisturizer, its hydrates my face without leaving it feel too heavy or greasy. My skin feels really soft. I plan on buying it when my sample is finish.

I got the sample size of this on a whim. I was blown away. And Its hard for me to find profucts I can stand behind-let alone a moisturizer. But I had to buy the full size. I am so in love with this moisturizer, My skin is sensitive to oils and normally feels dry after washing. I put this on after and its so lightweight and clean feeling but really moisturizes like a dream. No greasy residue or anything of the sort. Absorbs well into the skin. Really does the job. The scent is also very light and gentle. Ive been recommending this to everyone I know lol. This is also my first time with this brand and I am now very interested in their other skin products.

As a person who loves Vitamin C and so does my skin, this did absolutely nothing for me. Only one star because I have to check a star. However, this did not deliver. The Vitamin C did not brighten anything up. The AHA did not exfoliate or change my texture. You can try a cheaper Vitamin C that performs at Sephora. I used it to the last drop with high hopes that I would see some result as other reviewers mentioned. Would never buy this again.
product_name: Violet-C Brightening Serum 20% Vitamin C + 10% AHA

review_text: I prefer tatcha over SK2. Ive noticed more results with this serum.
product_name: Violet-C Brightening Serum 20% Vitamin C + 10% AHA

review_text: Ive really seen a difference in my scarring and texture since using this serum for a few weeks now. Im excited to see the long-term effects! I received this product for free for testing purposes.
product_name: Violet-C Brightening Serum 20% Vitamin C + 10% AHA

review_text: I am obsessed with this serum!!! Within 7 days I noticed my skin texture was improved and refined. The formula is light and thin and absorbs quickly.
product_name: Violet-C Brightening Serum 20% Vitamin C + 10% AHA

review_text: Almost 2 weeks use and started to see brightening result. But returned it since it causes a bit of itching.
product_name: Violet-C Brightening Serum 20% Vitamin C + 10% AHA

review_text: I used the marula oil hand and hand with the TLC Framboos serum and it didnt quite provide enough moisture to do the job. I did like it in the mornings for hydrating my skin but after a while it was leaving my skin greasy. I might use this one in the summer but not sure if Ill repurchase!
Nice and light. Doesnt weigh my skin down. This has become by fall season oil.

This is a staple in my skin care routine!! Ive been using this for well over a year now and cant live without it. I tried switching oils a few months ago and my skin desperately missed the Marula magic!!! My skin is super dry and prone to acne. Just a few drops morning and night gives it the hydration it needs year round in the upper Midwest, doesnt prompt breakouts and leaves it soft and glowing. I take this with me everywhere.

ok it didnt actually, but now that I have your attention: if you are even THINKING about buying this product E"- DO IT. I put 3 drops on my face every morning after showering and it is life changing. Undereye puff? We dont know her. Bags? We dont know them. Dark circles? We definitely dont know them. Also, it has been helping with acne breakouts when used in combo with the other DE products I use at night (alternating night serum, C serum, and the Retinol). Use the oil about 15 minutes before you prime your skin for makeup and you will be SHOOK.
This is the worst oil Ive ever had the misfortune ti buy. Its extremely comedogenic and caused huge cystic break out all over my face! And I never ever break out. Terrible. I threw it out.

I have wanted this product for so long. My first impression is that it is 100% worth the hype. The scent is soooo good. Its very tropical and I love that. It made my makeup go on so smooth. I will definitely repurchase this
product_name: Vitamin Enriched Face Base Priming Moisturizer

review_text: This face base is so thick and creamy; which sounds perfect for someone with dry and sensitive skin. However, the product has a very strong citrusy fragrance. Luckily, it doesnt irritate my skin. The face base leaves my skin feeling hydrated, plump, and glowy. Its a nice product but I wish there was a fragrance-free version.
product_name: Vitamin Enriched Face Base Priming Moisturizer

review_text: Totally worth the hype! I understand why makeup artists like to use this to prime the face. It creates a beautiful canvas for any foundation. Its become a product I cant leave without. Def want to try the eye cream in this collection too.
product_name: Vitamin Enriched Face Base Priming Moisturizer

review_text: I have a combination of oily skin tones, and I love this vitamin-enriched moisture. I use this as a moisturizer and primer. It makes makeup go so smoothly; after using this, I noticed my pores look much smaller. The texture is very creamy but not grassy looking, and I love the smell of that cream. Highly recommend this if youre looking for moisturizer and primer at once.
product_name: Vitamin Enriched Face Base Priming Moisturizer

review_text: Perfect for under makeup and nighttime use. Skin feels wonderful. Well worth it.
product_name: Vitamin Enriched Face Base Priming Moisturizer

review_text: This mask is a godsend - I have combination skin and very visible pores on my nose. After one use with this mask, I saw significantly less gunk in my pores and my skin felt smoother to the touch. In a nutshell, this mask is super gentle on the skin (doesnt dry it out), but its very effective! Its so affordable and I love how this product also contains lactic acid. (I was gifted this product in exchange for an honest review. All opinions are my own)
product_name: Volcanic AHA Pore Clearing Clay Mask

review_text: this is the one mask that has actually done something to help my skin. my skin tends to have acne and this cleared my face right away. ive tried many masks and this is the first one that actually works. would highly recommend this! totally worth the money 100%
product_name: Volcanic AHA Pore Clearing Clay Mask

review_text: HOLY GRAIL!! This made my skin feel absolutely baby skin soft. My pores on my nose are basically gone after one use. Love love love love! Definitely buying more and going to use this twice a week!
product_name: Volcanic AHA Pore Clearing Clay Mask

review_text: fabulous mask!I feel like I dont quite need a mask since i started using the Innisfree line, since my skin is in amazing shape. however, I tried it out anyway and it was amazing like all the other products Ive tried. It applies nicely, isnt terribly scented and not over drying. My skin felt wonderful after washing it off, which was super easy compared to other masks. another fabulous Innisfree product!#tryitwithtopbox #freeproduct
product_name: Volcanic AHA Pore Clearing Clay Mask

review_text: I have a lot of stubborn black heads and this was one of the first clay masks Ive used to target them. I wouldnt necessarily say it helped with my blackheads as much double cleansing did however this is very nice to have to just relax after a long day or exfoliate lightly
product_name: Volcanic AHA Pore Clearing Clay Mask

review_text: I received this in my Sephora Play box over a year ago. I took the plunge in January or February and purchased the 1.6oz product. When asked how long this would likely last me, a Sephora employee replied with 6 months. I was moderately skeptical, especially after opening the product and seeing how little was inside. Come July, I still have what I would estimate to be about two months worth of product and I use this every single morning. Im so impressed with how hydrated my extremely dry skin has been and how worth the price it ended up being, for someone as cheap as me. It will be hard to not purchase this again when I run out.

I got this as a sample.. its okay.. not my favorite. I dont like how thin and watery it feels when applying I just prefer a thicker texture. Other than that its fine.. non-greasy feeling, does the job, a little definitely goes a long way, no scent. I personally wouldnt buy this but I dont dislike it.

I am 50 , with rosacea and breakouts and live in Florida. This product glides on, soaks in, gives life to your skin without a goopy feeling or oily shine several hours later. Gives life (without oil) to your skin. Makeup goes on beautifully after application of moisturizer.
review_title: Great Light Moisturizer That Gives Life To Skin

review_text: So amazing on its own, or under makeup. It makes my eyelid primer go on more smoothly too.

I have never used a moisturizer as amazing as this one! I was hesitant at first because Im not too big of a fan of Peter Thomas Roth products, but this moisturizer is seriously life changing. I promise you, you need this in your life.

This product is beautiful and worth every penny! I had been using The Ordinarys niacinamide and zinc serum since last December when needed and it did help to heal fresh acne scars but hadnt really done much to my skin overtime. I purchased this because Im a big fan of Glow Recipes watermelon moisturizer and sleeping mask and Ive been looking for an illuminating primer to wear under my foundation for the colder months. I started off just using this as a primer and I love it for that purpose, but then I started using it as highlighter on top of my foundation, and now I even use it as a serum at night and its helped my skin SO MUCH its incredible! Ive been having pretty bad acne around my mouth and chin due to wearing a mask for 5-8 hours for work and since using this for about a month now (paired with the YTTP kale cleanser), I havent had a new breakout! It also makes my skin so smooth and has gotten rid of some texture I had on my chin. I love this way more than The Ordinarys niacinamide because its also more hydrating and wears really well under makeup (The Ordinarys pills under makeup so I could only wear it at night). I really recommend this if you have dry acne prone skin (combination skin), textured skin, acne scars, and/or dullness due to dry skin!

I really wanted to like this product! The packaging is super-cute and the product itself has great reviews and a yummy, yet not overpowering scent. Unfortunately, it feels extremely sticky and tacky on. I applied to a bare face, and it was just this side of rubbing syrup on your face. After a couple of hours, I could not wait to wash it off. I returned it.

I am truly conflicted on this product. For starters I love the ingredients, pump dispenser, packaging, reasonable price, the hydration, how it sits under makeup, etc. My one and only issue is the scent. Its not OVERLY scented, but its definitely there and for someone with sensitive, acne prone skin, I wish it was without fragrance. I know that is part of the appeal, but personally it makes me not want to use it for fear of breakouts. I have used it about 6 times and have had some pretty stubborn breakouts throughout the week, HOWEVER I will say I also tried a new facial oil during this time period so I am taking a break from both to see what the cause is, but I have a sad suspicion it is this, due to the fragrance as that is usually what sets my skin off. I realize that this wont be an issue for everyone, but wanted to put that out there for those with skin like mine.As for the performance, I really did enjoy it. It felt very hydrating without being greasy. I was enjoying putting this under matte foundations. However again, the fragrance tripped me out because I felt like I was rubbing watermelon jolly rancher sugar water all over my face. Can you tell I am conflicted? lol. I think if fragrance doesnt bother you and you enjoyed their other watermelon products you would like this if you are looking for some extra hydration. For those with sensitive, acne prone skin I say cross your fingers that that make a fragrance free version, but avoid this.I did received this free to test from Octoly. My review is my unbiased, honest experience and thoughts. I hope you found this helpful.
review_title: Love the hydration, hate the fragrance

review_text: I was gifted by Glow Recipe! This sits so well under my makeup!! My skin looked more plump and dewy. It was not thick or sticky. It truly allowed my makeup to sit nicely in my skin! But Ive also tried it without makeup and it definitely gives the skin a nice boost of hydration. Especially paired with a rich hydrating moisturizer. I love how versatile this product is!!

This was gifted by Glow Recipe and Im v impressed with this dew drop! I love having a nice glow without all the shimmer and glitter so this is perfect. Bonus points for the niacinamide! Love that its a skin treatment at the same time. This is definitely a more natural glowy no makeup look product. A winner in my books! Its hydrating with a natural glow finish. It does feel a little sticky/tacky after a few minutes but settles down nicely

I tried this on for a week and it does smell good. However when I apply it to my face it becomes very dry texture than my other sunscreen. I am going to continue to use it because I havent seen anything bad.

Super nice product to use! I love glow recipe so I am always excited to try their new products and this product continues my love for glow recipe! Left my skin feeling so smooth, definitely a must have.

Ive been dying to try a glow recipe product, & was SO excited to see they came out with a sunscreen!! Ive used this a few times & cant believe how beautifully it sits under my makeup. If youre having issues with pilling, make sure youre patting it in & allowing it to sit instead of rubbing it. It blends super easily, is lightweight, & leaves such a gorgeous dewy finish. It looks great on its own too! The packaging is also great, I love the look of it. Ive never really used sunscreen unless its a beach or pool day, but this product is definitely encouraging me to start using it daily! Love it!

I was so excited for this launch, I tried it as soon as I got it! I love this sunscreen. It is lightweight and absorbs easily, with no white cast! It leave my face feeling hydrated, and Im glad to learn that it contains amazing ingredients such as hyaluronic acid and niacinamide to even skin tone over time. I cant wait to continuously use this to hopefully see good results!

IT is so lightweight and easy to carry around!! I love that it comes in cute packaging and I will be carrying it around in bag! Its so easy to forget to put in sunscreen but adding it as part of my daily makeup/skincare is so easy!!

I love this watermelon toner. It hydrates my skin without leaving a sticky feeling. I feel like my pores appear smaller. It has an amazing smell like a faint watermelon jolly rancher. My skin has been feeling smoother and less breakouts. I highly recommend it!
product_name: Watermelon Glow PHA + BHA Pore-Tight Toner

review_text: Smells super nice, gives a nice slightly hydrating texture! I knew I shouldnt have held myself back from trying this for so long. I recommend to just putting it directly on your skin, without a cotton pad or etc to get all the benefits!
product_name: Watermelon Glow PHA + BHA Pore-Tight Toner

review_text: I received this product as complimentary from Influenster. The product is incredible, my skin is so good right now. I have open pores and is smoother and brighter. I am very satisfied and now I am also a client.
product_name: Watermelon Glow PHA + BHA Pore-Tight Toner

review_text: Maybe its just me , I hope maybe its just that my skin and the product were not compatible, anyways , I am really upset that it took me this long to figure it out . It started in February 2021 when I saw an ad for it and I purchased it for its pore tightening benefits or wtv . A week or two later , I see my skin break out like crazy , and I brush it off , because this isnt the first time Ive had a break out . I have a hyperpigmentation problem , but it usually disappeared in 1-2 months (the spots) . They never did . They stayed and accumulated and I got pimples in places that Ive never had pimples in and dark spots that never left . I blamed the pandemic stress & masks . And mid December 2021 I decided to just stop using my toner and stick to my cleanser and moisturizer. And my hyperpigmentation started fading early Jan 2022 (now) . I know so because I started taking pictures of my profile and face the second I got a break out and hyperpigmentation due to the product. I took them every few months or so and I took them again today and I went back and compared to see what I did differently and it is all adding up . I dont know . If the product doesnt seem to like you at first, maybe its a sign & im just a fool. First pic is feb 2021 when I first started noticing & second pic is dec 2021 a week or two before I decided to stop using it. + it didnt do anything special to my pores , I just kept on using it because I wanted a toner.
review_title: This product messed my skin up for around a year
product_name: Watermelon Glow PHA + BHA Pore-Tight Toner

review_text: I found this toner is very gentle and can be used daily morning and night, it smells really nice and for application I used to use a cotton pad but theres so much waste with those and theyre not good for the environment (production) so I just shook some into my palm, as recommended, but the first time I thought I needed more than the couple drops I initially got and wasted a bit of product... You really dont need a lot and its better to go back to it twice than to take too much out at once. I feel like like it does what the name says, my pore feel smaller and less noticeable and my skin feels hydrated after application.
product_name: Watermelon Glow PHA + BHA Pore-Tight Toner

review_text: This works amazing. My skin is super soft, and gives a natural glow that doesnt look oily even for a couple hours. It might be sticky when you apply it but you wont feel it after a minute. I honestly love how it gives me a natural glow.
Broke me out. I thought this whole line was geared toward dry and sensitive :( dissapointed

This is my new go-to moisturizer. I thought I would only use it when I needed a light refresh, but it happens to be a perfect blend for my skin. I have VERY sensitive, acne prone skin and this leaves my skin soft for the whole day and when I put it on at night it retains that moisture through the night. This isnt some E fix-it-allE or Eanti aging miracleE but its daily moisture and makes me skin feel really good.
Smells so good and nice lightweight texture but broke me out in tiny bumps along my hairline and under my chin along the jawline. Plus it doesnt help with my oiliness, will not be buying again.

So, first of all, I have to admit that this feels more like a serum than it does a moisturizer - its very liquid and lightweight, and has a light, candied scent that might be off-putting to some, but I revel in it. That said, I do find this moisturizer delightful - it absorbs beautifully into my skin, and keeps it looking healthy and glowing all day. Its a great light moisturizer on days you dont want something heavy - fantastic if youre in warm California weather (like me) or warm spring/summer days anywhere else.
Nice and lightweight! I like to use it before bed with the oil :)

Let me start by saying that I cant live without JMs body butter. Ive bought countless tubs of it over the years for myself and to give as gifts. I have majorly dry skin everywhere and when winter comes in New England it gets significantly worse. My old face moisturizers werent cutting it so I set out to try something new. After trying multiple others with no success, I realized how dumb I was for not trying this due to my love of her other products. (I use the oils as well.) So I got it and I wanted to love it. But I dont.First off, yes, it definitely is moisturizing. And thats saying something for my dry winter skin. It doesnt break me out or irritate my sensitive skin. Its very natural and doesnt have any gross chemicals as far as I know. And its basically scent-free. However it doesnt do much but moisturize so if youre looking for any other benefits look elsewhere. It takes awhile to sink into my skin. Plus its kind of pricey for what it does and for the amount I need to use to cover my entire face because even though a little should go a long way, I cant seem to get a little to spread out very far. I have had it for about a month and a half and Ive been using it twice daily until about a week ago when I changed my night moisturizer so now I only use it in the morning. And Im almost through the entire container already. Ive had similar sized containers of different moisturizers last me 5 times as long. I also prefer a pump but oh well.The worst thing, as mentioned by other reviewers, is that it pils up on my face and it seems to be even worse if I top it off with the oils that are suggested to use with it! Sometimes it pils, sometimes it doesnt. Ive tried it every which way- even with no other products and I cant figure it out. It is annoying, sort of gross feeling, and it can make putting on makeup a nightmare. So Ill use up what I have but this is the major reason I wont repurchase.
Another great Josie Maran product. Its so great, my husband uses it sometimes when his skin is feeling dry.

I have dry skin and this did not work for me at all. It did not soak into my skin and it pilled almost instantly. It did not matter how much or how little I applied. It bunched up in grey globs without me even touching my face. It also left my skin feeling very dry.When I think of face butter I think of something that would apply more like an oil, and using a number of oils without issue over the years, I was very surprised that this didnt work.I purchased this in store and it was recommended to me when I requested a moisturizer that specifically would not pill. Had I been able to get a sample first, I would not have had to return it, but oh well. Not recommended at all but I appreciated that it was not loaded with fragrance.
review_title: Not at all what I expected

review_text: I use this more as a night cream and I put a heavy layer on. Its a thicker moisturizer. It is definitely unscented if that is important to you. However, if you are on the drier side this will not be enough moisture. It is basic. The amount of glycerin in it leaves it feeling like it sits on the skin rather than absorbing properly. This is mostly why so many notice the EpillsE during the day with makeup. If you want a dewy or glowing skin. Its not with this product.
Product works as expected and better. After a month of use, Ive notice enjoyable changes in my skin tone and will continue to use this great product.
AMAZING! This cream definitely plumps and soften your skin overnight! All it takes is one application to see the results. Love this product!

I absolutely love this Esleeping facialE because it actually does what it claims to do, unlike many other products out there. I have semi-sensitive dry to dry combination skin with dark circles. In other words, hard to please with just another sleeping mask. This not only moisturizes all the dry patches on my face and brightens up my face, but I especially love how plump my skin looks in the morning! Plus, it evens out my complexion, too. A must buy - this is my go-to on nights when I know that I have important matters coming up the next day.
I love this! I put the product on after I washed my face, and it looks amazingly!!! I think its worth the money <3

Ive had my eye on this for awhile because of the rave reviews and am always looking for great products to improve my skin. Finally got a sample to try it out before I shelled out the big bucks and so far am not impressed. I was already using a face oil at night and have not seen any new results from the mask. I was hoping for a more dramatic change.

This product didnt work for me. I used it properly and didnt see or feel a anything! It definitely didnt exfoliate my skin...cant say that it did anything special. I was excited to try it at first but its...seems like a off brand (not drug store brand but stuff you get in gag gift sets) skin care product with fillers and ingredients that just filled the tube up. Totally disappointed!
product_name: Yo Glow AHA & BHA Facial Enzyme Scrub

review_text: I was looking for a new exfoliator because Farmacy discontinued their New Day rice grains scrub. This one popped up and had glowing reviews. - Packaging:By the shape of the tube I thought it was eco friendly packaging too so win-win. It turns out to be plastic but they made it look like an aluminum tube. - Alcohol and Perfume in Ingredients:I dont have sensitive or acne-prone skin, but this scrub broke me out. After the first day, there were small bumps, and by 2nd day I had 3 red acne spots from just one use. My face after washing felt dry and tight, and honestly didnt feel cleaned at all. It also left my face smelling like IE d used overly scented body wash. The effect where it feels like youre scrubbing off dead skin is also part of the ingredient. I dont know why this product is labeled Eclean at SephoraE but it felt like a gimmicky product and not true skincare.
product_name: Yo Glow AHA & BHA Facial Enzyme Scrub

review_text: Such an amazing item for exfoliating!! It is very gentle which I love. I do exactly as recommended, I use it on clean dry skin and it feels so good. I love that I can feel the small enzymes working and smoothly resurfacing my skin. I also love the ingredients it contains. My skin is very dry and this product works amazing on it, and no irritation. After a few uses everyone keeps saying how amazing my skin looks. Thank you so much for making this product Huda Beauty. Ai
product_name: Yo Glow AHA & BHA Facial Enzyme Scrub

review_text: Just wow. This stuff is so gentle but you can literally feel the dead skin pilling away. I have incredibly sensitive skin and I have not gotten any reactions from this! Not heavily scented (no scent I think) like their other products.
product_name: Yo Glow AHA & BHA Facial Enzyme Scrub

review_text: Great scrub! Ive been using it now for almost a month I use it approximately twice per week. I have acne prone sensitive skin and this does not irritate it at all! I havent noticed a significant difference in the brightness of my skin but it does leave it very soft and smooth. Will continue to use!
product_name: Yo Glow AHA & BHA Facial Enzyme Scrub
